The Subspace Scanner is one of the most complex equipmets that have been developed. Originally used on Battleships only a small version of this powerful scanner has been released.

 Range: 10000m
 Cargo Scan Range: 8000m

Like the Advanced Deep Scanner the Adv. Subspace Scanner has a better power output than the normal version. The range could be raised this way.
This scanner is the non-plus-ultra for those that have enough money.

 Range: 12500m
 Cargo Scan Range: 10000m

Train

The Train is used to transport large amounts of cargo aroud the houses of Sirius. Its vast hold is counterset by its poor defensive and manovrebility during flight, which means that although profit margins during trading are high... so are the risks of running the trade routes.

Class:  Perun
Gravity:  full
Docking: Restricted
Amenities:  limited
Population:  Classified



The Boridin Space Station is one of the most powerful weapons of the coalition. Its Ion Cannon can destroy even giant battleships with just one shot.

At the beginning of the Coalition war the 45th Flying Tigers managed to destory the first Boridin Station with the assistance of Klaus Steiner. Many good pilots didn't survive this day.

Whisky (or whiskey) is an alcoholic beverage distilled from grain, often including malt, which has then been aged in wooden barrels.

The spelling 'whisky' is generally used for those distilled in Scotland. No whiskey brewed outside of Scotland may legally not have an E although brands from Canada, and Japan have in the past tried. The use of no 'e' denotes the Scottish exclusivity in international law just as 'Champagne' has to come from France. 'Whiskey' (with an 'e') is used for the spirits distilled in Ireland and the United States, but there are exceptions. The Welsh version is wysgi. The name evolved from the Gaelic uisge beatha (water of life). (Other countries also have their own 'water of life': see the Danish Akvavit, derived from the Latin aqua vitae.) Irish whiskey is typically distilled three times from a mash of several grains. Scottish whisky, properly called Scotch, is typically distilled twice, either from barley malt alone (see single malt whisky), or from barley malts and other grain malts which are then mixed together. Kentucky whisky, called Bourbon, is normally only distilled once, as are most other American and Canadian whiskies.

Whisky is drunk straight, with water or ice, or mixed with other spirits or drinks (such as Rye & Coke or Rye & Ginger Ale).

Whisky is sold in several styles. Malt whisky consists of whisky made from 100 percent malted grain, and malt whisky from one distillery, rather than blended, is called single malt. The grains used to make malt whisky include barley in Ireland, Scotland, Canada, and the United States, rye in Canada and the United States. Pure pot still whiskey is made in Ireland from a combination of malted and unmalted barley. Various types of straight whiskey, such as Rye whiskey, Tennessee whiskey, and Bourbon whiskey are produced in the U.S. which are aged in new, charred, oak barrels. Blended whisky is made from a combination of any of the above whiskies with the similar grain whisky or neutral grain spirits, which are much less expensive to produce than the other types of whisky. Blends will almost always identify the type of base whisky used, ie. blended Scotch, blended Canadian, or blended Bourbon. Light whiskey is a style of American whiskey made up almost entirely of neutral grain spirits, with small amounts (typically less than 5 - 10 percent total volume) of straight whiskey and sherry added for flavor and coloring.

At one time much of the whiskey produced in the U.S. was 'Bottled-in-Bond' according to the dictates of an 1898 Act of Congress; this practice has been largely discontinued, because one of the requirements of the Act was that such whiskey be produced at 100 U.S. alcoholic proof (50% alcohol by volume). Little whiskey this potent is produced in the U.S. anymore, partially because of changing public tastes but also because an alcoholic content so high is illegal in many countries, limiting the export market for it.
The Saber is one of the most deadly Schiffe of the eastern Koalition. Its strong hull and extreme firepower is a threat to all enemy Schiffe. A good advice would be to stay away from those Schiffe.

This is CNN the Crossfire News Network. Today there was an explosion which destroyed the mainframe of the planetary science center. Rumours telling that a middle aged man was running out of the building 2 minutes before.

Statement of governour Cole:
 'Today an explosion destoyed the mainframe of the science center... all researches about the possible location of the coalition fleet was stored there. The security cameras recorded that a man left the building just a few minutes before it got destroyed.

Today the smuggler Jim Novel got murdered. A witness said he met a man called Jack Blinch. Novel wanted to buy information from Blinch but they started to argue. Blinch said something about a Koalition SleeperSchiff in the Nephele system and that there is something hidden inside. At the crime scene in blood is written "Alaska - Omega-11 - Dublin".

Personal Log Jack Blinch:

On Earth, I came across a database containing a hidden star map with plans showing where the Coalition built up a colony before the Nomads attacked Earth. Although I'm not crazy enough to go there, I'm certain that these details are worth a lot of money! I have destroyed the mainframe so that nobody else will be able to obtain this information. The best price is what I intend to sell it for. To ensure that nobody finds the map, I have cut it into three pieces. Each piece is displaying just one portion of the location.

entries.source_text:
Jack Blinch's ship

This ship is damaged. Lifesupport doesn't work. The Pilot is dead, there is no information about how this ship got destroyed or who attacked it.

It seems like this was the end of his journey.

The Revelation Mine Dropper is the succeeding model of the Dual Mine Dropper. The previously seperated explosive charges of the original mines are now put into two chambers of a single capsule, which will crack when the target is hit. The resulting explosion is due to the higher compression rate and the close distances between the two chambers more powerful than with previous versions of this mine type. Dual Mine types are getting completly replaced by this new technology.

Class:  Okinawa
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  2k



The crossfire docks were built only two years ago as the system developed into a major hub for trade and military activity throughout the Sirius Sector.

CRF-156T Raven's Claw schwerer Jaeger
The Raven's Claw is very agil and very hard to hit. Because of its low mass it was not possible to integrate a high standard powersuply. The Schiff doesnt have enough energy to support level 9 and level 10 guns. But because of its speed the Raven's Claw still belongs to the most deadly Schiffe in Sirius.

Diameter:  5799 km
Mass:  2.719 x10e24 kg
Terrain: arid
Temperature:   -49°C/67°C
Escape Velocity:  5.13 km/sec



Crossfire … a fateful place.

In this place, many skilled pilots gave their lives in glorious battle against Nomad forces as the united houses of Sirius defeated the Nomad threat. 
This moon, now called Crossfire, takes its name in remembrance of its mother planet, destroyed by the Nomads. It remains as a memorial to the pilots who spent their blood in its defense.

entries.source_text:
After the houses fought together to destroy the nomad threat which nearly destroyed half of sirius, many new systems were found. Some of them were already dead. But others still contain planets where life is possible. This is such a planet.
The different houses didn't waste much time and colonized it.

This Station has been build to protect this system and the new colonies.
It's most important for traders and the supply of the whole system. Local naval forces have their headquarter here.

Shadowblade


This ship was firstly build by LSF but the prototype got stolen. A few months ago three different variations of this ship reappeared in border worlds. It seems like the Shadowblade is the light version of this shipdesign.

Deathblade


This ship was firstly build by LSF but the prototype got stolen. A few months ago three different variations of this ship reappeared in border worlds. The Deathblade has a bigger cargohold but less Batteries and Nanobots than the Shadowblade.

Warblade


This ship was firstly build by LSF but the prototype got stolen. A few months ago three different variations of this ship reappeared in border worlds. The Warblade has a stronger hull than the Shadowblade but less Nanobots and Batteries.

Geschuetze/Tuerme: 0/10
Panzerung: 350000
Laderaum: 600
Max Batterien/Nanobots: 0/0
Optimale Waffenklasse: 10
Max. Waffenklasse: 10
Zusatzausruestung: N/A
This battleSchiff is very slow but its strong weapons and its heavy hull still makes this a dangerous Schiff.

The Koalition Gattling is one of the most devastating weapons of the universe. One shot does release five high energetic projectiles. Each projectile is created out of its own energy source inside the weapon. That means that the energy loss is five times higher than it is displayed and of course the damage is five times higher aswell.

Class:  Svarog
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  Restricted
Amenities:  yes
Population:  Classified



This is the heart of the Coalition military. From here the whole coalition fleet gets its commands.

Liberty Dreadnought
(Virginia-class)

The Liberty Dreadnought is the most common active battleship in service throughout Sirius. Its classic compact design afford it strong protection and enough firepower to destroy even the toughest adversaries. Previous to the outbreak of the Nomad threat, these vessels were rarely seen outside of Liberty space, but now the Liberty government has released its closely guarded schematics for public construction.

Osiris Battleship
(Osiris-class)

Designed by Liberty Engineers, the Osiris-Class Battleship proved its worth throughout the many battles of the Nomad War. Its design has been released for public use.

Bretonia Battleship 
(Crown-class)

The Bretonia Battleship is usually not seen very often. Hiding in nebulas, waiting to attack those giant ships spread fear all over Sirius. Those ships usually can be found in Bretonia but because of the nomad thread the Bretonia government decided to release the plans for those ships to public companies.

Rheinland Battleship
(Bismarck-class)

The Rheinland Battleship is one of the most dangerous ships all over Sirius. This shipclass has proven its power and many heavy battles. Those ships usually can be found in Rheinland but because of the nomad thread and due to financial problems the Rheinland government decided to release the plans for those ships to public companies.

Kusari Battleship
(Edo-class)

The Kusari Battleship is the heart of the Kusari fleet. Only the most honourable captains will ever get the chance to command one of those ships. Due to the loss of the Kusari fleet after the battle with the nomads over Planet Crossfire and the resulting financial problems the Kusari decided to release the plans for those mighty ships to public companies.

The first Reliant-Class capital Schiff provided a base for the ancient Allianz- most feared fighter wing: the Flying Tigers. Its mythic Captain Foster heroically gave up his life and his Schiff by intentionally steering his vessel into a collision course with an enemy carrier of superior strength and firepower. His sacrifice saved thousands of lives and paved the way for later victories against the Koalition. It is to be hoped that such ideals will live on against die Nomaden – embodied in a battleSchiff capable of making even Captain Foster proud.

Bowin


The Bowin is a standard heavy fighter produced on the New York Shipyards. It's agility and the ability to carry heavy guns even just in small numbers makes this ship a threat to all agressors.

Wolverine


A fighter made famous in Rheinland by an anonymous ace of the past, this heavily armed warship has been re-engineered from ancient records. The Wolverine, although tough and and possessed of staggering firepower, is not known for its agility.

Tempest


Though perhaps not as agile as some other fighters, the Tempest lives up to its name with an impressive array of heavy weaponry and nigh impenetrable armor. A pilot's first mistake while facing a Tempest will also be his last.

Sai


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the heavy Sai fighter. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Predator


With only slightly less armor than many slower fighters, the Predator's deadly armament and extreme maneuverability has assured its popularity among the pilots of the Sirius Sector. The design has reappeared after its discovery in historical records.

Phoenix


Although ancient schematics mention a powerful beam cannon as this models primary weapon, the required technology has long since been lost. However, in the modern Phoenix engineers have created a fast, heavily armed fighter with all the agility of its predecessor.

Patriot


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the medium fighter Patriot. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Naginata


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the light fighter Naginata. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Mirage


Ancient records purported to have originated as far back as the mythic Alliance-Coalition wars frequently mentioned a model of fighter known for its extreme speed and agility. According to historians, the name may have arisen from one unlucky pilot's report that “destroying this enemy ... was a task as impossible as that of touching a mirage.”

Coyote


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the medium fighter Coyote. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Crusader


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the light fighter Crusader. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Grendel


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the medium fighter Grendel. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Hades


The Hades-Class bomber design is the result of prolonged effort by local scientists to decode ancient ship designs. Although recreating the original engines, weapons, and thrusters of this ship has proved impossible, engineers have used the hull as a mount for modern VHF equipment. The result: the first pure torpedo bomber.

M13 Class 'Deimos' Corsair sehr schwerer Jaeger
After the discovery of wrecks and ancient ship schematics on Planet Pygr, production of the Deimos commenced at Tripoli Werft. Analysis demonstrates that this ship was not designed in the Sirius Sector. The components found on Pygr may have belonged to an experimental Koalition ship that crashed on the planet after an attempt to pursue the Hispania sleeper ship. Its extremely powerful armor, high core output, and strong offensive capabilities give it its nickname: “The Real One”

Strike Carrier
The most impressive warSchiff ever constructed, this Ship carries more firepower than some entire battlegroups from previous eras. Extremely large and heavy armed, it is a proto-typical strike carrier, self-sufficient, self-sustaining, and able to wreak havoc on enemy forces. Even with the guns alone, it can simultaneously engage several cruisers worth of firepower, and come out alive. The new 100k Carrier shield prototype gives additional protection to this very slow Ship.

When we came here the Earth was dead. No man alive. 
Seems like the Nomads have found this place and destoyed the Mars colony and the Saturn stations...even the coalition colonies are waste grounds now. I don't know how they did it but here on earth all humans got killed. The cities and the infrastructure have no damage... it's just weird. It seems like the Nomads destroyed the defence before they started an invasion on the ground.

We scanned the whole System but we didn't find any nomad ships. It seems like the main fleet left this system a few years ago. The Nomads reprogrammed some of the old Coaltion carriers to protect this system until they would come back. 
A few of these carriers are still out there.

entries.source_text:
I heard some high ranked navy officers discusing about what was going on here. 
One of them said something about a database which contains information about the time when the Nomads arrived here.

It was about 200 years ago when the first Nomad battlegroup entered the Sol system. The coalition tried to fight them back but they failed. The Nomad fleet destroyed all the colonies and stations until they reached the Earth defence line.

The Coalition was defeated.
But a few hundred years ago they constructed three Sleepships which never were used because it was too risky. These ships were the only chance to safe a few lifes now. So they decided to launch them... the CNS Moscow, the CNS Minsk and the CNS Stalin.

entries.source_text: Did you see the sleeperSchiff wreck in Nephele? It looks like the old alliance sleeperSchiffe but it's a Koalition version. I wonder what happened to it and where the other two Schiffe are.

Due to the fact that the infrastructure on Earth is still working we have the chance now to produced these large trains here. Because of the very well developed technology on this planet we are able to produce such Schiffe with less costs so we can offer them even to Freelancers now.

BDR-337 'Defender' Liberty schwerer Jaeger
'The best of the best,' this heavily outfitted rig represents the pinnacle of Liberty's technological advances and design savoir faire. With its elevated armor and power rating as standard and the additional mount of firepower, it's no wonder that this Schiff is the number one choice of the Liberty Armed Forces.

Have you seen all these new Schiffe here? Some are reinventions of the militaries but most have another origins.
There is a rumour about a coaliton sleeperSchiff somewhere in these systems. When the scientists explored it they have found a database with many new Schiffdesigns.

The missing Kusari Fleet has sent a transmission from a system called Death Valley. Seems like they are under attack by heavy nomad forces. I dont know where this system is but most likely it is somewhere in the Nomad territory. 

Only a single ship returned to Planet Crossfire until yet. Seems like the Kusari have found a disk with information about the Earth.

GTz-'Enfilade' Pirate sehr schwerer Jaeger
This ship was made to give the inner worlds pirates an edge over the new technology showing up from the major houses and corporations, and it does it's job well. Masseive hull, full compliment of guns, and all the extras make this ship a frightening force in Sirius.

Independant 'Rage Bringer'  sehr schwerer Jaeger
The Independant designed Rage Bringer was created to stem the flow of red ink for the traders, and corporations. Too many losses were being incurred due to the ever growing strength of pirates, so the Rage Bringer was born. It is a big, yet sleek Schiff, with loads of power, guns, and armor, which makes it a deadly foe indeed.

Corporation 'Silverfish' Very Heavy Fighter

The Silverfish is a corporate defense fighter, and also an offensive weapon when scouting new fields or systems for resources. It has everything a combat pilot could want, and some that a merchant wouldn't mind, either. It has an increased cargo bay, but a little less armor.

entries.source_text:
FRL-96z Liberty 'Interloper' Heavy Fighter

Designed out of necessity, rather than want, the Interloper was born as a heavy scout class, that sacrifices 1 gun, and 1 turret for more armor, while retaining its agility. It can scout areas that light fighters wouldn't stand a chance in, and it does it in style. A great step forward for Liberty, and a hole in their technology tree plugged.

entries.source_text:
BR-11 'Marauder' schwerer Jaeger
The Bretonia Marauder is the newest from Bretonia's Schiff engineers. It deviates from the rounded, plump design to a sleeker, more efficient and hard to hit design. It is only in limited testing now, and she is proving herself so far. Good agility, good armor, smaller hold, make this Schiff worth flying.

Liberty Guardian VHF
Another remarkable attempt to 'even the odds', The Guardian can stand toe to toe with any fighter in Sirius. Liberty Shipwrights have created a force to be considered by any pirate, no matter his Schiff.

RSM-15r 'Gunstar' Rheinland sehr schwerer Jaeger
As the Rheinland Schiffwrights deviate from the standard form and function of their fighters, they are realizing greater and greater gains in performance, and power. Not as pretty a sight as the Valkyre, but far more deadly in the hands of Rheinland's forces.

J10P - 15P 'Draconji' Kusari sehr schwerer Jaeger
'The Serpent's Might,' this Schiff is the new might of Kusari military knowledge and technology. The Draconji is an answer to the evolution of the Dragon, and is advanced in every way.

CTE 750AE-1P Civilian Starskipper

Manufactured in the heartland of Liberty, the new StarSkipper is the progression of Liberty's commitment to the civilian line. More nanobots, and shields, a thicker skin of armor are just a few of the new refinements to the trusty Starflier design, but with radical new styling, this ship is sure to be a hit!

07A 'Elite Defender' Liberty sehr schwerer Jaeger
This Schiff is an advanced prototype from the Schiff engineers of Liberty. Liberty hierarchy were tired of getting beaten back by borderworld pirates and criminals as they tried to explore, so they put their collective heads together and came up with one of the most cutting edge Schiffe in existance. Soon, the original defender will be a thing of the past, and the Elite Defender will make it's mark.

Ceptyr Very Heavy Fighter

The Ceptyr is a blend of the new and the old, combined to make a stout fighter, with sturdy yet sleek looks. The Ceptyr is a powerful fighter, in the hands of a good pilot. Engineered and designed by Baene.
entries.translation_text:
Ceptyr sehr schwerer Jaeger

entries.source_text:
Kopfgeldjaeger 'Shifter' Prototype 1
The Shifter is an odd looking ship, but was VERY effective in all field tests thus-far. The Kopfgeldjaeger Guild has equiped this ship with the most dead technology they could buy for money.

Independant 'Seething Fury' VHF

The Seething Fury is all about space combat. It was designed to give every possible advantage to its pilot, with technology that is superior in design and function. The creator of this ship used concepts from Borderworld craft, and Kusari craft to meld into a deadly machine.

Civilian 'Scourge' VHF

 The Scourge creates yet another example of the innovation and drive of the civilian engineers. Not satisfied with limiting pilots to the Eagle, they created the Scourge as a viable alternative. It is bulkier than it's brother, but flies remarkably well, and fights like the devil, making this ship a sure bet in the hands of a good pilot. As a side note, it also handles a decent bit of cargo, making it a profitable ship as well.

Bullpup MkI
A throwback to old designs, the Bullpup is a stout Schiff nevertheless. No engineer has claimed responsibility for the design, but many factions are seeking to use the Schiff for their armadas.

Bullpup Mk II VHF

A throwback to old designs, the Bullpup is a stout ship nevertheless. No engineer has claimed responsibility for the design, but many factions are seeking to use the ship for their armadas. This is the next step in the Bullpup series.

Bullpup Mk III Assault Frachter
A throwback to old designs, the Bullpup is a stout ship nevertheless. No engineer has claimed responsibility for the design, but many factions are seeking to use the ship for their armadas. This is the last step in the Bullpup series. This attack Frachter has a frightening amount of guns, plenty of power and a cargo hold to haul in the riches. A very stable ship, able to defend itself as well as it hauls cargo. This model uses a pilot and 2 co-pilots OR robots/androids to fill the roll.

Hydra Mk III VHF

 This is the precursor to the bomber class. Little slower, but with more armor, and an extra torpedo slot, the Hydra is a very mean ship. Able to take out Capital Class ships by itself or easily with an escort force. This ship is not to be taken lightly!

'Elder' Prototype Capital Ship Killer

An extreme prototype design, being tested now. The 'Elder' is a very strange ship, designed solely to take out Cap Ships. It has a devestating forward gun, along with 4 regular gun mounts, and twin torpedo launchers. Capital Ships don't stand a chance against this ship.

Phoenix Project Cannon
The Phoenix Cannon is an attempt to put Schlachtschiff weapon technology into fighter mountable guns. This is a lethal cannon, firing large projectiles, using a new kind of energy system, so it's not the biggest energy hog in the family.

Scharnhorst Wreck
This is the wreck of the Rheinland battleSchiff Scharnhorst, abandoned after engaging the Kusari Tamasu. The Scharnhorst has drifted, lifeless, since the end of the Kusari-Rheinland War.

Tamasu Wreck
This is the wreck of the Kusari battleSchiff Tamasu, abandoned after engaging the Rheinland Scharnhorst. The Tamasu has drifted, lifeless, since the end of the Kusari-Rheinland War.

Serafina

The Serafina freighter is a current favorite of smugglers and pirates for moving contraband. It's High defensive capability along side the ability to mount an high level of fire power make it ideal for this role.

B-764L 'Champion' Bretonia sehr schwerer Jaeger
Under permanent pressure of Korsaren, Royal Armed Forces needed a craft able to fight them in harder spaces of Border Worlds. Wielding terrific firepower, Champion is a last guardian of Bretonia there, where other ships never dare to enter.

Redemption

The Redemption originally was build to protect the borders between the lawful houses and the corsairs. After this ship proved its firepower and flight abilities organisations all over sirius ordered this ship.

Nomad Interceptor
It's not much known about this new Schiff... which is mostly because not many pilots survived their first contact this powerful and agile fighter.
Survivors reported that this are short range fighters which operate from big strike carriers. With this powerful engine, heavy weapons and the new nomad fighter shield this Schiff is a realy danger to all pilots in sirius.

Scouser

The Scouser is a train with heavy armor to protect its cargo but has no offensive or defensive weapons. It can carry up to 1750 units cargo but if you decide to use this ship you better should hire an escort.

Incoming transmision


This is Fleet Admiral Yamoto. The Kusari Fleet is under attack... i repeat, the Kusari Fleet is under attack. We need helpppp???@2#?=... a giant nomad fleet is ???ä##... the position of the Jumpgate is in sector B6 in the #,:§!???Lair system. All pilots who can hear my transmission please help us... ?????.

Eingehende Nachricht


Hier ist Flotten-Admiral Yamoto. Die Kusari Flotte wird angegriffen... ich wiederhole, die Kusari Flotte wird angegriffen. Wir brauchen dringend Hilfe???@2#?=... eine gigantische Nomaden Flotte ist ???ä##... die Position des Jumpgates ist in Sektor B6 des #,:§!???Lair Systems. Alle Piloten die diese Nachricht empfangen können bitte helft uns... ?????.

Welcome to the Crossfire FreeLancer Server


You will need to download the Crossfire Mod 2.0 at www.crossfire.swat-portal.com to enter the new systems of Crossfire. 

Enjoy the world of Crossfire...

Serverrules


No Cheats, no Mods (only the servermod is allowed), no Offensive Player Names, no Racism, no Crashing the Server, no Insults, no Flooding, no Downloading if you are connected to this Server, Clans have to use their clantags here, no PVP in New York and no Spawn Killing.
To view the detailed Serverrules visit www.crossfire.swat-portal.com

Wichtige Informationen fuer Clans
Fuer Clans ist es moeglich, auf diesem Server ein eigenes Clansystem zu mieten. Clans, die ein System besitzen, koennen fuer diese Systeme eigene Regeln festlegen und am zusaetzlichen Server-Rollenspiel teilnehmen.
Weitere Informationen findest du unter www.crossfire.swat-portal.com oder bei den Server-Admins.

Story


Chapter 1

A few months ago a Rheinland explorer found a new Jumpgate to a hidden system in Omicron Alpha. When they entered this system the first time they were shocked. It was the main reason for the rising Nomad activities in the whole Sirius sector. Containing one planet and over 20 Jumpgates to Nomad systems, Liberty systems, Borderworld systems and many unknown systems it's a major threat for all houses. Rheinland, Liberty, Kusari and Bretonia decided to send their fleets to get this system under their control. But the nomads were already waiting for them... hundreds of ships got destroyed and the whole Kusari fleet is still missing after they were chasing a Nomad battleship. But finally it was a victory and the Nomads had to leave. Because of this massive fight above the planet it is now called Crossfire. A few weeks after this important victory the houses decided to colonize the unknown systems. But because of the Outcast in the neighbourhood these stations and planets are under permanent attack.

Chapter 2

Incoming transmission from the Kusari Fleet: "We are under attack by nomad forces... we need help our position is 12.*)"§12*33... who ever can hear this please help us"
The Kusari Fleet is still out there and under attack by nomad battleships and gunboats. The Fleets spread out to find a hidden system called Death Valley and to rescue the Kusari. Meanwhile in the Nephele System a new Sleepership was found which looks the same way the old alliance sleeperships looked like. Scientists entered the wreck to explore it and to have a look at the ship database. "Russian language?!?!... it's a coalition ship"

Chapter 3

The nomad battle: Even with reinforcements coming to Death valley the Kusari are not able to destroy the Nomad armada... the fights already last several weeks now. Only a single Kusari fighter has found a way through the blockade in Death Valley and managed to deliver a disk which was found in an unknown wreck to the security forces on Planet Crossfire. Local scientist analize the datafiles now.
The Sleepership: This ship has a coalition origin.. but what is it doing here? It is allready a few hundred years old and it seems like it got attacked. Maybe the database is showing more information and maybe some guys in the new systems have heard some rumours.

Chapter 4

A way to our old home, the earth, has been found again but there is no life anymore. The colonies are destroyed, earth is empty and everything looks like the nomads have something to do with it. The houses try to recolonize the sol system now and find out what has been going on. Maybe the databases of the old science centers on earth can tell us more about the history of sol and where the missing coalition fleet is.

Chapter 5

The Coalition, we never thought that we would see them again but we were wrong. Before Earth got destroyed they managed to launch their three sleeperships. Two of them have found their way to the Altair sector and now we are at war with them again. Will this never end?

Chapter 6

The return of the Dom'Kavash was a heavy strike back for the Coalition and the houses of Sirius. The Dom'Kavash territory is growing with the support of the Nomads and Coalition is close to a destruction. Nobody knows where those ships come from or how to survive their attacks. We have only one chance... forget the rivalities of the past and unite with the Coalition and fight together. This is the only way to survive the biggest threat that the mankind has seen.

Chapter 7

Not long ago a giant fleet of Coalition ships broke through a heavy Dom'Kavash blockade and discovered a hidden hypergate. A large group of fighters entered this hypergate but never returned. What is on the other side? This is a question that hardly can be answered. All tries to through failed and Dom'Kavash motherships constantly jump through this gate to Altair. Only the united forces of the houses and the coalition might be able to find out what is going on there.

entries.source_text:
Willkommen auf dem Crossfire FreeLancer Server


Um die neuen Systeme und Features nutzen zu können brauchst du den Crossfire Mod 1.8 den du auf www.crossfire.swat-portal.com herunterladen kannst. Solltest du nur das klassische FreeLancer spielen wollen so kannst du das hier auch ohne Mod tun. 

Viel Spaß bei Crossfire...

Serverregeln


Keine Cheats, keine Mods (nur der Servermod ist erlaubt), keine beleidigenden Spielernamen, kein Rassismus, kein Crashen des Server, keine Beleidigungen, kein Flooding, kein Downloaden während des Spiels, Clans müssen ihre Clantags benutzen, kein PVP in New York und kein Spawn Killen. 
Um die detailierten Serverregeln einzusehen besuche www.crossfire.swat-portal.com

Jeden Samstag und an jedem Wochentag Events


Jeden Samstag und an Tagen in der Woche gibt es auf diesem Server Events. 
Check einfach unser Forum auf www.crossfire.swat-portal.com um weitere Informationen zu erhalten.

Wichtige Informationen für Clans


Clans ist es gestattet eigene Clansysteme auf diesem Server zu erwerben. 
Mehr Informationen dazu auf www.crossfire.swat-portal.com oder fragt ganz einfach einen Serveradmin.

Geschichte


Vor einigen Monaten fand ein Rheinland Erkundungstrupp ein neues Jumpgate zu einem versteckten System in Omicron Alpha. 

Als sie dieses System das erste mal betraten waren sie geschockt. Es war der Hauptgrund für die zunehmenden Angriffe der Nomaden in ganz Sirius. Durch den Planeten und mehr als 20 Jumpgates zu Liberty-, Nomaden-, Grenzwelten- und unbekannten Systemen wurde dieses System als eine ernstzunehmende Gefahr für die einzelnen Häuser eingestuft. 

Rheinland, Liberty, Kusari und Bre

After the big battle of X-3043 the nomad forces destroyed the main planet of the system. Only the moon of this planet, also known as Planet Crossfire is still left. The centre of the explosion turned into a gravimetrical core.

Adonis Freighter


The Adonis is not a big freighter or a good fighter. The Adonis is a mixture of both... average cargospace and good firepower. The best choice for lonely trader without an escort.

Shooting Star
That's a real Shooting Star. A very heavy fighter at it's best, build on New London this Schiff connects high firepower with a good agility. It belongs to the best what you can find in sirius.

StrikeEagle


The Strike Eagle is a fighter that was supposed to be used to smuggle large amounts of alien artifacts, cardamine and whisky. Due to secret containers inside the ship the hull is not very strong.

The Erweiterter Helium Schubdueses have the advantage of the Helium-Fuel-Mix like the normal Helium Schubdueses but they recycle a part of the Helium which will be used to give this thruster a longer burning time.

The Erweiterter Xenon Schubdueses have the advantage of the Xenon-Fuel-Mix like the normal Xenon Schubdueses but they recycle a part of the Xenon which will be used to give this thruster a longer burning time.

A-100 Stormrider


The Stormrider is a light fighter close to the border to an heavy fighter... it is very agile and has average gunpower. All in all a good ship if you can avoid enemy fire.

Avenger


Once been a concept design the Avenger proved it's abilities in several fights around Death Valley and the unknown systems. The strong hull and the heavy guns are the reason why it is one of the most valueable ship inventions since the rediscovering of the alliance ship concepts.

F-180 Hornet Mark II


The Hornet is build on Hamburg by an independant Company called Exa-Industries. In fact this is a very good ship, only its hull seems to be a little bit too weak.

F-190 Malice


The F-190 Malice was originally build under the name 'Dagger' but renamed after rumours appeared that there is a ship in development with the same name. The Malice is a heavy fighter with strong hull and strong weapons. A typical very heavy fighter.
Cargo Containers are used to Schiff goods from one place to another. You can make huge profits if you trade with those containers. All you need is a train which can carry those CargoPods.

Combat ServEis Vehicle (CSV)
The CSV is a ship specific to die Schrotties and die Hogosha. Not generally considered a huge threat, it is used in their nearly continuous search for more salvage.

Soulforge Train

The Train is used to transport large amounts of cargo aroud the houses of Sirius. Its vast hold is counterset by its poor defensive and manovrebility during flight, which means that although profit margins during trading are high... so are the risks of running the trade routes.

Clans, die ein System besitzen, koennen fuer diese Systeme eigene Regeln festlegen und am zusaetzlichen Server-Rollenspiel teilnehmen.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Weitere Informationen findest du unter www.crossfire.swat-portal.com oder bei den Server-Admins.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

The ASF reported the theft of 2 million bottles of finest whisky from Planet Blood. It is not know who has stolen it or how it has been done but it will be hard to sell 2 million bottles without creating attention. One thing is sure if they can't sell the whisky then these guys will be drunken for the next 500 years.

Good luck pilots.

Welcome to the Crossfire Universe

Crossfire is probably the most complex mod based on Freelancer. We did intent to enlarge the original Freelancer universe without destroying its story and its original content. The result is a lively world full of adventures and action. We hope you enjoy our work and join our community at http://www.swat-portal.com.


Rules

The server is provided for people to play and enjoy the Mod. This is a privilege and not a right and this privilege will be revoked if the rules are not followed, you disrupt the functionality of the server or you detract from the enjoyment of the majority of the players. We reserve the right to remove players from the server without prior warnings, although where applicable a warning will be given. We reserve the right to take whatever action is deemed fit to ensure players are observing the rules. These rules are subject to additions and/or amendments at any time and without prior notice. The decisions of the Admins are final on all matters. We reserve the right to deviate from the below listed rules at any time to resolve an existing or potential problem. Your acceptance of these rules is indicated by your use of the server. If you do not agree to this then you should not attempt to connect.


The full ruleset can be found at http://www.crossfire.swat-portal.com, you should read it prior you start playing.

Willkommen im Crossfire Universum

Crossfire ist die wahrscheinlich komplexeste Mod basierend auf Freelancer. Wir erweiterten das originale Freelancer Universum ohne jedoch die Story und den ursprünglichen Inhalt dabei zu zerstören. Das Resultat ist eine lebendige Welt voller Abenteuer und Action. Wir hoffen dass euch unser Werk gefällt und dass ihr unserer Community auf http://www.swat-portal.com beitretet.


Regeln

Die Bereitstellung des Servers für die Spieler um darauf zu spielen und Spass zu haben ist ein Privileg und kein Recht. Dieses Privileg wird entzogen, wenn du die Regeln nicht einhältst, die Funktion des Server beeinträchtigst oder andere Spieler davon abhältst, ihre Zeit auf dem Server zu geniessen. Wir behalten uns das Recht vor, Spieler ohne Vorwarnung zu bannen, falls möglich wird jedoch erst eine Vorwarnung ausgesprochen. Wir behalten uns ebenso das Recht vor, alles Notwendige zu unternehmen damit alle Spieler die Regeln einhalten. Diese Regeln können jederzeit und ohne Vorwarnung erweitert und/oder geändert werden. Entscheidungen der Admins sind endgültig. Wir behalten uns das Recht vor, von den untenstehenden Regeln abzuweichen um ein existierendes oder potenzielles Problem zu lösen. Dein Einverständnis mit diesen Regeln ist Voraussetzung, um den Server zu benutzen. Solltest du mit den Regeln nicht einverstanden sein raten wir dir, dich nicht einzuloggen.


Die kompletten Regeln kannst du auf http://www.crossfire.swat-portal.com find, du solltest sie lesen bevor du weiterspielst.

	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>WilBerry Shipyards</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Wilberry Shipyards takes it name from the Ship building Tycoon Bod Willbery. So successful was Bob that he even formed a band as a sideline and went on tour as the Traveling Wilberys.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Dispite his passion for music, Shipbuilding remained his primary source of income and earned him the reputation he has today.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Wilberry Shipyards will build anything to order and have Senators, Presidents and even Kings on there books as customers.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Farscape Mining.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>You find, We will Drill it!</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Farscape Mining will started out on old Earth using TNT to blast its minerals out of the Earth but after the company who made TNT refused to sell it to Farscape, Farscape Mining moved on and converted to Ion Drilling systems.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>5 Years later Farscape Mining brought out TNT and had the former owners executed much to the delight of the fans...erm employees.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

entries.source_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Sledge Hammers R Us.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>We Bash for Cash!<TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Sledge Hammers R Us believe in the person rather than the machine and as such do not purchess big expensive drilling equipement. Instead they hire cheap labour and work them to death in the mines and on the Astroid belts.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>The Company however hired and expensive PR firm that has so far managed to play on the Jobs for the Boys story on NewMars and hide the truth. This has attracted the attention of certain pirate factions. </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Hyperspace Jumpgates</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Hyperspace Jumpgates allow access to Hyperspace. Hyperspace offers pilots a much faster way to travel between systems.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>However, Hyperspace is dangerous and ships that get lost in it are very rarely seen again.</TEXT>

entries.source_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Hyperspace</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Hyperspace is nearly impossible to chart or even explore due to it's ever changing nature. What is known is that it touches every known point in the universe and thus offers a shortcut to any system in our universe.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Pilots face great dangers when traveling through Hyperspace, ships often lose the lock on to the Hyperspace gates and are never seen again. Others report being attacked in space by an unknown Alien race that appeared to be able to travel at will through Hyperspace without the need for a lock on to the nearest gate.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Of Course, nobody believes in strange aliens inhabbiting Hyperspace, and the pilots who report such events are often consider to be space happy. No body has provided any proof they exist so far.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<TEXT>Hyperspace</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Hyperspace is nearly impossible to chart or even explore due to it's ever changing nature. What is known is that it touches every known point in the universe and thus offers a shortcut to any system in our universe.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Pilots face great dangers when traveling through Hyperspace, ships often lose the lock on to the Hyperspace gates and are never seen again. Others report being attacked in space by an unknown Alien race that appeared to be able to travel at will through Hyperspace without the need for a lock on to the nearest gate.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Of Course, nobody believes in strange aliens inhabbiting Hyperspace, and the pilots who report such events are often consider to be space happy. No body has provided any proof they exist so far.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<TEXT>Battleship Row Station</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Battleship Row Station was built over 100 years ago as a place where factions could meet to settle disputes before war became definate possibility.</TEXT>

	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>It is a secret base on the edge of known space, known only to few selected individuals. Pilots must be on their guard outside the walls of this station.</TEXT>

entries.source_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>Waverider Thuster Mk1</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/>
<TEXT>Using the gravitational waves eminating from of starsystems as rails, the designers where able to create a thruster that rides those waves in much the same as a surfboard might ride a an ocean wave. This made the Waverider thruster the best on the market today  </TEXT><PARA/>
<TEXT>Power requirements = 150</TEXT><PARA/>
<TEXT>Thrust = 200000</TEXT><PARA/>
<POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>An device of unknown origin, the X51 Scanner only started appearing on the market a few months after Earth Force Polizei sent Wilberry Shipyears the scans of the wrecked Nial they found floating around in the NewMars System. The X51 Scanner not only provides basic information about a target, but also uses proprietary sensor technology and AI heuristics to analyze any cargo that may be present at greater ranges than any traditional Scanner.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Range: 5000m</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Cargo Scan Range: 3000m</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A spin off from the X51 Scanner, The Lone Ranger Scanner detects Schiffe and cargo at 5000m. no other Scanner has been able to perform both these tasks at such ranges at the same time. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Range: 5000m</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Cargo Scan Range: 5000m</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Another Scanner based on the X51, the Enforcer was designed for use by the Polizei of NewMars but has yet to be officially abopted. It features improved scanning range over the Lone Ranger.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Range: 5000m</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Cargo Scan Range: 4000m</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>Electronic Jammer Mk1</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>Electronically jams missiles already in flight for up to 10 seconds up to a range of 1200m. Newly launched missiles are uneffected. The jammer takes the resources it needs directly from the Schiffe reactor so it does not require ammo as other Countermeasures do. How ever it does have high power demands and will not work if the required power is unavailable.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Ethereal Station</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Once part of a mighty empire, this station now falls under the control of the Zoners. After the descovery of the Lost Legends, the Zoners where the first to move in and exploit the resources in the system.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>The Zoners have completely rebuilt the station to support humans yet some signs of its original in habbitants still exist.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

entries.source_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Ring World</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Ring World is actually one big solar panel thats been converted for use by several factions. It generates huge amounts of power for the surrounding systems.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Several factions have taken over it's many docks and sealed off their own areas effectively making Ringworld 8 seperate bases rather than one big base as it was originally designed to be.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

entries.source_text: I actually was working as a hitman for the corsairs, I was betrayed however while whacking out one of the head Liberty chief justices, when i realized that the corsairs were handing me over to the liberty police as a payoff. I didn't really like them much after that. Which is why I became one of the most feared bounty hunter in all sirius.

Die Zoner told me that they built several structures in this system. I did not see anything except for this station so I called it as I saw it. The Zoner got pretty mad and pointed out the view point at the scrap floating out side just as a Nomad came by and tried to take the station apart. I do not think die Nomaden like die Zoner being in this system. I got the impression they made it their duty to destroy anything die Zoner build around here.

I was on Wilberry Werft a few days ago when they launched that new Snub fighter. Kids queuing around the block for the chance to test fly a pee shooter. First kid up took off with thursters on full, trouble is those little snub fighters have 2 of them and they realy make that baby move. Anyway, the kid crashed right into the Schlachtschiff Yorktown 30 seconds after launch. Lol, Boy that was the best laugh I have had in a long time.

I was once employed by die Liberty-Marine but it certainly didnt take me long to realize i could make alot more money working for die Ausgestossenen. Im a smuggler now, its my business and business is good. I live on Planet Malta in Omicron Alpha. I make a killing runing cardamine from Planet Malta to Planet Manhattan. Ive also clicked off alot of credits to get in good with the right people to avoid any unwanted problems. Word of warning freelancer, dont even consider trying to jack my cargo, my [MOD] armed escorts are some of the best fighter pilots in all the known systems, they would decimate you within seconds.

My advice is don't pull a 30G turn in a cargo Schiff. I was an ugly sight with all those melons! It hits the brain hard also and affects the memory. I hosted some people from easyhosts.com on my Schiff called Homer. They had a good time of it. It affects the memory you know. Now back in 19 dickity 2, we had to say dickity as the Kiser had stolen the word twenty but I've still got my drink. Now that's when money was money not this electronic stuff but my advice is don't pull a 30G turn in a cargo Schiff.

LOOK BEHING YOU. FISH! AAAAAGH! GIANT FISH!, CARP. ORANGE CARP. WITH WINGS. THAT FLY. ACTUALLY, GOLD DRAGONS, WITH CLOWN HATS. AND GUNS. Mmmm I'm hungry, i want a poptart, or some microchips. Um we sell and make microchips, not for eating though. What?? Your going over there. Why. Come back!! JUST YOU WAIT YOU'LL BE CRAWLING BACK, WHEN THOSE FISH GET YOU. Now if only i could remember where i parked my car.

You talkin' to me? What, me, no. I'm a smug- I mean I'm just an ordinary merchant leading an ordinary life with no convoys and a Titan full of Carda- ah, water. Yeah water. So if anyone wants to attack my Schiff, then I'd be happy to give all my cargo. Hehehee...

well Trent,I am death that fly's, years ago my pregnant wife and 2 children where on a transport traveling along the trade lane between Planey Denver in the colorade system and the NewYork Jump gate.", " when a pack of Xeno's disabled the tradelane and attacked the transport, I was in my heavy fighter travelling along the lane and I came out od the Lane drive just as the transport blew up, ever since then I kill every Xeno I see.

Mmmmm... allright, you want info? Why should I give you info? What have YOU done for ME? I'm a freelancer like yourself, but way better than YOU could ever be. I take jobs from whoever has the most cash. I don't hold a grudge, it's all business... nor do I do that "friendSchiff" thing either. You might be on the wrong end of a business deal tomorrow. I don't care who it is, if they've got more money than the other guy, then that's who I work for. I don't care about factions or causes... Pfff.... I wan't money... I like this base here... good ale... but if the next guy wants it gone, hey, it's just business...

Kids nowadays. They arent pilots, they're prissy little brats. Back in my day we didn't have cruise engines. We had to drift through space and find our own ways to juice our birds. Wanna know how i lost this eye?? All i can say is it involves 3 unioners and the best hooker to ever give a freebie.

Hi Yeah I used to be in the militiary but now I,m a free lancer, I go to strange new world's and meet strange exoctic people and have strange and exoctic experences then I shoot them and rob them and sell the procedures. Go figure!!

We found several Wrecked Nials in this system. NewMars Polizei found on in NewMars too. We think that one escaped the battle between the old race and die Nomaden. If one escaped there could be more. Who knows, perhaps the old Empire has survivors who are watching us even now.

Those old Alien Bases appear to be over 1000 years old. There is a small mining base near by that looks like it was the home to several thousand slaves. Our Techy guys say it looks like die Nomaden used to be held there and possibly where the slaves to a much older race.

All those Ghost stories are giving me the shakes, one guy said he saw and the Ghost of an Alien watching around the Equipement Locker and another claims to have see Ghost Schiff traveling through the Hypergate. The gate triggered the jump too his says.

I though I saw a Nial flying through this system the other day. Only Rhienland, Newmars and a few pirates use them. Still this one did not look right. Different somehow. I think it was an original. You know, one of those Aliens that used to live here.
My God, you see those Narn Jaegers tearing into die Nomaden in this system. Double Torps, 4 mean weapons. I send word to the other Unionisten about them. They certainly seem to do the job.

Hi there Trent. Saw you in the News. We are fighting die Nomaden here too so your a real Hero around these parts. We are trying to push them out of the system so we can do some research on those Alien bases in peace. Its proving difficult though.

We have been doing research at those bases. Still a lot of questions to answer but we know Nomaden where once slaves to a much more powerful race and that race was destroyed by die Nomaden shortly after a huge battle in this system.

We have been recieving some of the stranges static over the comms recently. Not normal space static but artificial static. We have the Tech guys working on it but it seems to me something is disrupting our communication equipement. Not Jamming it, just inteffering with it.

That last patrol was a long one, The entire system is just one big scrap yard. Not much here except for a few wrecks and those Alien Bases. Still for a system thats been dead for over 1000 years there is something not quite right about it.

Ethereal Station's Bar is proving a popular spot for Freelancer Pilots these days. Several Pilots have been seen in the Bar of the Station in the newly descovered Lost Legends system. The systems location is not known to most Pilots yet so the fact that so many made it there is very odd indeed :).

After tracking the Nial from the Wreck in Newmars to Bob Willberrys new fighter from Willberry Werfts, this reporter has finally explained the Mystery of the Nials Origins. The Nial found in NewMars was over 1000 years old and appears to have come from the Lost Legends Systems. The system was the scene of a huge Space Battle over 1000 years ago between 2 different groups of aliens. Zoner research staff are currently examining the remains of several Alien wrecks in that system in the hope of descovering what happened to the Aliens that built the Nial.

Wilberry Werfts reveal 2 new fighters today. The Narn schwerer Jaeger and the entry Level Snub Jaeger. Both Schiffe are currently seeing action amongst several factions. The Outcast Ship SoulStealer is reportly being Schiffped the HomeGuard. This could mean trouble for our Marine Boys.

The recent Nomad attacks in this system appear to be an attempt to prevent us from finding the truth about what happened here. We know this system was home to an Ancient Empire of Aliens and we are sure die Nomaden where slaves to them. However,  the battle that ended the Empire is surrounded in mystery. How die Nomaden who where slaves got hold of Schiffe to fight a battle or how they over came an Empire is a mystery to us and will probably remain so. The Ethereal Base however has had reports of several unexplained events that cannot be dismissed as rumours spread by drunken pilots. What ever was out there, may still be out there.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>NewMars System</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>NewMars was famous for its Shipyard before the war. Some of the most advanced and thus expensive space faring vessels came from NewMars.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>These days NewMars as become a backwater and the rich merchants who brought the ships have moved on.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Yet the Shipyards remain and continue to produce the same old, extremely expensive vessels but not in as greater numbers as they once did.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Planet NewMars </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>NewMars was the Administration center for the entire system, handling everything from law enforcement to shipping of goods around the universe.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>These days the planet plays a much minor role in the systems affairs but still remains the heart of the NewMar System.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Yet the Shipyards remain and continue to produce the same old, extremely expensive vessels but not in as greater numbers as they once did.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>NewMars Sun</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>There is nothing special about this Star other than its yellow orange glow. It warms the planet Newmars which orbits it.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<TEXT>There is nothing special about this Star other than its yellow orange glow. It warms the planet Newmars which orbits it.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

entries.source_text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Lost Legends System</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Thousands of years before humanity built Rocket Ships and went to the moon, alien races where battling it out amongst the stars. They built Hyper gates and traveled extensively amongst the stars using Hyperspace as their highway to distance places.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Lost Legends was once home to a mighty Alien Empire. Defeated long ago by the Nomads, the Alien Empire colapsed leaving wreckage and ruin in its wake. Lost Legends is the door way to what is left of this Ancient Empire. The parts maintained by the Aliens Robotic servants are stull functional after all this time.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Alien Structure</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>The zoners believe that the Nomads where once a slave race to the Aliens who built these structures. After a revolt the Nomads freed them selves. The old Empire could was so dependant on slave labour that it died out after the revolt.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>The Zones point to ancient mining bases as evidence for their theory. They claim the bases where designed for aliens other than those who built these structures.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<POP/>
</RDL>

	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>The Zoners believed this structure was the home to Millions of the Ancient Empires Citizens and a slave race known as the Nomads. The base is clearly built to keep one race in the lap of luxury whilst the other worked to serve their masters.</TEXT>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<RDL>
	<PUSH/>
	<TEXT> </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/>
	<JUST loc="center"/>
	<TEXT>Stats</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/>
	<JUST loc="left"/>
	<TEXT>Republican Way</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>A Republican Shipping Clerk was attacked and killed here on his way to the regional Republican Clerks meeting. Republican Shipping purchessed the planet and named it after the their company as salute to the risks their employees take whilst carrying out their duty. </TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT>Local Pirates say the true name was earned after the Clerk failure to notice that planet had suddenly jumped in front of his ship and he crashed into it. What ever the truth is, this are of space is dangerous because of the near by two suns representing a serious shipping hazzard.</TEXT>
	<PARA/>
	<TEXT></TEXT>

entries.source_text: NewShip - The Viper is the latest offering from Wilberry Werfts. This schwerer Jaeger has a rather sporty appearance and should go down well with the younger pilots that feel the need for speed.

Wilberry Werfts Kurgan does it a again by producing the Xwing to patrol out space and keep it save from bandits. The New Ship has already seen action within the Polizei force ranks in Newmars and it is proving to be a very good tool for law enforcement officers.

Wilberry hits the news again with a new Light fighter for the NewMars Polizei. The Starfury was built by Giskard after it became clear the police needed a super cheap Schiff to make up the numbers required to maintain patrols in every sector. The new Schiff is said to be a real performer.
Galaxy Ship production (A Trade mark of Wilberry Werfts) has launched a new range of Frachter Class Schiffe for traders around the universe. The New Schiffe are Exclusive to Wilberry Werfts.

Space happy pilots caused a riot today on Newmars as more rumours of huge Schiff eating monsters living in Hyperspace surfaced in a local bar. The rumour has it that several spider like monsters where seen lurking around the Hyperspace gate leading to Newmars yesterday by one pilot. The news spread fast and soon got out of control.

NewMars Enginneers announced the reopening of the Hyperspace Network this week for the first time in a century. The Hyperspace network is Millions of years old and had great possibilities. Yet over 100 years ago the loss of an entire convoy of Miltary Schiffe caused panic and the gates where closed.

Just as pilots get use to the new Viper Schiff, the Marine reports an new Unknown enemy is lurking at our door. The new threat has not responsed to friendhsip messages and even attacked diplomat whilst trying to make first contact. The Marine are warning all pilots to be on their guard.

I heard a pirate tried attacking one of those new Galaxy Transporterererer Schiffe Yesterday. The owner of the Galaxy Transporterererer said it took hours to wipe the pirate off the front of his Schiff

I saw the Marine Boys flying their new fighters today. You know that Viper. 3 of them took down 7 Hessians, what a fighter. I'd have watched it all my self but I did not fancy my chances. I was surprised when the Marine won.

Are those Starfurys supposed to move sideways that fast ? I nearly ran into one. I expected it to turn normally and thought I had plenty of room but it shot sideways past my screen after a pirate and nearly gave me heart failure.

Hay, those Homeguard are causing trouble again I see. They attacked me Schiff whilst I was on my way to Grey17 with a cargo load of plastic Spoke Ears. Those guys are Grey 17 soon chased them off but if you ask me they are little but freaky. Would make me run too if I saw them coming.

The word on the vine is Wilberry has more Schiffe in the pipe line. Apparently they just recieved a major order from the Marine for several new Schlachtschiffs too. I doubt we will see any of them, top secret you understand.
Hay, are you that Trent guy ?, yer I saw you on box. War Hero or something. Fighting die Nomaden. Never seen a Nomad but after looking at your Schiff, I'd guess they would not last long anyway.

Did you hear about that crash today ? Some fighter jock took a Galaxy Transporterererer into one of the Asteriod belts for a test flight. The Polizei are scrapping him off Rock 572 as we speak. Those Schiffe don't move like a fighter. Guess some people have to learn the hard way.

Hyperspace is by far the fastest way to travel between the major systems. As long as you stay clear of those nutters that are camping out there. They are part of this cult that goes around with buckets on their heads pretending to be the great vorlon god bungie. Look, they gave me Bungie badge when I past them.
There a guy called Gkar over at the Red Knight Arms that says an Ancient enemy is coming back. He's a real cheerful guy, full of doom and the end of world stories. Somebody should lock him up.
Hay I joined the Rangers today. Been training all week so I'd pass the entrance exam. Next week I start cleaning toilets. They say in ten years I'll be made chief bottle washer if I work hard.

I heard Wilberry want to develope a medium fighter version of the Starfury today. That is one cool Schiff. Could use better shields but I guess the way that Schiff moves, shields would not be much good.

I saw the design specks for the new Thunderbolt. Looks like a Capital Schiff killer to me. All those Torpedos and missiles. Not sure when they will officially announce it so remember, you heard it here first.

A friend of mine was travelling through Sigma 957 and claimed to have seen a huge alien Schiff just as it jumped out of the system. Apparently it did not need to use a gate like we do. My friends Schiff was almost drained of all it's power. Luckily he was rescued by a passing pirate. Only cost him his Schiff, cargo and cloths. He is currently looking for work and new Schiff.
Rumour has it that NewMars Werfts are expanding. We could be seeing them opening shops in all major systems soon. A return to the good old days. A job for life and a nice wage packet.
A friend tells me that the Leeds system is right next door to a source of very cheap H Fuel. I am going to take one of those new Galaxy transports out there at some point and buy a cargo hold full.

I heard a police man talking about a pilot who could not find the Newyork Jumpgate today. They arrested him for being drunk in charge of a space craft. Apparently he was parked right next it the whole time

NewMars could use some better weapons and shields. Currently we have to travel all over the universe to get the stuff our fighters need. Guess one day somebody will import them and we will be able to get the locally.

Earth Forces latest fighter arrived at Enforcer HQ today from Wilberry Werfts. The new Thunderbolt is a sehr schwerer Jaeger sporting no less than 7 guns. This 2 man fighter is expected to make all the difference to system security.

Is the new Minbari Nial really partly organic. Well thats what the engineers at Wilberry Werfts said today at the Schiffe launch. One Engineer was quoted as saying that the technology behind the Nial is mostly experimental and future products of this type would be based on how well the Nial performs in the real universe under every day conditions.

Wilberry Werfts recalled all Starfurys last week after tests found the paint peeled off when hit by laser fire. The Starfury V2 is said to fix that problem. The new Ship should be available by the time you read this.

Have you seen those old Starfurys ? Talk about a mess, that nice clean paint job did not last long in space. An Engineer told me somebody goofed the mixture at their suppliers and because all Schiffe come with a 5 year warrentee they had to recall the lot and repaint the Schiffe. Still the new Schiffe look cooler than ever.
I saw one of the strangest Schiffe ever leaving the Werfts today. A blue thing, looked very fast but was not made of any kind of material I could identify. I believe they called it the Nial.

My team got hold of one those Thunderbolts today. We believe the Thunderbolts capable of more than Earth Force lets on. We certainly do not sell the high end sort of equipement that can be fitted to that Schiff around these parts. We may have to go to New Berlin or New Tokyo to really fit it out properly.

A Battle of the Planets fan built the Phoenix prototype today just to prove cartoon creators did have their facts right back in the 20th Century. The new Schiff even looks like it is out of cartoon but pilots say it cant arg move.

The Army has refitted all its Surplus DropSchiffe and is selling them off as Frachters to Newmars Traders. The Heavy Panzerung is said to be the Schiffe major selling point and the Army believes they are on to winner here.

Strange Alien Schiffe found in Hyperspace have been attacking Schiffping between the gates with increasing regularity over the last few weeks. The Marine has become concerned at this trend and is set to take action.
Bretonian Marine says Mollys are just old Hags. Die Mollys responded by destroying 3 Bretonian Schlachtschiffs and settled the arguement. The Bretonian Marine is said to be licking it's wounds.

Xenos where given notice today by die Liberty-Marine in a fight to settle the arguement over shape of imported Kusari Bananas in NewYork. Xenos maintained they where too bent and not grown in Liberty. The commander of the Liberty Kreuzer Nostromo who is send to be fond of Kusari Bananas responded by blowing the Xeno fleet away. Imports of Kusari Bananas have thus been saved.

I was traveling through Hyperspace between Newyork and Newmars when I was attacked by one of those things, several Liberty Kreuzers came to my aid and killed the beast. One thing has been nagging at me. What where the Kreuzers doing in Hyperspace and what was their destination ?

I hear the borderworlds are practically at War with the pirates. Pirates have been seen with Schlachtschiffs. The Marine big guns are out patroling the borders and several Capital Schiffe have been reported as destroyed. Things do not look good right now.

Pirate Battleships, Cruisers and Gunboats have been turning up with increasing regularity recently in what appears to be a move to over throw Democratically Elected Goverments in the border worlds. Where they are getting these ships from is unknown but life on the Tradelanes has suddenly become much more dangerous because of it. Our reporter managed to get a list of hot spots from the Navy and advises all honest traders to avoid these bases.

Freistadt Base
Pirna Border Station
Cardiff Mining Facility
Glasgow Outpost
Freeport 4
Huston to Hamburg Jumpgate
Ames Research Station
Planet Kyushu
Osaka Storage Facility

entries.source_text:
We are the Kavash.
We ruled over this galaxy for more than 70.000 years but our empire nearly collapsed. Our race was young when we started to spread over this part of the universe. Young and blinded. Not many races which we have met in the early years of the empire did survive the following wars. The very few which did became part of the empire. Soon after just 2.000 years we ruled over  this galaxy and in our blinded arrogance we now used the name Dom'Kavash, Dominator Kavash. It took us another 10.000 years to realize our mistakes. We, the empire were alone. Our race reached a technological level far beyond your imagination, the entire galaxy was ours but there were no more tasks for us. No battles to fight, no war to win, no place we did not yet control.

Our new fate was to give back something to the worlds we once have conquered. The seed of life was spread over many worlds and other planets already did contain primitive life forms that got influenced by our precence.
But we Kavash are not free of mistakes, we did many. So it did happen that we also tried to reach other galaxies. It took 4.000 years to develop a technology to open the hyperspace to other galaxies. There was no powersource strong enough to keep open such a gateway except one. One of the black holes close to the galaxy core. We have build three galactic gates and opened them. From all our mistakes this was the biggest one.

When we tried to reach the other galaxies we expected primitive cultures, maybe even a few civilizations. But our expectations were wrong. We could not know that we were not the only galactic empire. Our first contacts with the others were peaceful, at least for the first few hundred years. But the situation started to become complicated when we, the Kavash decided not to share our hyperspace technology with the other empires. It is hard to say if this was a mistake or not.

It took not long that war was declared on us and giant fleets came through the galactic hypergates into our galaxy. Every ship, every Kavash able to fight was ordered back to our homeworld to join our fleet. Our plan was to destroy the Galactic gates and finally close them. But we failed.
We, the Kavash reached the gates under heavy losses. We destroyed the hyperspace technology inside the gates because the gates themselve were nearly indestructable as they were build to resist even the gravimetrical anomalies of the black hole. The gates remained open.
The hyperspace gateways took their energy directly from the black hole and we were not able to disrupt this energy stream. Out fleet had to retreat.

Many of the systems close to the core were overrun by our enemies. We, the Kavash could not fight everywhere and we could not allow that these intruders get hands on the hyperspace technology. Our decision was to abbandon colonies in the outer regions of the galaxy and to destroy all hypergates leading there. We limited the war to stay close to the core, far away from our "childred". That was the prize we had to pay for our arrogance.

We could not expect that the war would raging for so long, we could not expect that your race would travel to space that soon. You have met the guards of our old colonies, the nomads, You have survived them. Your race appears to be very interesting and strong but full of conflicts. You appear to be like the Kavash 70.000 years ago.

Our empire will fall soon. The last defence lines have been reached by the enemy forces. The first time in our history we ask for help. Fight with us or this galaxy will fall.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 4,821 km</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 3.17 x 10e24 kg</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Desert</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -46°C to 34°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>ESCAPE VELOCITY: 5.56 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Ascust is the biggest of Monoc's moons. It is a desert world scoured clean by ceaseless sandstorms that wash across its surface. 

A mining operation was established on the moon by Deep Space Engineering to exploit its deposits, and it is now the only raw material extraction facility within the Custodian System.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Itania was the first station to be constructed in the new territories after the great battle of X-3043. Five weeks prior its completion the station got destroyed by a Nomad ambush in this area. 573 workers died in minutes.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>After this incident Liberty authorities pushed the construction of Neutro Station as defence outpost in this area and a large mine field, protecting the access to New York.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
