entries.source_text:
Chapter 1

A few months ago a Rheinland explorer found a new Jumpgate to a hidden system in Omicron Alpha. When they entered this system the first time they were shocked. It was the main reason for the rising Nomad activities in the whole Sirius sector. Containing one planet and over 20 Jumpgates to Nomad systems, Liberty systems, Borderworld systems and many unknown systems it's a major threat for all houses. Rheinland, Liberty, Kusari and Bretonia decided to send their fleets to get this system under their control. But the nomads were already waiting for them... hundreds of ships got destroyed and the whole Kusari fleet is still missing after they were chasing a Nomad battleship. But finally it was a victory and the Nomads had to leave. Because of this massive fight above the planet it is now called Crossfire. A few weeks after this important victory the houses decided to colonize the unknown systems. But because of the Outcast in the neighbourhood these stations and planets are under permanent attack.

Chapter 2

Incoming transmission from the Kusari Fleet: \"We are under attack by nomad forces... we need help our position is 12.*)\"§12*33... who ever can hear this please help us\"
The Kusari Fleet is still out there and under attack by nomad battleships and gunboats. The Fleets spread out to find a hidden system called Death Valley and to rescue the Kusari. Meanwhile in the Nephele System a new Sleepership was found which looks the same way the old alliance sleeperships looked like. Scientists entered the wreck to explore it and to have a look at the ship database. \"Russian language?!?!... it's a coalition ship\"

Chapter 3

The nomad battle: Even with reinforcements coming to Death valley the Kusari are not able to destroy the Nomad armada... the fights already last several weeks now. Only a single Kusari fighter has found a way through the blockade in Death Valley and managed to deliver a disk which was found in an unknown wreck to the security forces on Planet Crossfire. Local scientist analize the datafiles now.
The Sleepership: This ship has a coalition origin.. but what is it doing here? It is allready a few hundred years old and it seems like it got attacked. Maybe the database is showing more information and maybe some guys in the new systems have heard some rumours.

Chapter 4

A way to our old home, the earth, has been found again but there is no life anymore. The colonies are destroyed, earth is empty and everything looks like the nomads have something to do with it. The houses try to recolonize the sol system now and find out what has been going on. Maybe the databases of the old science centers on earth can tell us more about the history of sol and where the missing coalition fleet is.

Chapter 5

The Coalition, we never thought that we would see them again but we were wrong. Before Earth got destroyed they managed to launch their three sleeperships. Two of them have found their way to the Altair sector and now we are at war with them again. Will this never end?

Chapter 6

The return of the Dom'Kavash was a heavy strike back for the Coalition and the houses of Sirius. The Dom'Kavash territory is growing with the support of the Nomads and Coalition is close to a destruction. Nobody knows where those ships come from or how to survive their attacks. We have only one chance... forget the rivalities of the past and unite with the Coalition and fight together. This is the only way to survive the biggest threat that the mankind has seen.

Chapter 7

Not long ago a giant fleet of Coalition ships broke through a heavy Dom'Kavash blockade and discovered a hidden hypergate. A large group of fighters entered this hypergate but never returned. What is on the other side? This is a question that hardly can be answered. All tries to through failed and Dom'Kavash motherships constantly jump through this gate to Altair. Only the united forces of the houses and the coalition might be able to find out what is going on there.

Chapter 6

The Dom'Kavash territory is growing with the support of die Nomaden and Coalition is close to a destruction. Nobody knows where those ships come from or how to survive their attacks. We have only one chance... forget the rivalities of the past and unite with the Coalition and fight together. This is the only way to survive the biggest threat that the mankind has seen.

Chapter 7

Not long ago a giant fleet of Coalition ships broke through a heavy Dom'Kavash blockade and discovered a hidden hypergate. A large group of fighters entered this hypergate but never returned. What is on the other side? This is a question that hardly can be answered. All tries to through failed and Dom'Kavash motherships constantly jump through this gate to Altair. Only the united forces of the houses and the coalition might be able to find out what is going on there.

entries.source_text:
Chapter 8

Eventhough the Dom'Kavash technology is much more effective than everything we can think of and every try to attack them did fail, it is very surprising that Sirius and even Altair were not overrun by hordes of bio-mechanical ships yet. Of course the people which lost their families and friends in New London, Sol, New Berlin, Omicron Alpha and X-3043 will think different but those Dom'Kavash invasors were nothing more than scouts. Maybe they are searching for something. Prof. Dr. Itao Hamasaki from the University of New Tokyo brought up a theory that the Nomads have sent out a final call before the wormhole of the Dyson Sphere collapsed and that the Dom'Kavash are back to investigate on this matter. 
In the end this does still not explain why those giant fleets in Altair do not attack us. Even the Nomads seem to wait for something. Maybe the answer to this is originally a question. Why did the Dom'Kavash leave our region of the galaxy thousands of years ago? Professor Hamasaki believes that the answer to this question is hidden in the ruins of an old civilization which we call Ancients.

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A solar plant is an automated facility for the collection, conversion, and storage of solar power from a nearby sun (or suns).</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="0x00000005" mask="-1" def="-6"/><TEXT>Wichtige Informationen fuer Clans</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Fuer Clans ist es moeglich, auf diesem Server ein eigenes Clansystem zu mieten. Clans, die ein System besitzen, koennen fuer diese Systeme eigene Regeln festlegen und am zusaetzlichen Server-Rollenspiel teilnehmen.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Weitere Informationen findest du unter www.crossfire.swat-portal.com oder bei den Server-Admins.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Knowing that so many people have lost their lives makes returning to Manhattan feel different.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Orillion's sacrifice decided the end of the war.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>The shockwave of the explosion destroyed the Hypergates near the Black Hole and sealed them once and for all.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>We suffered tremendous losses in this battle. Over half of the Koalition Schiffe and more than 70 percent of the Alliance Schiffe failed to return home. Trying to get us some time, the Kavash lost their entire fleet. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Without die Nomaden guarding the Kavash border systems the empire would have been fallen and the remains of our fleets would never have found a safe way home.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>And now? Will this be the end of all conflicts?</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Who knows. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>In this conflict, Alliance and Koalition fought side by side and sacrificed their lives for each other. Maybe there is finally a chance to establish long-lasting peace.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Eventually, the Kavash will recover their strength and decide to return to their ancient worlds in the far regions of the galaxy. Our sacrifices will be remembered by them and our sacrifices will be honored, hopefully.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Orillion, the person who made all of this possible, may even be remembered by them.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>All of us will.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><PARA/><TEXT>The Houses of Sirius experienced a major shock when they first encountered a Nomad Strike Carrier. Never has anyone faced such a threat before. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>Juni and Trent were forced to escape from Sol with the help of Orillion, who appeared at the last minute.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>The Osiris returned to Bretonian space for necessary repairs, and the Warp Anomaly was sealed for the next two weeks. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>During this time, Sol's liberation was planned.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="0x0000FF01" mask="-1" def="30"/><TEXT>Whoa, that was a wild ride, but we are through.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>So this is the Sol System...</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>I hope it is worth it. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Rumours say that Sol got attacked by alien forces and the sun turned into a super nova but apparently this was just a fairy tale.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Let's see what's going on here.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Scanners indicate no active vessels in close range... actually Scanners indicate nothing?!? No radio signals, no energy sources. This system is pretty much dead. Only these Jumpgates appear to be functional.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>What is going on here?</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Nomad Strike Carrier's destruction shattered the Nomad's resistance in Sol. Only a small group of Nomad fighters was sighted again in one of the outer regions of the Sol system, but they disappeared suddenly. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The arrival on Earth revealed the truth of what really occurred here. Biological weapons. Die Nomaden ensured that no human could survive after the Earth's defense and its old colonies broke apart. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>The infrastructures, our cities... everything is mostly intact, but the streets are empty. The final days of human civilization on Earth were captured in old television recordings and the fragmented servers of the world net.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The existence of that sleeperSchiff raises many new questions. We have learned that die Nomaden invaded Sol and all human beings perished. How did a SleeperSchiff manage to reach Sirius? The Schiff's databases were partially damaged but clearly identified the wreck as CNS Stalin. A portion of the database that contained blueprints for old Alliance Schiffe and lost technology was restored by some brainiacs. King proposed the idea of rebuilding some of the Schiffe to determine if they can be utilized. It appears that certain designs are very effective. The first prototypes will be ready for the initial testing soon. This smuggler's log inside the SleeperSchiff has caused us all to be concerned. What information is worthy of such a risk? What is that guy hiding? It's possible that a long-time friend has heard useful information. He can be found at the Ausruestungshaendler on Planet Leeds.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Seeing Tobias again was a pleasant experience. No matter what, this guy always manages to surprise me.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>This old bastard kept a copy of an old news broadcast from several weeks ago. Tobias seems to have a personal interest in Blinch's story, in my view. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><TRA data="0x00000005" mask="-1" def="-6"/><TEXT>This is CNN, the Crossfire News Network.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Today there was an explosion that destroyed the mainframe of the planetary science center on Earth. According to witnesses, a middle-aged man left the building two minutes before the explosion.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Statement of Governor Cole:</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>'Today, an explosion destroyed the mainframe of the science center. All research about the possible location of the Koalition fleet was stored there. The security cameras confirmed the claims of the witnesses : a man left the building just a few minutes before it was destroyed. Jack Blinch, a well-known smuggling suspect, was eventually identified as the man.'</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>The police assert that they know that his Schiff originated from an area in the Omicron Gamma system.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>So our next stop is Omicron Gamma. Something or someone in this system will help us find the information we are looking for. Let's start to check the bars for rumors.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><POP/></RDL>

Jack Blinch, a well-known smuggling suspect, was eventually identified as the man.'</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>The police assert that they know that his Schiff originated from an area in the Omicron Gamma system.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>So our next stop is Omicron Gamma. Something or someone in this system will help us find the information we are looking for. Let's start to check the bars for rumors.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Seeing Tobias again was a pleasant experience. No matter what, this guy always manages to surprise me.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>This old bastard kept a copy of an old news broadcast from several weeks ago. Tobias seems to have a personal interest in Blinch's story, in my view.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><TRA data="0x00000005" mask="-1" def="-6"/><TEXT>This is CNN, the Crossfire News Network.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Today there was an explosion that destroyed the mainframe of the planetary science center on Earth. According to witnesses, a middle-aged man left the building two minutes before the explosion.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Statement of Governor Cole:</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>'Today, an explosion destroyed the mainframe of the science center. All research about the possible location of the Koalition fleet was stored there. The security cameras confirmed the claims of the witnesses : a man left the building just a few minutes before it was destroyed. Jack Blinch, a well-known smuggling suspect, was eventually identified as the man.'</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>The police assert that they know that his Schiff originated from an area in the Omicron Gamma system.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>So our next stop is Omicron Gamma. Something or someone in this system will help us find the information we are looking for. Let's start to check the bars for rumors.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="0x00000005" mask="-1" def="-6"/><TEXT>This is CNN the Crossfire News Network.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Today there was an explosion which destroyed the mainframe of the planetary science center. Rumours telling that a middle aged man was running out of the building 2 minutes before.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Statement of governour Cole:</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>'Today an explosion destoyed the mainframe of the science center... all researches about the possible location of the Koalition fleet was stored there. The security cameras recorded that a man left the building just a few minutes before it got destroyed. The man was later identified as Jack Blinch, a well known smuggler.'</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Polizei claims to know that his Schiff came from somewhere in the Omicron Gamma system.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>At last, some useful information about Blinch has surfaced.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><TRA data="0x00000005" mask="-1" def="-6"/><TEXT>This is CNN the Crossfire News Network.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Jim Novel, who was involved in smuggling, was killed today. A witness stated that they came into contact with a man named Jack Blinch. Novel attempted to acquire information from Blinch, but they began to quarrel. Blinch mentioned a Koalition SleeperSchiff in the Nephele system and the possibility of something hidden within it. At the crime scene, in blood is written "Alaska - Omega-11 - Dublin".</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>________________________</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>So it is Alaska, Dublin and Omega 11. It's clear that there must be something crucial in those systems. Let's head there for a visit.</TEXT><PARA/><JUST loc="left"/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Datendisk from the Storage Container in Omega-11 brings us one step closer to revealing Blinch's secret.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>The disk contained some fragmented information:</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>System = *</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Sector = *-4</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>The next system is Alaska, which is not far away anymore. Arriving at Planet Crossfire in X-3043 brought up another surprise. The construction of the Crossfire Docks has been completed, while Planet Crossfire has evolved into a new flourishing colony.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>It's hard to grasp how much time has passed since the discovery of this system.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>The system has become the hub for both commerce and research. Traders and militaries can be seen everywhere. Many of the nearby systems have also been colonized, and new factions are making their claims.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Dublin System, here is the next data disk from another container that was found in Alaska.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Again, the disk holds fragmented information.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>System = *</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Sector = C-*</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>Well, we have the coordinates. Now we only need to know which system it is located in. It is time to retrieve the final disk in Dublin.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Finally all Datendisks are collected and show the position of Jack Blinch's secret.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>System = Sol</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Sector = C-4</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>That's it. It is in Sol!</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>There is no time to lose, let's fly to these coordinates.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>King has just been released from the hospital. Juni is still concerned about his health. It has been 4 months since the incident in Gurm and it is for sure that King will not see a cockpit from inside again for some more weeks. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The first contact with the Koalition was unpleasant but not unexpected. The day we found the Koalition SleeperSchiff in Nephele, we presumed that if one SleeperSchiff survived the exodus from Earth, others might have followed. Now we know that one Koalition SleeperSchiff launched from Saturn Station and two others from the Mars colonies. Instead of going to the Sirius Sector as we anticipated, they flew directly through Nomad space to the Altair Sector instead. For the first two centuries, their newly built colonies remained safe, but then the Koalition started to construct new Warp Gates to colonize new systems. Die Nomaden arrived in Koalition space shortly after and a lengthy war commenced. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Fortunately for the Koalition, the Ion Cannon technology proved to be very effective against Nomad Schiffe. As a result a massive Dark Reign defense grid with cloaking detectors was built to protect Koalition colonies. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Our approach to Gurm demonstrated the seriousness with which the Koalition takes its defense. We were very close to the brink of another war because of that incident. The battlegroup we were looking for that day did not return, and as we were returning back to Sol, Juni's long-range sensors detected a debris field in Gurm. Out of the 14 scout teams we sent to Altair during the past months, only two have returned. The losses for such a search and rescue mission have become unacceptable. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Two weeks ago, a cloaked transporter jumped to Sol. It seems that the Koalition is suddenly interested in diplomatic relations. It's important to uncover the true situation and whether history is repeating itself. At the bar, you have the chance to meet the diplomats.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>It's difficult to believe what we've witnessed in Altair. Organic machines were shooting at us, and a wing of Koalition elite pilots never returned from that mission. Who in their right mind would believe that? At the very least, the flight recorders validated that there is something out there. Given the complicated diplomatic relations with the Koalition, we are fortunate that our report was accepted by them without further questioning. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Our local governments for sure are more skeptical about all of this.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The Rheinland government has agreed to grant access to the Utopia system, a military-restricted zone. Time to go there and find out what's so important about that place.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

Given the complicated diplomatic relations with the Koalition, we are fortunate that our report was accepted by them without further questioning.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Our local governments for sure are more skeptical about all of this.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The Rheinland government has agreed to grant access to the Utopia system, a military-restricted zone. Time to go there and find out what's so important about that place.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

Given the complicated diplomatic relations with the Koalition, we are fortunate that our report was accepted by them without further questioning.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Our local governments for sure are more skeptical about all of this.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The Rheinland government has agreed to grant access to the Utopia system, a military-restricted zone. Time to go there and find out what's so important about that place.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Utopia System is certainly a remarkable system. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>That must be the reason why the Rheinland military has chosen it for their military training. There are several training areas located south of the Triangulum Militaer Academy, which is the heart of this system. Nomaden were observed to the north of Triangulum. Most of the other parts of this system have not been explored yet. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Somewhere in Utopia an important secret must be waiting to be discovered. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Check the bar. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Maybe you will find some information there.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Either these people here do not want to help or are unable to do so.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Nobody here has heard or seen anything unusual. Maybe our information about this system is incorrect or these people are not allowed to talk about it. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The best would be to explore this system without the help of others.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Eingehende Uebertragung:</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>"This is the KGS Observatory. We got multiple readings on our long range Scanners. Drones all around this system just have been activated. You did stir up a hornet's nest. Staying here is too dangerous. Leave the system as fast as you can."</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Suddenly, your Schiff systems start displaying strange values. </TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The internal firewalls failed. Someone or something is hacking your navigation and communication systems. Hard to believe, but nothing is being downloaded. Instead, several subroutines are being added to the Schiff systems.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Eingehende Nachricht:</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>System update completed. Waypoint added. Help required.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The dimensions of these stations exceed everything mankind ever has built. Even this hangar deck, one of many, is of a gigantic size.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The surface, the walls,... everything is slightly pulsating, leaving no doubt that this entire station is a massive artificial organism that was constructed to serve the Dom'Kavash.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Strange sounds come from everywhere. Hard to say what their origin is, the Dom'Kavash or the station itself.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Two large objects, looking like crystals, are slowly moving down from the ceiling. </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Hitting the ground, they suddenly activate and reveal their purpose. Consoles.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>It takes a few moments before a small star map and a message in our language are shown.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Sylroth Light Dome</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
We are the Kavash.

We ruled over this galaxy for more than 70.000 years, but our empire nearly collapsed. Our race was in its infancy when we began to spread throughout this region of the universe. Young and blinded. 

Not many races that we encountered during the early years of the empire were able to survive the subsequent wars. The very few who did became part of the empire. Soon after just 2.000 years, we ruled over this galaxy and in our blind arrogance, we now used the name Dom'Kavash, Dominator Kavash. 

It took us another 10.000 years to realize our mistakes. We, the empire, were alone. Our race reached a technological level that was beyond your imagination. We were able to conquer the entire galaxy, but there were no more tasks for us. No battles to fight, no wars to win, no place we have not yet controlled.
We were now destined to give something back to the worlds we once conquered. The seed of life was spread over many worlds, and other planets already had primitive life forms that were influenced by our presence.

We Kavash are not exempt from mistakes and we have made many of them. So it did happen that we also tried to reach other galaxies. The technology for opening up hyperspace to other galaxies took another 4,000 years to develop. There was no strong enough power source to keep such a gateway open except for one. A black hole situated near the galaxy's core. We have built three galactic gates and opened them. 

Among all the mistakes we made, this was the biggest. As we endeavored to reach other galaxies, we had the expectation of finding primitive cultures and possibly even some civilizations. Our expectations were misguided. We were unaware that there were other galactic empires. For the first few hundred years, our interactions with others were peaceful. But the situation started to become complicated when we, the Kavash, decided not to share our hyperspace technology with the other empires. It is hard to say if this was a mistake or not. 

It took not long for war to be declared on us and giant fleets came through the galactic hypergates into our galaxy. Every ship, every Kavash capable of fighting, was ordered back to our home world to join our fleet. The objective of our plan was to destroy the Galactic gates and then permanently close them. Despite our efforts, we failed.

We, the Kavash, reached the gates under heavy losses. Due to the gates being nearly indestructible and built to resist even the gravitimetric anomalies of the black hole, we had to destroy the hyperspace technology inside them. The gates remained open, however. The hyperspace gateways took their energy directly from the black hole, and we were not able to disrupt this energy stream. Our fleet was forced to retreat.

Many of the systems that were close to the core were taken over by our adversaries. The Kavash were unable to fight everywhere and prevented these intruders from accessing hyperspace technology. 
We decided to abandon colonies in the outer regions of the galaxy and dismantle any hypergates that lead there. We restricted the war to stay close to the core and far from our children. That was the prize we had to pay for our arrogance. 
We could not expect the war to rage for so long, and we could not expect your race to travel to space that soon. 

You have encountered the guards of our previous colonies, the Nomads, and you have survived them. Your race seems to have a lot of interesting and strong characteristics, but it also seems to be full of conflicts. You appear to be similar to Kavash, who lived 70.000 years ago.
Our empire will fall soon. 

The enemy forces have made it to the last defense lines. In our history, we have never asked for help before. 
This galaxy will fall if you don't fight together with us.

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A Hypergate allows instantaneous travel between two distinct points in space. Hypergates are much more efficient than human Sprungtors. or even Warp Gates</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Universal large transport </TEXT><TRA data="2" mask="2" def="-3"/><TEXT>Foley</TEXT><TRA data="0" mask="2" def="-1"/><TEXT> was supporting the construction of the Tradelanes in this Hyperion. entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>BDR-337 "Defender" Liberty schwerer Jaeger Erw.</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>"The best of the best," this heavily outfitted rig represents the pinnacle of Liberty's technological advances and design savoir faire. With its elevated armor and power rating as standard and the additional mount for firepower, it's no wonder that this Schiff is the number one choice of the Liberty Armed Forces. High decorated Liberty pilots received the right to fly an advanced version of this Schiff.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 7,053 km.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 10.98 x 10e23 kg.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Desert.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -71°C to 70°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>FLUCHTGESCHWINDIGKEIT: 13.57 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Reims is covered by a single vast desert, broken only by large rocky outcroppings. A mining operation was established on the planet but the surface would not allow permament settlement.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="65281" mask="-31" def="30"/><TEXT>>>>WARNING: NAVIGATIONAL HAZARD<<<</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="96" mask="-31" def="-1"/><TEXT>The Lourdes Cloud is rich in Alien Organisms, present on the surface of most asteroids. Its high background radiation levels do not invite lingering, however. Exposure time in open space should be minimized. </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="65281" mask="-31" def="30"/><TEXT>>>>WARNING: SEVERE DANGER<<<</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="96" mask="-31" def="-1"/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>The cloud is a swirling mass of sulfuric acid and hydrogen sulfide that will corrode the Hull Panels of even an armored, shielded Schiff in a relatively short amount of time. Because of its toxic nature, the cloud has never been fully explored.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A large sulfur cloud containing lava asteroids. Diamonds can often be found floating freely within the cloud.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Vosges Cloud is the main resource deposit for Water, Oxygen, H-Fuel and other gases in this system..</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A small nebulous region at the north periphery of the system. The natural resources have not been exploited yet.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The old ones tell stories about our arrival in these systems. A failed experiment that used to be the hope for the Alliance. </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.translation_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The old ones tell stories about our arrival in these systems. A failed experiment that used to be the hope for the Alliance.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The old ones tell stories about our arrival in these systems. A failed experiment that used to be the hope for the Alliance.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The sleeperSchiff that brought us here had an engine failure after its first jump. The Schiff was too big to pass through asteroid field leading to our new home. Smaller Schiffe were dispatched to bring the survivors here.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The sleeperSchiff we came with was hidden in Tau Ceti. We hoped to be able to repair it but that hope vanished. For centuries nobody traveled back due to the growing danger from the Neutron Stars. </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.translation_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The sleeperSchiff we came with was hidden in Tau Ceti. We hoped to be able to repair it but that hope vanished. For centuries nobody traveled back due to the growing danger from the Neutron Stars.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The sleeperSchiff we came with was hidden in Tau Ceti. We hoped to be able to repair it but that hope vanished. For centuries nobody traveled back due to the growing danger from the Neutron Stars.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>We tried to find a new world to settle on but could not find a planet suitable for colonization in this region of space.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Renaissance has build their first space station inside an asteroid using using the hull plates of the escort Schiffe that were supposed to protect the sleeperSchiff.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>We are constantly under attack by alien Schiffe. They seem to have a large outpost in a nearby system.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I’ve heard reports coming in that Nomaden have been spotted all over this System. It doesn’t look like an invasion fleet, though. It looks more like a search operation. They’re continually patrolling and sweeping for something.  </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.translation_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I’ve heard reports coming in that Nomaden have been spotted all over this System. It doesn’t look like an invasion fleet, though. It looks more like a search operation. They’re continually patrolling and sweeping for something.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I’ve heard reports coming in that Nomaden have been spotted all over this System. It doesn’t look like an invasion fleet, though. It looks more like a search operation. They’re continually patrolling and sweeping for something.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Given the fact that we have not seen other humans for centuries, it was really creepy to see some strangers walking in the bar not too long ago.  </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.translation_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Given the fact that we have not seen other humans for centuries, it was really creepy to see some strangers walking in the bar not too long ago.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Given the fact that we have not seen other humans for centuries, it was really creepy to see some strangers walking in the bar not too long ago.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>It’s really getting out of control now. People are saying that Nomad  warSchiffe have been seen in just about every system in the colonies. This is leading us straight into a war, if you ask me.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I just heard one Schlachtschiff was just destroyed! I wonder how that happened. There aren’t enough military forces combined to take on a capitol Schiff of that class. </TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.translation_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I just heard one Schlachtschiff was just destroyed! I wonder how that happened. There aren’t enough military forces combined to take on a capitol Schiff of that class.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>
entries.suggested_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>I just heard one Schlachtschiff was just destroyed! I wonder how that happened. There aren’t enough military forces combined to take on a capitol Schiff of that class.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>The Sirius Sector? That is where we were supposed to go? Well, I guess we stranded far away from there.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>There are reports of an alien fleet in the Procyon System. I bet it was those same bastards that blew up the Normandy. I had friends there. I hope they got out alive.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>renaissance battleSchiff engine</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Top Speed (theoretical): 0</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> Energy Drain / sec: 0</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Juni and King will be waiting for you here at the </TEXT><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Orden HQ</TEXT><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><TEXT>, for the next mission to start while you are free to venture out into the void of space.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000002" mask="-1" def="-3"/><TEXT>It could be a good opportunity to explore the local area for potential side missions.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Die Nebenmissionen sind vorerst abgeschlossen. Zu einem spaeteren Zeitpunkt werden weitere Missionen hinzugefuegt.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Es liegt an dir, ob du die Systeme erkunden oder zur Hauptgeschichte zurueckkehren willst.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Juni and King still will be waiting for you at the </TEXT><TRA data="0x0000FF01" mask="-1" def="30"/><TEXT>Orden HQ.</TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000001" mask="-1" def="-2"/><TEXT>Wenn du bereit bist, kehre dorthin zurueck.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TRA data="0x00000000" mask="-1" def="-1"/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun and the eighth largest. Mercury is slightly smaller in diameter than the moons Ganymede and Titan but more than twice as massive. 

 orbit: 57,910,000 km (0.38 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 4,880 km
 mass: 3.30e23 kg

In Roman mythology Mercury is the god of commerce, travel and thievery, the Roman counterpart of the Greek god Hermes, the messenger of the Gods. The planet probably received this name because it moves so quickly across the sky. 

Mercury has been known since at least the time of the Sumerians (3rd millennium BC). It was given two names by the Greeks: Apollo for its apparition as a morning star and Hermes as an evening star. Greek astronomers knew, however, that the two names referred to the same body. Heraclitus even believed that Mercury and Venus orbit the Sun, not the Earth.

Venus is the second planet from the Sun and the sixth largest. Venus' orbit is the most nearly circular of that of any planet, with an eccentricity of less than 1%. 

 orbit: 108,200,000 km (0.72 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 12,103.6 km
 mass: 4.869e24 kg

Venus (Greek: Aphrodite; Babylonian: Ishtar) is the goddess of love and beauty. The planet is so named probably because it is the brightest of the planets known to the ancients. (With a few exceptions, the surface features on Venus are named for female figures.) 

Venus has been known since prehistoric times. It is the brightest object in the sky except for the Sun and the Moon. Like Mercury, it was popularly thought to be two separate bodies: Eosphorus as the morning star and Hesperus as the evening star, but the Greek astronomers knew better. (Venus's apparition as the morning star is also sometimes called Lucifer.)

Earth is the third planet from the Sun and the fifth largest: 

 orbit: 149,600,000 km (1.00 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 12,756.3 km
 mass: 5.972e24 kg

Earth is the only planet whose English name does not derive from Greek/Roman mythology. The name derives from Old English and Germanic. There are, of course, hundreds of other names for the planet in other languages. In Roman Mythology, the goddess of the Earth was Tellus - the fertile soil (Greek: Gaia, terra mater - Mother Earth). 

It was not until the time of Copernicus (the sixteenth century) that it was understood that the Earth is just another planet. 

Earth, of course, can be studied without the aid of spacecraft. Nevertheless it was not until the twentieth century that we had maps of the entire planet. Pictures of the planet taken from space are of considerable importance; for example, they are an enormous help in weather prediction and especially in tracking and predicting hurricanes. And they are extraordinarily beautiful.

Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun and the seventh largest: 

 orbit: 227,940,000 km (1.52 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 6,794 km
 mass: 6.4219e23 kg

Mars (Greek: Ares) is the god of War. The planet probably got this name due to its red color; Mars is sometimes referred to as the Red Planet. (An interesting side note: the Roman god Mars was a god of agriculture before becoming associated with the Greek Ares; those in favor of colonizing and terraforming Mars may prefer this symbolism.) The name of the month March derives from Mars. 

Mars has been known since prehistoric times. Of course, it has been extensively studied with ground-based observatories. But even very large telescopes find Mars a difficult target, it's just too small. It is still a favorite of science fiction writers as the most favorable place in the Solar System (other than Earth!) for human habitation. But the famous 'canals' 'seen' by Lowell and others were, unfortunately, just as imaginary as Barsoomian princesses.

Jupiter is the fifth planet from the Sun and by far the largest. Jupiter is more than twice as massive as all the other planets combined (the mass of Jupiter is 318 times that of Earth). 

 orbit:    778,330,000 km (5.20 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 142,984 km (equatorial)
 mass: 1.900e27 kg

Jupiter (a.k.a. Jove; Greek Zeus) was the King of the Gods, the ruler of Olympus and the patron of the Roman state. Zeus was the son of Cronus (Saturn).

Saturn is the sixth planet from the Sun and the second largest: 

 orbit: 1,429,400,000 km (9.54 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 120,536 km (equatorial)
 mass: 5.68e26 kg

In Roman mythology, Saturn is the god of agriculture. The associated Greek god, Cronus, was the son of Uranus and Gaia and the father of Zeus (Jupiter). Saturn is the root of the English word 'Saturday' (see Appendix 5). 

Saturn has been known since prehistoric times. Galileo was the first to observe it with a telescope in 1610; he noted its odd appearance but was confused by it. Early observations of Saturn were complicated by the fact that the Earth passes through the plane of Saturn's rings every few years as Saturn moves in its orbit. A low resolution image of Saturn therefore changes drastically. It was not until 1659 that Christiaan Huygens correctly inferred the geometry of the rings. Saturn's rings remained unique in the known solar system until 1977 when very faint rings were discovered around Uranus (and shortly thereafter around Jupiter and Neptune).

Uranus is the seventh planet from the Sun and the third largest (by diameter). Uranus is larger in diameter but smaller in mass than Neptune. 

 orbit: 2,870,990,000 km (19.218 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 51,118 km (equatorial)
 mass: 8.683e25 kg

Careful pronunciation may be necessary to avoid embarrassment; say 'YOOR a nus' , not 'your anus' or 'urine us'. 

Uranus is the ancient Greek deity of the Heavens, the earliest supreme god. Uranus was the son and mate of Gaia the father of Cronus (Saturn) and of the Cyclopes and Titans (predecessors of the Olympian gods).

Neptune is the eighth planet from the Sun and the fourth largest (by diameter). Neptune is smaller in diameter but larger in mass than Uranus. 

 orbit: 4,504,000,000 km (30.06 AU) from Sun
 diameter: 49,532 km (equatorial)
 mass: 1.0247e26 kg

In Roman mythology Neptune (Greek: Poseidon) was the god of the Sea.

Pluto is the farthest planet from the Sun (usually) and by far the smallest. Pluto is smaller than seven of the solar system's moons (the Moon, Io, Europa, Ganymede, Callisto, Titan and Triton). 

 orbit: 5,913,520,000 km (39.5 AU) from the Sun (average)
 diameter: 2274 km
 mass: 1.27e22 kg

In Roman mythology, Pluto (Greek: Hades) is the god of the underworld. The planet received this name (after many other suggestions) perhaps because it's so far from the Sun that it is in perpetual darkness and perhaps because 'PL' are the initials of Percival Lowell. 

Pluto was discovered in 1930 by a fortunate accident. Calculations which later turned out to be in error had predicted a planet beyond Neptune, based on the motions of Uranus and Neptune. Not knowing of the error, Clyde W. Tombaugh at Lowell Observatory in Arizona did a very careful sky survey which turned up Pluto anyway. 

After the discovery of Pluto, it was quickly determined that Pluto was too small to account for the discrepancies in the orbits of the other planets. The search for Planet X continued but nothing was found. Nor is it likely that it ever will be: the discrepancies vanish if the mass of Neptune determined from the Voyager 2 encounter with Neptune is used. There is no tenth planet.

The Moon is the only natural satellite of Earth: 

 orbit: 384,400 km from Earth
 diameter: 3476 km
 mass: 7.35e22 kg

Called Luna by the Romans, Selene and Artemis by the Greeks, and many other names in other mythologies. 

The Moon, of course, has been known since prehistoric times. It is the second brightest object in the sky after the Sun. As the Moon orbits around the Earth once per month, the angle between the Earth, the Moon and the Sun changes; we see this as the cycle of the Moon's phases. The time between successive new moons is 29.5 days (709 hours), slightly different from the Moon's orbital period (measured against the stars) since the Earth moves a significant distance in its orbit around the Sun in that time. 

Due to its size and composition, the Moon is sometimes classified as a terrestrial 'planet' along with Mercury, Venus, Earth and Mars.

Deimos is the smaller and outermost of Mars' two moons. It is one of the smallest known moons in the solar system. 

 orbit: 23,459 km from Mars
 diameter: 12.6 km (15 x 12.2 x 11)
 mass: 1.8e15 kg

In Greek mythology, Deimos is one of the sons of Ares (Mars) and Aphrodite (Venus); 'deimos' is Greek for 'panic'.

Phobos is the larger and innermost of Mars' two moons. Phobos is closer to its primary than any other moon in the solar system, less than 6000 km above the surface of Mars. It is also one of the smallest moons in the solar system. 

 orbit: 9378 km from the center of Mars
 diameter: 22.2 km (27 x 21.6 x 18.8)
 mass: 1.08e16 kg

In Greek mythology, Phobos is one of the sons of Ares (Mars) and Aphrodite (Venus). 'phobos' is Greek for 'fear' (the root of 'phobia').

Io is the fifth of Jupiter's known satellites and the third largest; it is the innermost of the Galilean moons. Io is slightly larger than Earth's Moon. 

 orbit: 422,000 km from Jupiter
 diameter: 3630 km
 mass: 8.93e22 kg

The pronunciation 'EE oh' is also acceptable. 

Io was a maiden who was loved by Zeus (Jupiter) and transformed into a heifer in a vain attempt to hide her from the jealous Hera.

Europa is the sixth of Jupiter's known satellites and the fourth largest; it is the second of the Galilean moons. Europa is slightly smaller than the Earth's Moon. 

 orbit: 670,900 km from Jupiter
 diameter: 3138 km
 mass: 4.80e22 kg

Europa was a Phoenician princess abducted to Crete by Zeus, who had assumed the form of a white bull, and by him the mother of Minos.

Callisto ('ka LIS toh') is the eighth of Jupiter's known satellites and the second largest. It is the outermost of the Galilean moons. 

 orbit: 1,883,000 km from Jupiter
 diameter: 4800 km
  mass: 1.08e23 kg

Callisto was a nymph, beloved of Zeus and hated by Hera. Hera changed her into a bear and Zeus then placed her in the sky as the constellation Ursa Major.

Metis is the innermost of Jupiter's known satellites: 

 orbit: 128,000 km from Jupiter
 diameter: 40 km
 mass: 9.56e16 kg

Metis was a Titaness who was the first wife of Zeus (Jupiter). 

Metis and Adrastea lie within Jupiter's main ring. They may be the source of the material comprising the ring.

Titan is the fifteenth of Saturn's known satellites and the largest: 

 orbit: 1,221,830 km from Saturn
 diameter: 5150 km
 mass: 1.35e23 kg

In Greek mythology the Titans were a family of giants, the children of Uranus and Gaia, who sought to rule the heavens but were overthrown and supplanted by the family of Zeus. 

It was long thought that Titan was the largest satellite in the solar system but recent observations have shown that Titan's atmosphere is so thick that its solid surface is slightly smaller than Ganymede's. Titan is nevertheless larger in diameter than Mercury and larger and more massive than Pluto.

Rhea is the fourteenth of Saturn's known satellites  and the second largest: 

 orbit: 527,040 km from Saturn
 diameter: 1530 km
 mass: 2.49e21 kg

In Greek mythology Rhea was the sister and wife of Cronus (Saturn) and the mother of Demeter, Hades (Pluto), Hera, Hestia, Poseidon (Neptune), and Zeus (Jupiter). 

Though somewhat larger, Rhea is otherwise very similar to Dione. They both have similar compositions, albedo features and varied terrain. Both rotate synchronously and have dissimilar leading and trailing hemispheres. 

Rhea is composed primarily of water ice with rock making up less than 1/3 of its mass.

Tethys is the ninth of Saturn's known satellites: 

 orbit: 294,660 km from Saturn
 diameter: 1060 km
 mass: 6.22e20 kg

In Greek mythology Tethys was a Titaness and sea goddess who was both sister and wife of Oceanus.

Tethys' low density indicates that it is almost completely composed of water ice, similar to Dione and Rhea.

Cressida is the fourth of Uranus' known satellites: 

 orbit: 61,767 km from Uranus
 diameter: 66 km
 mass: ?

Cressida is the daughter of Calchas in Shakespeare's Troilus and Cressida.

Ariel is the twelfth of Uranus's known satellites: 

 orbit: 190,930 km from Uranus
 diameter: 1158 km
 mass: 1.27e21 kg

Ariel is a mischievous airy spirit in Shakespeare's The Tempest. 

Ariel and Titania appear quite similar though Titania is 35% larger. All of Uranus' large moons are a mixture of about 40-50% water ice with the rest rock, a somewhat larger fraction of rock than Saturn's large moons such as Rhea.

Umbriel is the thirteenth of Uranus's known satellites and the third largest: 

 orbit: 265,980 km from Uranus
 diameter: 1170 km
 mass: 1.27e21 kg

Umbriel is a character in Alexander Pope's The Rape of the Lock.

Umbriel and Oberon appear quite similar though Oberon is 35% larger. All of Uranus' large moons are a mixture of about 40-50% water ice with the rest rock, a somewhat larger fraction of rock than Saturn's large moons such as Rhea. 

Umbriel's heavily cratered surface has probably been stable since its formation. It has far more and larger craters than do Ariel and Titania. 

Umbriel is very dark; it reflects only about half as much light as Ariel, Uranus' brightest satellite.

Titania is the fourteenth and largest of Uranus's known satellites: 

 orbit: 436,270 km from Uranus
 diameter: 1578 km
 mass: 3.49e21 kg

Titania is the Queen of the Fairies and wife of Oberon in Shakespeare's Midsummer-Night's Dream. 

Titania and Ariel appear quite similar though Ariel is 25% smaller. All of Uranus' large moons are a mixture of about 40-50% water ice with the rest rock, a somewhat larger fraction of rock than Saturn's large moons such as Rhea.

Oberon is the outermost of Uranus' large satellites and the second largest: 

 orbit: 583,420 km from Uranus
 diameter: 1523 km
 mass: 3.03e21 kg

Oberon is the King of the Fairies and husband of Titania in Shakespeare's Midsummer-Night's Dream. 

Oberon and Umbriel appear quite similar though Oberon is 35% larger. All of Uranus' large moons are a mixture of about 40-50% water ice with the rest rock, a somewhat larger fraction of rock than Saturn's large moons such as Rhea.

Triton is the seventh and by far the largest of Neptune's satellites: 

 orbit: 354,760 km from Neptune
 diameter: 2700 km
 mass: 2.14e22 kg

Discovered by Lassell in 1846 only a few weeks after the discovery of Neptune itself. 

In Greek mythology, Triton is a god of the sea, the son of Poseidon (Neptune); usually portrayed as having the head and trunk of a man and the tail of a fish. 

Triton has been visited by only one spacecraft, Voyager 2 on Aug 25 1989. Almost everything we know about it comes from this encounter.

Charon is Pluto's only known satellite: 

 orbit: 19,640 km from Pluto
 diameter: 1172 km
 mass: 1.90e21 kg

Charon is named for the mythological figure who ferried the dead across the River Acheron into Hades (the underworld). 

(Though officially named for the mythological figure, Charon's discoverer was also naming it in honor of his wife, Charlene. Thus, those in the know pronounce it with the first syllable sounding like 'shard' ('SHAHR en'). 

Charon was discovered in 1978 by Jim Christy. Prior to that it was thought that Pluto was much larger since the images of Charon and Pluto were blurred together. 

Charon is unusual in that it is the largest moon with respect to its primary planet in the Solar System (a distinction once held by Earth's Moon). Some prefer to think of Pluto/Charon as a double planet rather than a planet and a moon. 

Charon's radius is not well known. JPL's value of 586 has an error margin of +/-13, more than two percent. Its mass and density are also poorly known.

After the defeat of the nomads, the houses decided that a joint project would be a crucial part of repairing the damage to relations between them; the wheel is the result of that effort.  Serving as a major Schiffping and communications hub, the wheel is operated by goverment, corporate and non-criminal factions alike, each affording access to information and goods from all over the Sirius sector.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
Diameter: 5871 km
Mass:  2.753 x10e24 kg
Terrain:   ice
Temperature:   -127°C/-10°C
Escape Velocity:  5.19 km/sec



Lack of a breathable atmosphere has left this planet barren, with only vast plains of carbon-dioxide ice to adorn it.

Diameter:  5847.2 km
Mass:  2.742 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -150°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



An extremely young planet, Minos' surface is completely reshaped every 3.2 solar years, making any construction here impossible.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  3320.6 km
Mass:  1.557 x10e24 kg
Terrain:  ice
Temperature:   -76°C/-10°C
Escape Velocity:  2.94 km/sec



Originally surveyed for use as a new penal colony, Southport's climate proved to be too harsh for humane living conditions.  Gateway Shipping is now considering a water processing operation here.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  5750.9 km
Mass:  2.697 x10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  65°C/154°C
Escape Velocity:  5.09 km/sec



Rheinland geologists have determined that because this planet's core is unstable, it will likely break apart catastophically some time over the next millenium, providing rich new mining fields.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  10,250.5 km
Mass:  4.087 x10e24 kg
Terrain: terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/40°C
Escape Velocity:  9.06 km/sec



Attracted by the mild climate, some of Sirius' finest research facilities have been built here.  Conceived as an academic colony, Legacy also houses the archives of the sleeper ships, and the most complete collection of artifacts in Sirius.

entries.source_text:
Klasse:  unknown
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  restricted
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  unknown
It was first a memorial to the lost heros of the Nomadic Wars carved from one of the chunks of the dead planetary mass from X-3043. Der Bundschuh took it over and converted it into a fully functional shipyard. It was the last of five stations first built in Crossfire space.

Diameter:  9456.4 km
Mass:  4.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/50°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



Tzu has been identified as a candidate for future terraforming efforts, as soon as Planetform completes its project on planet Harris.  The unusually high percentage of noble gases in its atmosphere currently prevents habitation.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  7555.6 km
Mass:  6.677 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  desert
Temperature:  -87°C/-5°C
Escape Velocity:  6.68 km/sec



Drake is similar geologically to Planet Harris, but its thin carbon dioxide atmosphere will not sustain life.  Terraforming will be required, once IMG has exhausted its mineral rights to the palladium and platinum discovered here.

entries.source_text:
Klasse:  Zeus
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  limited
Bevoelkerung:   unknown
Outpost Epsilon houses many of the manufacturing and mining personnel who work in facilities scattered throughout the Enyo system. A large number of guilds and shipping companies have regional headquarters here , though it is owned and operated by die Ausgestossenen. Even the most powerful Liberty Death Cannons cannot penetrate this defense. It is one of the first five stations in Crossfire history.

Klasse:  Tantalus
Gravitation:   complete
Andocken:  restricted
Einrichtungen:  limited
Bevoelkerung:  unknown
The purple sun of Enigma only increases the ominous look of Outpost Zeta. It is the infamous Corsair prison where inhuman and immoral experiments are conducted on captured soldiers, prisoners, and slaves. The warden will welcome you with open arms if you are allied with die Korsaren; start praying if you are not. It was one of five original human statons of Crossfire.

Class:  Sanctuary
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  unknown



One of the Corsair's refueling stations in Crossfire space. It was taken over during a trojan horse operation when Corsairs docked in a armored transport and used experimental PPC(Phoenix Project Cannon) turrets to mow down the Alliance troopers that controlled the docks. It is one of five original human stations in Crossfire history.

Class:  Musashi
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  400



Shogun Base was the first base to be settled in Hiruga, in 260, imagined as the shogun secret retirement home out of the rush political environment of New Tokyo. When the Hideyoshi dynasty was dethroned from the power by Samura in 321, the base was used as a sanctuary for the last loyal of Royal Guard and kept secret along with the rest of the system until the Nomad War.

Klasse:  Dern
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  limited
Bevoelkerung:  150
This outpost was built by der Orden to train former pilots and agents. After the Nomad war, Sakamoto Outpost was occupied by die Zoner who were praised for this action in exchange for financial support to Blutdrachen' political cause

Klasse:  Unknown
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  restricted
Einrichtungen:  limited
Bevoelkerung:  unknown
Settled shortly after Shogun base as a temple and a school for the Sect (emperor's secret intelligence organization keeping the balance between Kusari families), Nagara Outpost was used by Royal Guard and kept secret for a long time after the power shifts in Kusari. It was lately transformed in a weapon laboratory during the Nomad war. Der Orden scientists developed first version of the advanced champion shield using diamond deposits from the mining field that surrounds Hiruga star, not far from the station.

Klasse:  Chapel
Gravitation:  partial
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  limited
Bevoelkerung:  375
Now owned by the Kusari Police, this station was built by the GMG, as a laboratory to study warp anomalies in the system. After the Nomad war, GMG lost interest in Hiruga and secretly sold the station to the Kusari government (probably hoping for future agreement with Samura). Blutdrachen declared GMG as hostile shortly after this turnover. However, and regardless of many attempts by Blutdrachen' forces to destroy it, Kobe station stays still, acting as a certain refuge for government-friendly people who mistakenly enter Hiruga without a map, and a treatment station for PTSD victims after the experience with Hiruga maze.

Klasse:  Musashi
Gravitation:  partial
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  350
Built during the Nomad war by die Blutdrachen with the support of der Orden, this base was constructed to protect Hiruga from a Nomad attack. After the Nomad war and der Ordens' departure for the system, Blutdrachen changed Shingu Station's primary function to support line for advanced piloting and maneuvering training of their forces.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1804.6 km
Mass:  4.439 x 10e22 kg
Terrain:  unknown
Temperature:  -160°C/-100°C
Escape Velocity:  1.60 km/sec



Liberty scientists disagree as to whether this is the remains of a planet shattered by a cosmic collision, or a protoplanet, which failed to coalesce into a larger planet.  Its thin toxic atmosphere is indistinguishable from the surrounding nebula of planetary fragments and gases.  Because of this fact, many pilots perished in collisions with the planet before the latest models of scanners and autopilots became available, and so it was named Deathland.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  10779.8 km
Mass:  5.055 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -60°C/80°C
Escape Velocity:  9.53 km/sec
<<Prohibited - Lethal Environment >>



Only fragmentary information has been obtained about this planet, since no landing party or science probe has ever returned from its surface; hence the name, Death.  Heated by nearby Sirius, the planet's greenhouse-like atmosphere appears to harbor a variety of microbial life which feeds upon carbonates, and produces toxic waste.

entries.source_text:
Klasse:  Nibelungen (C)
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  6k
Built on a Chasin-class base framework, Pusin is operated by die Zoner, who provide information to the unlawful factions of Sirius.  House governments decided this was better than to leave the criminals in the dark, and become potential tools of the nomads & Dom'Kavash.

Klasse:  Nibelungen (E-A)
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  4k
Mostar is operated by the Bretonian Polizeibehoerde, who help to provide security to the entire system.  Bowex uses the facilities here as a transport depot.  While the ship dock is built from a Eden-class base section, the main population is housed in three Akebono-class sections.

Klasse:  Nibelungen (Co-A)
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  2k
Deep Space Engineering, one of the contractors of the Wheel construction project, operates the Lagos Dock.  This facility is used to ferry constructions materials and machinery all over Sirius, and is guarded by the Kopfgeldjaeger.  DSE used a Cochrane-class station for its shipping module, and an Akebono-class segment for the habitation module.

Klasse:  Nibelungen (S)
Gravitation: complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  5k
Because of their longstanding role in recycling of scrap metal and discarded hardware, die Schrotties were contracted to operate this section of the Wheel.  Its unique construction includes a shipyard module, which produces reliable Hispania-designed fighters, delivered to many customers by Liberty Rougues.

Klasse:   Nibelungen (D)
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  3k
As the primary Rheinland contractor to the Wheel, ALG operated Tilsit Dock.  Built from a Dern-class docking section, Venlo is the most remote of the Wheel stations.  Rumor has it that members of der Orden have been seen frequenting the bar here.

Klasse:  Nibelungen (T)
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  1k
Bretonian Armed Forces and Kopfgeldjaeger base their operations in the Wheel system here at Moers Dock.  Much of the system's production of MOX, light arms and H-fuel is sent here to support the security forces.  Built on a Tyrell-class docking module, Moers is not a pleasure destination.

Class:  Nibelungen (M)
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  2k



Universal Shipping, Ageira, and Synth Foods are joint partners in the operation of Pharos Dock, providing most of the daily consumables required in the Wheel.  Frequently visited by the LSF, Pharos is built on a Mifune-class station frame.

Class:  Nibelungen (Ch-D)
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  1k



Bowex obtained the franchise from the Bretonian government to operate Rodgau Dock.  Apart from its Chapel-class docking module, several Zoner-designed greenhouse module were added to provide organic processing of atmospheric gases for the Wheel.  These bio-domes are also a favorite recreational spot for the Wheel's citizens.

entries.source_text:
Freedom X-Interceptor
After being outcast from his first clan, a pilot engineer went away into deep space and started to work on his own project called Freedom. His first step was to design a multirole space/air interceptor with enough firepower, speed, and manoeuvrability to be able to face any known and unknown Schiff in the Sirius sector. After some attempts, FX02 was born. It was made out of a light alloy compound to improve its speed at the cost of having average armour for a heavy fighter class. Finally, the combination of speed, heavy weaponry and agility makes out for its lack of armour transforming the FX02 into a dangerous weapon in the hands of an expert pilot.

Mass:  5.98 x10e24 kg
Terrain: terrestrial
Temperature:   -28°C/61°C
Escape Velocity:  11.27 km/sec



Tobruk was established as a base from which to build the nearby prison station.  Today it serves as a shipping depot for goods to and from the prison.

Toral Station is the shipyard of the Syren Corporation. Liberty government supervision ensures adherence to safety standards and prevents illegal research.

Prophecy is the headquarters of the CFPD and the GGC(Gunnery Gun Commission). If a pilot is caught flying a stolen Shroud from the CFPD Schiffyards, he will be immediately arrested and hung after his trial.

Class:  Chapel
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  450



Welcome to the farthest reaches of the British Empire of Sirius. Here at Peris station you will only find radio and spy equipment because Peris Station's role is a remote tracking center and border station to Aventin, the British labor planet.

Diameter:  13,114 km
Mass:  6.149 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/40°C
Escape Velocity:  11.59 km/sec



The labor camps of the Bretonian mining colonies are located on the continents of Aventin deep below the surface.  It is also the second center of mining operations, trade and transport in Crossfire.  If you are convicted of a crime against the public in Bretonia, you are either put on probation, sent to prison, put to death, or sent to work for life at the Aventin camps.

Orion Outpost was funded and constructed by the Bretonian Government, in a effort to support the traders from their home system to combat the Outcast presence. Orion Outpost is also a lucrative trade run to Planet Houston in the adjoining Texas system.

Class:  Cochrane
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  1k



Empire Station, built and controlled by the Bretonian government, serves as a secure dock and trade port for both freelancers and large corporations en route from planet Eton to the X-3043 system. This station also serves as an early drop off point for high value commodities traded between Planet Eton and Planet Crossfire.

Klasse:  Zeus
Gravitation:  complete
Andocken:  yes
Einrichtungen:  yes
Bevoelkerung:  2k
Station Reese, built by die Liberty-Marine in haste in order to have a jump point to fight the Nomad War, has turned itself into haven for Pirates, with a lucrative Cardamine trade with the Planet Gortyn. The Station also serves at the main facility for the Lost Prophets Pirates syndicate, where they violently tax Traders in the adjoining systems. Remaining Liberty forces still administrate the station but have little control over the black market activities and criminal groups.

Diameter:  5895.3 km
Mass:  2.764 x10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:   -65°C/27°C
Escape Velocity:  5.21 km/sec



Planet Gortyn, as all other systems in the X-3043 area were being quickly colonized by the Capital Houses, the Outcasts realized they need a system of their own , in order to spread their Cardamine and infect the rest of society. This planet is not friendly to most freelancers, but those who pay a modest fee can invest in this illegal trade and make quite a fortune.

Planet Vienna was quickly taken under the control of the Liberty Police during the Nomad War in an effort to gain a secondary entrance into the Freeport 7 system in order to provide more security as Freeport 7 is slowly rebuilt after the Nomads' catastrophic attack. Unfortunately, Purian Lake is a dead end system and offers no significant trades unless extreme risks are taken while crossing Freeport 7, which is still patrolled by Nomad fighter wings.
