entries.source_text:
Class:  unknown
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  restricted
Amenities:  yes
Population:  unknown



Long ago, legendary ace and bounty hunter Black Dragon was on a mission to kill a fugitive who had offended his clan. Upon hunting down his quarry, he was offered a bribe by the criminal, who more than anything sought mercy. Already discontented by his faction, Black Dragon accepted this payment and became dedicated to establishing a clan of mercenaries. Thus the Dragon Corp was formed. Soon the fortress of Tekagi was claimed as its headquarters in the Tohoku System.

Class:  Leviathan
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:   650



The Ice Palace was built as a vacation suite for the Princess Victoria. It is a outpost and royal luxury for those high in the Britonian navy. Even though it is a magnificent eye catching station, it is constantly under attack by Outcasts.

Chemical Components are used for many purposes like the creation of any kind of synthetic organic structures. Mainly these components are used to create synthetic food or basic oxigen producing bacteria.

Since the Alliance had to leave to Sirius the Houses had to live with synthetic tabacco which did not have the original taste. Now that Earth has been recolonized the natural tabacco is one of the most famous export goods there.
Wow that is a very old code. I have not seen something like that since my time on the academy when i studied military history. I don't remember the full meaning of that but 'TX-45' means 'F'.

Yes I know what 'KT4OTRWVT-33' does mean. But why should I tell you about that?
 Whoa... be careful with that gun, you could shoot into your own foot.

 Well ok the code means nothing else than 'Gurm'. I wonder why this is important for you.

Captains log
Jason Brennigan

It's been several years now since the Battle of Crossfire. The loss of the Dyson Sphere and the destruction of X-3043's main planet were a heavy blow for the Nomads. However, the Nomad fleet is still able to hold control of several important systems, such as Death Valley and Freeport 7, which was called this way to honour the victims that died on the first nomad attack. Even after the Houses of Sirius united to fight the nomad thread, we had heavy losses on our side and I have lost many good friends and comrades in the last years. I wish I could go back in time and correct some mistakes.

Wishes... stupid wishes of an old man.

Hey, I should be glad that i got the chance to see our old home, the Earth, instead of dreaming about how my life might have been, if we would have never been attacked by the Nomads. It's likely that I wouldn't have joined the navy again. Well it's right what people say about time... it makes us different from what we wanted to be. It has led me to this place and made me captain of that old, rusted Rheinland Battleship. Well, okay. I can imagine worse places.

At least it seems like the war with the Coalition is over. The leaders of the Houses of Sirius have agreed to a ceasefire with the Coalition. To me, it seems like the Coalition is unable to withstand the heavy attacks from Nomads any longer. After 800 years they can't fight us and the Nomads as once. It's a mystery to me how they managed to survive all these years. For that they have my respect. 

Although I will never trust those Coalition guys I think it is better to forget about the past until the Nomad threat has gone. I just hope for us that they won't stab us in the back if they get a chance. One thing is certain: I will keep my eyes open if a Coalition fighter is near.

The Fleet Command ordered us, the Rheinland battleship Pride of Berlin together with the Rheinland cruisers Victory and Loreley, to the Gladius system to investigate the loss of a small liner transporting our diplomats to the Coalition.

From what we know, they have managed to pass the Nomad systems and were on their way straight to the Coalition headquarters. Gladius was where we had our last contact with them. I wouldn't wonder if a Coalition fighter shot them down, but my opinion is not important. That's why we are here and risk our lives. But who am I to doubt my orders? At times, I think that we are worth less than a piece of scrap metal or a...


*beep*
'Captain we have reached your position and we are receiving unknown transmissions.'
'Coalition or Nomads?'
'No Sir! The transmissions have no known signature'
'What do you mean with no known signature? Who else could be able to do those transmissions if not the Coalition or the Nomads?'
'I have never seen something like this before'
'Ok I'll come. Set a course to Gladius sector E5, we will meet the Victory and Loreley there.'
*beep*


It seems that our 'Phantom' is close. Let's see if it's human or not.

Captains log
EOF

entries.source_text:
Captains log
Jürgen Berngruber

We have lost contact with Captain Brennigan. He wanted to meet us here, said something about an unknown transmission, but now we have been waiting here for hours without any contacts. The Pride of Berlin and the Victory were supposed to be here several hours ago. All we have are weird coordinates that don't make any sense. TX-45, X-76 and KT4OTRWVT-33. It appears to be an old military code. Brennigan was always a friend of those old military codes that were used during the war between the Alliance and Coalition. Maybe he encrypted these coordinates to protect something or someone. God, I hate those war games. 

It's best to locate the nearest Coalition station and request assistance there. It's possible that someone there has knowledge about this code, and perhaps some of the top officers at bars have heard some rumors.

*Alarm, unknown ships approaching*
'What?!?'

Captains log
EOF

We have lost contact with Captain Brennigan. He wanted to meet us here, said something about an unknown transmission, but now we have been waiting here for hours without any contacts. The Pride of Berlin and the Victory were supposed to be here several hours ago. All we have are weird coordinates that don't make any sense. TX-45, X-76 and KT4OTRWVT-33. It appears to be an old military code. Brennigan was always a friend of those old military codes that were used during the war between the Alliance and Coalition. Maybe he encrypted these coordinates to protect something or someone. God, I hate those war games. 

It's best to locate the nearest Coalition station and request assistance there. It's possible that someone there has knowledge about this code, and perhaps some of the top officers at bars have heard some rumors.

*Alarm, unknown ships approaching*
'What?!?'

Logbuch des Kapitaens
EOF

EOF

entries.source_text:
This blackbox holds important information about the arrival of the Dom'Kavash in Altair and their spreadout over the systems.
Deliver this and the two other blackboxes to the next of our colonies and inform the governments about the upcoming threat.

Note: It is important that you and the blackbox will survive!

This is Corporal Adam Miller. Who ever does find this message the Rheinland cruiser Victory was under attack by unknown ships. The Victory has been destroyed and most of us are dead. Captain Brennigan gave a last order to collect more information about this new threat and report what we find out to the governments of Sirius. Only three of us are left and we will follow captain Brennigans last order. We will head deep into enemy territory to collect as many information as possible. 

 God may protect us.

entries.source_text: After the Chaos Exoddus War this station was taken over and turned into a armor plating smelting plant. This station is not particularly any interest, just another key station of Crossfire ecomonics.

The liberation of Rodez was not an easy one, the Alliance lost many good men on this planet at the hands of the Chaos. Dubbed the Planet of Treason because of it's previous occupants, it is now the sight of major re-terraforming efforts to uncover natural resources lost during the atomic bombing of the Arrion Fortress. The debris field in orbit is the sight of the bloodiest, and last, space battle between the BloodGuard and Chaos fleets, the Battle of Serenity. Here lies the forgotten souls of the lost dur

Gravity:  complete

This station serves as a hub and home for many of the smugglers and pirates operating in Crossfire space.

Diameter:  10,274.6 km
Mass:  4.818 x10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/40°C
Escape Velocity:  9.08 km/sec



Known for its lush jungles and populated coastal towns, this was the planet that the IP spent down time on shore leave. The diamond run that the IP used to run has been depleted and the planet nearly ignored. Lima has mostly been abandoned from all travel since the fall of the IP, except the occasional tourist boat that makes it past the Outcasts. 

Lima has developed independently of the Houses, becoming a rough, noisy frontier colony.  A very diverse cross-section of factions can be found here, since lack of regulation allows opportunities not available elsewhere in Sirius.

entries.source_text: Nothing much to say about this station except it serves as a early warning station for all PiA activity and an expiremental weapons labratory. Carved out of a huge chunk of ice that was once part of a frozen mass that supported life during the Dom Kavash era, it houses about 300 military and science personel.

Class:  Ellison
Gravity: Classified
Docking: Restricted
Amenities: Classified
Population: Classified



Neutro Station, allso known as BloodGuard Academy, is the home of a new recruit until he`s assigned to one of the regular squadrons. Here a pilot can recieve training according to his needs. The QRT (Quick Response Team) is also stationed here, close to the X-3043 JumpGate, to intercept and, if necessary - execute, intruders more quickly.

Planet Baso is the HQ of Red Squadron. The main weapon research is done here. Irregular shipments of Alias Lists are made to this base, for secure disposal.  This planet is currently being terraformed into a tropical urban setting that will rival even Planet Curacao.  Its leadership is set under the Alliance military heriarchy, however the leader of the Red Squadron is presented with a baronship of the land.

entries.source_text: One of the Corsair's refueling stations in Crossfire space. It was taken over during a trojan horse operation when Korsaren docked in a armored transport and used expiremental PPC(Phoenix Project Cannon) turrets to mow down the Alliance troopers that controlled the docks. It is one of five original human stations in Crossfire history.

The purple sun of Enigma only increases the ominous look of Outpost Zeta. It is the infamous Corsair prison were inhuman and immoral expirements happen to captured soldiers, prisoners, and slaves. The warden will welcome you with open arms if you are allied with die Korsaren, however start praying if you are not. It was one of five original human statons of Crossfire.

Carved out of the black uranium laced diamond material, it is the home of the military commanders of the Confederate Empire, though it is owned and operated by die Ausgestossenen. Even the most powerful Liberty Death Cannons cannot penetrate this defense. It is one of the first five stations in Crossfire history.

It was first a memorial to the lost heros of the Nomadic Wars carved from one of the chunks of the dead planetary mass from X-3043. Der Bundschuh took it over and converted it into a fully functional Schiffyard. It was the last of five stations first built in Crossfire space.

Class:  Dunkirk
Crew:  Classified
Armament:  Classified



The Pollux has a long and honorable service record dating back 15 years before the Nomadic Wars. She was ordered to stand down for decommisioned 2 years ago but the recent uprising of the Confederate Empire forced the Britonian Military to assign her and her captain back to patrol duty.

Campos is one of the new Outposts of the Liberty Forces. The Liberty government decided to create more Bases for their opperations in the new systems so this Station has been created just a few years ago.

The unique flora of this planet are under study by Kishiro scientists, who are interested in its potential use in new pharmaceuticals.

Diameter:  10,178.3 km
Mass:  4.773 x10e24 kg
Terrain:  archipelago
Temperature:  -22°C/57°C
Escape Velocity:  9.00 km/sec



Briefly an outpost of the CSF, Rodez was liberated by the ASF some 30 years after the Nomad Wars.  Now a trade and recreation hub. Rodez' balmy climate makes it a destination colony.  But even today, shipping is frequently harassed by CSF patrols.

entries.source_text:
Class:  Eden
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  400



Core Station was taken over by corporate interests and turned into a armor plating smelting plant after the forcible eviction of its previous tenants by Alliance forces. This station is not particularly any interest, just another key station of Crossfire ecomonics.

This is the prototype of an experimental Hypergate based on the scans of the original Dom'Kavash hypergate of the Altair sector.
All technical information about this gate are classified. First tests showed that the is not working stable yet.

CLASS: Sanctuary 
GRAVITY: Partial
DOCKING: Yes
AMENITIES: Yes
POPULATION: 400



This research facility has been build by the Gas Miners Guild after GMG scouts have found a gravimetrical anomaly in this system which had energy signatures similar to the scans of the Dom'Kavash Hypergate.
GMG has taken careful security measurments to keep the position of this station secret. The Station itself regulates the energy flow to the new GMG Hypergate nearby while hundreds of scientists run their researches with the task to find out how to control this technology.

entries.source_text: Some Kusari pilot got lost in here with a Kishiro Technologies Technologies Technologies Technologies tech Schiff.  Now Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries is camped out with Ageira looking for some dead god's tools.
There has been a lot of Orden activity around Mars lately.  Word is that they are taking advantage of the lack of government interference in Sol to expand their agenda, whatever it is.

I was talking with some of the Krueger geeks a while back, who told me they think Jupiter's Great Red Spot is caused by a mountain of diamond on the surface of its core.  I wish I had some of what they were drinking.

An old dream come true: To create your own little sun to take out your target. Meltdown guaranteed. Like a fusion reactor it uses hydrogen to start a fusion into heavier atoms and finally burns itself out of existence when no more „fuel“ (read: your target) is available. Handle with care!

Those are in fact little chemical plants. Injected in anybody's bloodstream they will analyze their host's blood and decipher the DNA. Based on that information they start to produce enzymes that will trigger a deadly disease the victims body can't cope with. Pretty effective and what's even better: so far it cannot be neither diagnosed nor treated.

Unlike ordinary handguns these don't need to be actually held in your hand to kill. Just program them on a target, relax and let them do their job. Highly effective, extremely sought after and therefore incredibly expensive.

Neophage weapons are cutting edge weaps technology. Not much is known about that approach to subdue enemies yet. As the -phage part suggests, it's some sort of devouring device. On which principle it exactly works and against what kind of enemies it's supposed to be used is still unknown, but rumour has it that it will eventually be used as a powerful battleSchiff-killer.

Most aliens are dangerous. So are most of their artifacts. Some of them seem to have spiritual powers beyond human understanding. Others are thought to be able to twist both space and time. Be that as it may, fact is that not much is understood yet.

People die of organ failure. That is, poor people die of organ failure. People with enough money just buy new organs. Organ growing and harvesting has become a huge industry since problems with incompatibility have been solved. Because governments like people to believe that everybody is the same and money can't buy you everything, those organs are officially blacklisted.

This material is very experimental. At the current time it is not advisable to get yourself cloned using this stuff. Outcome is highly unpredictable. Renowned scientists say that this is the stuff that will be used in the future to produce exact copies of important persons, though. But renowned scientists once also said that four computers is all the whole world will ever need.

Nothing new here. Nerve toxins were used long before modern chemistry figured out how they work. The various known toxins work in many different ways, from inhibiting respiration to completely shutting down the autonomous nervous system.

Like the name says, nuclear devices are outfashioned. Fission is a science of the past. Rather efficient as nuclear devices may be, the side effects (radiation, fallout) make them difficult to handle and should be taken into consideration carefully. This is the poor man's solution for large problems.

Heavy water is water in which the hydrogen is deuterium, an isotope of hydrogen with the mass of 2 u. While in itself not dangerous, it can be used to produce plutonium, an unstable atom used in nuclear warheads.

A lot of single cell organisms fall under this category. From bacteria thriving on h-fuel to those who are used to modify a planets athmosphere to less useful once that just are a variation of your good old yersinia pestis which carry an ugly form of the plague.

That's what you want if you don't just have a problem with someone, but with a whole planet. It turns the atmosphere of the planet into one huge fireball. The presence of oxygen in the atmosphere enhances the scorching but isn't a necessity. 
Everything that isn't buried deep enough underground will be toasted at roughly the temperature of a hot fusion. 
Take extreme care while handling them near a planet with an atmosphere. Or make sure you're far away.

Everything that's more or less alive or of a biological origin and harmful to the human organism is subsumized in this category. Like infectious waste most of it is just horrible, but like infectious waste it fetches good prices in certain locations.

Plague. Anthrax. Measles. Pox. All those diseases are well known and sometims are still used in warfare. Over the last couple of centuries, others have been added: From aggressive tapeworm eggs to genetically enhanced flu viruses there is a wide range of nasty stuff available.

The perfect bomb if you want something to simply disappear: Drop an antimatter bomb on matter and the long-known equation matter + antimater = nothing proves itself to be true. Your problem has never existed, so to speak. 
Special attention should be paid to the instruction manual when dealing with antimatter bomb components. You definitely don't want the antimatter to come into existence when you're not at least a couple of systems away.

This is such an advanced technology that not much is known about it yet. Quantum bombs are basically not understood in their exact functioning, but they definitely work. Drop one wherever you want nothing to be left and you will be fully satisfied.

Those are ugly little robots, much like the anti-personnel weapons. Killer robots have one big advantage over anti-personnel weapons, though: They cannot be stopped once put in motion. So be sure you really want your target dead before you set your robots loose.

Radiation is what we talk about here. Plutonium for example is extremely radioactive with a half-life period of roughly 150'000 years. It is used for nuclear bombs or so called dirty bombs where the Plutonium is not fissioned itself but being dispersed by a heavy conventional explosion.

Doesn't sound as bad as it is. Blistering agents are a group of chemical weapons which work like a neurotoxin leading to the skin blistering and dissolving, very much like after a severe burning. Since the skin is what protects us from our surroundings, this means your target eventually just dissolves. So far no anti-agent is known.

As the pacific sea serpent toxin from long gone earth, this is a highly effective neurotoxin which hits directly on your brain stem, stopping all unconscious vital functions. Bitten persons die of heart, brain, lung and liver death simultaneously. The toxin is nowadays produced in small clandestines labs all over Sirius since the jeunesse dorée has taken up injecting minuscule amounts of the venom for drugging reasons.

The knowledge of poisonous plants is as old as human history. However, this knowledge has of course boosted when myriads of new plants have been discovered in the new worlds. Forget Poison Ivy and Belladonna, those newly discovered plants do all kinds of weird things to you (death is just one of the more pleasant ones) if you're foolish enough to expose yourself to them.

This is horrible stuff. Anything from dead patients out of hospitals to – well, let's face the ugly truth – feces of different life forms is subsumized in this category. Most of it is contaminated and/or contaminating. 
As stated before: Horrible.

Think piranhas, but much smaller. And many more. Carnivorous insectoids are not bugs. They are flesh devouring little eating machines, getting their energy from their prey. Thus, the more they get to eat, the more active they get. You could call it a vicious cycle. Until now they are not field-tested yet, but labor tests on mice and rat have yielded promising results. Bug spray won't deter them, by the way.

This is the modern day version of Kamikaze. With one significant difference: While Japanese Kamikaze pilots in WWII new what would happen, a bearer of a human bomb implant doesn't. He just goes ahead in his daily business untill the implant is activated and then goes berserk and usually down in a blaze of glory.

Like the carnivorous inectoids, this material eats. However, unlike the insectoids, it does it on a molecular level. Means it eats molecules that are vital to its host, preferrably iron-rich tissues like those found in the liver or the kidneys. Phage is also very small, which makes it suitable to be dispersed as an aerosol among enemy troops.

Like the genetically enhanced bacteria, this categorie of black market good comprises various different organisms. Most of them are not yet fully understood, some have only recently been discovered. Utmost care should be taken when dealing with them. Viroids are not considered a life form, but show some signs of life. They do need a host to reproduce, though. With most of them you should take care not to be that host.

Unlike the better known insulin, inoculin doesn't help the human body in any way. It isn't a hormone either, but a mix of a bacteria and a virus. It's reproduction cycle remains a mistery as of now. The only thing that is known so far is that the human liver plays a vital role in the reproduction of the inoculin. Unfortunately the liver never survives playing that role.

Like old fashioned mutagens as gamma rays or simple oxydants, modern Mutagens trigger mutation. However, unlike the old fashioned mutagens, those will do the trick in seconds, not years or even generations. And they will mutate cells at any stage of the cycle, not only while a cell is dividing. 
Once in a while the mutations are desirable, but you shouldn't count on that to happen. So better keep your hands off them.

An age old technique of warfare, this was used on Earth long before humankind was able to fly, let alone travel in space. Heavy civilian casualties must be expected, though. If you want to watch your reputation you should refrain from this.

Cutting edge technologies like holoviral counterfeiting are usually kept very secret. Not only because they are thought to be vital to the safety of whole nations, but also because a lot of money can be made by keeping a hand on them. 
Stealing or dealing stuff like that will make you very unpopular with most governments, but will get you a lot of new friends amongst the criminal factions.

You're planning an attack? Then that's what you need to attack in the right place and at the right time. Of course, with enough recoinaissance, spying and time you can find that out yourself. But why bother, when you all can buy it on the black market. The high price is surely justified for this kind of information.

Scrambling is used to encrypt radio messages and other means of communication. It basically consists of an algorithm scrambling the outgoing message and another algorithm which reassembles it on the receiving end. Those codes are much sought after and are paid for very much by certain customers.

Agents need to work undercover and out of the light. Still, somebody needs to keep track of their whereabouts and missions. That information is listed in Government Agents lists. Since this lists contain all info about every agent their kept under strictest security measures. Extremels high prices are paid by various interest groups for such lists.
What are the weak points of a station? Where do they stash the liquor? Do they have a decent spa? Those questions and many more will be answered if you manage to get your hands on the blueprints.

The known bases of Sirius and Altair are just a fraction of the existing ones. Most of them don't show up on any map unless you literally bump into them. But those hidden bases are where the most sought after goods are stored and where the most interesting research is conducted. Knowing where they are will make any determined and well armed individual very rich.

The only thing worse than an agent in the midst of an administration or a government is a double agent that you think is working for you, but instead is screwing you. Get your hands on those lists and get rid of the problem. Once and for all.

Just like the the secret industrial research, the stolen industrial secret give a competitor a headstart in the race for new products. There is a drawback to them, though, in that the original proprietor of those secrets already knows that their stolen and likely is putting a lot of money in making sure the secrets are not being sold and/or intensifying its work on bringing the product or ideas in question on the market earlier than the buyer of the secrets.

Militaer secrets can cover a wide range of things: Troop deployments, weapon technology, communication guidelines, virtually anything and all kinds of intelligence. Usually they also contain a lot of decoys and wrong information to get an eventual spy on the wrong track.

Researchers and scientists all over Sirius and Altair have scrutinized and analyzed specimens of all the known alien species, notably Nomaden and Dom Ka'vash. Their findings are not good news and therefore have been classified by authorities in order to keep the public calm.

Know your enemie's new technology before he fully understands it himself. And then, whack him with his own devices. This research data gives you precious insights into your enemies newest developments.

After all the centuries away from Earth, the industry is still the backbone of every economy. Of course there are no more heavy industries like the steel mills of long gone times. Today it's nanotechnology, submolecular chemistry or life-prolonging medicine where the big money is made. And where the most important research is done. One thing that hasn't changed in all those centuries is that corporations are spying on each other to gain an advantage on their competition. Secret industrial research is a high-priced market good and will fetch extraordinary prices at the right place.

Once you are in power of a nation, or at least some minor kind of leader, you don't want to be overthrown by some stupid slob who thinks he can do a better job than yourself. One good way is to put all people who eventually may become a threat to your power under surveillance so once it is necessary you can easily round them all up and imprison them in the nearest sports stadium.

Most government officials are only humans. They make mistakes, mess things up, and so on. All that is listed in those secret files. Possession of such files makes the officials easy prey to all kinds of blackmail and extortion.

Results of the newest experiments on hull and shield technology as well as the most advanced engines are among these secrets. It doesn't need the brain the size of a planet to know how helpfull this knowledge is.

Like the experimentel Schiff research the weapon research has covered a wide ground of improvements. Mixing alien and human technologies have so far yielded the best results, according to rumours. Both range and refire rates are among the parameters that scientists work on.

Basically, troop enhancement means to make soldiers stronger, more accurate and more determined to win. New experiments are trying to outfit soldiers with new senses, or widen the range of existing ones, like adding UV-light to the visible spectrum.

What kind of arms does your opponent have? What are their characteristics, weaknesses, strengths? That is usefull knowledge in case of a conflict and of course it is information an army doesn't like to be known to it's potential opponents.

Financial codes are more or less comparable to a licence to print money. For example, with the right code you can just divert any interest payments from all the debtors of a bank or a government on your own offshore bank accounts. Or direct the payments of one bank to another to your own bank. If you're smart, they won't notice this until it's way too late and you have already bought, say, Wheel of Sirius and outfitted it with an exceptional effective defense system. Then all you have to do is to lean back and enjoy the fruits of your hard work.

Tired of trading? There's an easy way out: With commodity exchange access codes you just make everybody THINK that you are trading. What you actually do is NOTHING, though. It's not easy to explain. Basically the trading computers are talked into doing some transactions on your account while you are at the same time enjoying the surf and a drink on the beautiful beaches of Cortez.

Schlachtschiffs are feared with good reason. Their overwhelming firepower, the enormous hull and their range make them a formidable core of every large space operation. Knowing the exact specifications of a battleSchiff makes defensive plans much more likely to be successful.

Jumpholes are strange things. Not much is understood yet. One theory has it that once you are able to move a jumphole you can move it to a base you don't like and simply send it to the next galaxy, thus sparing you a lot of trouble. And ammunition.

Numerous types of artifacts have been filed, and thousands of reports added. These include inexplicable incidents as well as transcendental experiences people made with artifacts of all kinds. Most governments keep those reports under lock and key in order to keep the public from panicking.

Artifacts are dangerous objects. Like the classified artifact reports lead to believe, they have the strangest powers, most of which are not understood yet. Research has shown that spiritual, transcendental as well as other mindboggingly crazy things might happen anytime with an artifact.

Which troops have which assignment, and how strong are they? And when will they be exactly where? That are some of the questions you wont have to ask yourself anymore as soon your enemies troop assignments are in your possession.

Knowing your enemies plans is the first step to victory. Knowing what your enemy prepares himself for is just as good. Threat assessments are highly classifed documents which will fetch a good price if offered to the right persons.

Every military has it's weak points. Knowing them gives any eventual adversary a huge advantage. Therefore these profiles are kept under utmost safety measures. Stealing, buying or selling them will make the rightful proprietors very, very angry and the thieve very, very rich. Or very, very dead, depending on the outcome.

P-7 Razorback


The Razorback is still an experimental ship. It's sturdy built, the firepower it carries and the massive hull make it an excellent ship to crash enemy defense lines. The downside of this sturdiness is that the Razorback isn't all that agile. But all in all a good vessel for battles.

P-7 Shote


Like it's big brother the Razorback, the shote is still in testing and has not yet reached serial production. While it is faster and slimmer than the Razorback it's also less armoured, making it the perfect choice for quick raids or reconaissance flights but not a ship you want to enter heavy combat with.

P-7 Badger


New hull technology has made the Badger famous among pilots operating close to the borders of known space. Its speed, the strong hull and a large cargo hold make it one of the ships of choice for multi-purpose operations.

Charon


A ship worth every credit. The Charon is an improved design of the Deimos. Pilots returning from battle praise its overwhelming firepower and Smugglers will love the large cargo hold.

Persephone


The Queen of the underwold is the perfect name for this ship. The improvements made on the engine and hull make this one of the most advanced ships available. The Persephone reigns in battles as well as in skirmishes. Despite it's heavy armor it is a fast moving and turning ship.

Bellerophon


The name of the mythical slayer of monsters suits this ship well. Since it's first delivery to various factions it has become a favourite ship in fights against Battleships. The technology draws upon old blueprints found in a wreck, but has been much improved.

Thanatos


New developments in cloaking technology as well as its speed make the Thanatos a very sought after ship for pirates and bounty hunters alike. Like it's namesake, the demon of death of ancient times, it operates best in murky waters and dark nebulaes. The weak hull is more than compensated for by it's ability to evade numerous opponents at the same time.

Lakhesis


Lakhesis was the greek fate who decided how much time mortals had left. The same applies to this ship: Whoever steers it will likely be deciding on whether the pilot of the nearest ship will see the next day or not. Powerful engines, massive hull and an improved steering make sure nobody remains dissatisfied.

Harpy


The Harpy or „Snatcher“ got it's name by the first pilots who tested it. Diving into enemy lines and snatching a single ship out of existence is what the Harpy is designed for. However, after the first snatch, any pilot should steer clear of the ensuing battle, given the rather weak hull.

This system seems to be an alien hub leading to other galaxies. Hundreds of anomalies are spread over this system, many too close to be recognized others with giant dimensions.

More information about this system are not available due to the heavy interferences.
The perfect place to build an interstellar gateway network.

Unlike the small black holes that a spread over the galaxy this one has giant dimensions and an even bigger hunger for matter. Navigation data shows that this must be one of the inner core black holes in the middle of our galaxy. 
It looks like three alien structures use it as energy source.

This Relais Station seems to collect energy from the black hole. Its size and technology exceeds everything the human culture has created. Eventhough the scans show a Dom'Kavash energy signature from the inside, the interferences prevent detailed scans. It is unknown if this station is populated or how it does work. We are not even sure if there are docking bays that could grant access to this masterpiece of technology. The entire station is surrounded by massive energy fields which prevent any close observations.
These are the ancient remains of an alien race which was on a similar technoligical level like the human culture. Everything looks like this civilization got destroyed by nomad forces.

Like nomads the sentinels are slaves. They have been created to serve their masters and fight for them. Dom'Setek designed the first sentinels after they noticed the worth of the nomads for the Dom'Kavash empire.

The Savage were a high-tech civilation long before the Dom'Nepesh started a thousands of years raging war with them. Eventhough souvereign on technological level the Savage lost the war. Today their only reason to survive as race is to fight for the Dom'Nepesh.

The best name our scientists could give to this race was "Warrior" since that is exactly what they are. The Dom'Razak is a civilization that was build by two races. While the Dom'Razak are traders and scientists the "Warriors" due to their nature very soon took over the role of the military. Eventhough both races have their origin on the same planet they developed into totally different directions. But together they are strong.

Ancient Drone



Being produced on the automatic stations of this system these ancient drones serve just one purpose, the defence of this system not knowing that their creators don't exist anymore.

The Ancient Energy Cannon has a graviton generated photon beam that can cause heavy damage to hull and shields. For sure this is just the standard version of this gun and worth to be analyzed more deeply.

The Galactic Hypergate gets his energy directly from a black hole to create a massive hyperspace rift leading to distant galaxies. Eventhough this Hypergate was designed to keep the gateway open due to the constant energy output of the blackhole, it is not possible to travel through the galaxies without adjustment of the energy flow between the gate and its energy relais. Unfortunatly the Dom'Kavash lost the hypergate control to other alien races from other galaxies.

Nike


Victory is what you can expect with a ship like the Nike. Fast, furious and powerful, that's what you get for your credits. The most advanced hull research has been put into this ship, making it a vessel you don't want to encounter if you're not on good terms with its pilot. 
For further defense it is one of the few ships with a turret.

Hellcat


The engineers of this ship named it after an almost forgotten airplane from Earths WWII. Like its namesake, the Hellcat is a very successful design, leaving nothing to wish for. You don't want to meet a Hellcat when its pilot is pissed off.

Wrath


Another newly designed ship, not too much can be said about the Wrath. There are no reports of how the Wrath stands its ground in heavy fighting or in large battles. The stats look good however, and the reasonable price make it a very good choice.

X7A Fyrefly


An old vessel with new features, the Fyrefly is much more than it looks like. The most advanced engine technology makes it faster than most ships and the steering rockets lead to a flight behaviour like that of the insect that gave its name to this ship. If you need to do a dirty job in a short time, this ship is what you want.

Venom Mk I


Poisonous as its larger sister, the Venom Mk I will deliver a painfull sting to any opponent but not last long in heavy combat. This ship is designed for long range ops and surgical strikes.

Venom Mk II
Don't mess with the Venom or you'll soon regret it. Strong hull, radar deflecting wings and 2 high end engines make this a Schiff that is feared by its enemies and loved by its pilots.

Warthog


Don't let yourself be fooled by the ugly name. The warthog is perfectly suited to dive and bury its nose into enemy lines in order to create havoc and spread chaos. Its only weakness is the lack of speed, but that is more than made up by the strong hull.

Bulldog


Once the Bulldog has driven its teeth into enemy flesh it wont let go anymore. Advances in offensive technology make the Bulldog a force to be4 reckoned. Used by several factions for patrolling purposes, it has fast become a „staple“ ship in Sirius.

LCA Thunderstreak


Its 12 engines make the Thunderstreak one of the best suited vessels for long range operations. Due to its massive armor, not much room is left for the cargo hold.

Black Angel
The Black Angel is not a very sophisticated Schiff, but nonetheless it has proveon to be a valuable asset in a number of fleets. It is also called' The Working Mans Workhorse'. No special features or on the edge-technology, but all very reliable and much tested. This Schiff wont fail you.

Crusher ZX7


If you need something to be crushed into little bits and pieces, this is the ship of choice. There's no fooling around with the Crusher: An armor and firepower that are unequaled as well as it's still remarkable manoeuvrability will satisfy even the most picky customer.

Grinder ZX8


The Grinder is the updated version of the Crusher. While the hull was a bit reduced to gain more space for the cargo hold, the other features remained the same, noteably the firepower it delivers and the agility.

Dissolver


The Dissolver is fast and agile but lacks somewhat in regard to firepower. It's vast cargo hold and the reduced firepower makes it a hybrid between a fighter and a freighter. Unlike most freighters it is still remarkably fast and its maneouvrability is even much better than most fighters.

Cyclone


One of the ships built by the Gas Miners in order to push back the pressuring Outcasts and Corsairs. As is usually the case with GMG, they didn't waste time with frills but sticked to the originally idea: Kill the enemy. The result certainly meets the expectations.

Hurricane


Another GMG development, the Hurricane is a long range fighter to kick their enemy's ass where it hurts most: Near their home bases. Not as sturdy as the Typhoon it still carries a lot of firepower and has rapidly become the source of much concern on Ruiz base.

Tornado


Gas Miners are determined fellas and so are the ships they build. Based upon the Typhoon it completely lacks unnecessary gadgets. This is a ship with a message, and the message becomes clear the second its pilot decides to open fire: To put away with everything in its course.

Whirlwind


The smallest of the so-called GMG-storm class ships. A light fighter for reconnaissance and stealth missions, the Whirlwind carries not too much of anything but is the perfect ship to go in and out of a disputed area very fast.

Chinook


Fighter pilots need a ship that fits their needs. The Chinook answers the call by combining both strength and maximal firepower, but falls a bit short when it comes to manoeuverability.

Scirocco


Like the hot wind out of Earth's Africa, the Scirocco certainly delivers a mighty load of heat on any adversary. It is built for the sole purpose of leaving any fight victorious. And it can be said, it lives up to that purpose.

Firebolt


The smaller sister of the Chinook may be a bit less armored but makes that more than up with it's enhanced speed and agility. Deployed in large squadrons it has become a standard ship used by various factions in case of large fights.

Shamal


The Shamal is the third and smallest sister of the Chinook. A no-frills ship like the others in the series, but also a ship which perfectly does the job of hunting down and intercepting intruding vessels.

Rocketmaster


A very heavy Fighter that was based upon blueprints nobody knows where they came from. It's a mediocre ship with no memorable features except the fact that is reliable and rather cheap.

T-Rex


The killing machine among VHF was first built by Outcasts, but very soon the plans were stolen and nowadays this ship is built all over Sirius. Massive, tough and deadly like the largest carnivore ever to roam the Earth. Don't mess with a T-Rex.

J-40 Quicksilver


Like the element it's named after, the Quicksilver is almost impossible to catch. The light frame and hull, supported by a powerful engine, make this light fighter a good ship for quick raids. Do not intend to engage in large battles, though.

Terror


Based upon the Erebus, the Terror was given a new frame and a bit less hull, making it a tad faster. The result is a powerful vessel perfectly suited for battles and massive attacks on stationary objects such as stations or asteroid miners.

Erebus


The Erebus or „Ruler of Darkness“ was an attempt made by the liberty navy to build a ship that could withstand even heavy Dom Ka'vash fire. While it is a reliable ship with solid features, the original goal was not met.

Lobo


The Lobo is well suited for its purpose: to hunt in packs over long distances and to bring down any enemy. Once again, the Corsairs didn't waste time or money on frills when they designed the Lobo. If you're not friends with the Corsairs and meet a pack of Lobos, you know you're in deep trouble.
entries.translation_text:
Lobo


The Lobo is well suited for its purpose: to hunt in packs over long distances and to bring down any enemy. Once again, die Korsaren didn't waste time or money on frills when they designed the Lobo. If you're not friends with die Korsaren and meet a pack of Lobos, you know you're in deep trouble.

entries.source_text:
Tigre


When the Corsairs came under heavy pressure both by the Outcasts and the Bounty Hunters, they threw up the Tigre, a VHF with claws and teeth like the largest of all cats. The ship does it's job of pushing back all intruders perfectly and often is used to patrol the jumphole in Omicron Gamma to prevent Nomad ships from entering Corsair space.
entries.translation_text:
Tigre


When die Korsaren came under heavy pressure both by die Ausgestossenen and the Kopfgeldjaeger, they threw up the Tigre, a VHF with claws and teeth like the largest of all cats. The ship does it's job of pushing back all intruders perfectly and often is used to patrol the jumphole in Omicron Gamma to prevent Nomad ships from entering Corsair space.

entries.source_text:
Ball Lightning
The Ball Lightning is a multi-purpose VHF, built for medium range missions and patrol duty. Sophisticated propulsion and new materials used in the hull make this Schiff a valuable asset for every pilot.

P-7 Marten


Another ship from the P-7-series, the Marten is the weakest, but also the fastest. The Marten is not built for heavy combat but is rather a reconaissance ship designed for speed. Like the animal it derives it's name from, it's a ship that best operates under cover of darkness and stealth. If caught behind enemy lines it can deliver a good fight, but will not serve the pilot very good against numerous enemies.

Goshawk


A small but nonetheless very good ship. The Goshawk is a distant relative of the original and very successful civilian Hawk, but has been completely redesigned. Not much remains of the original Hawk except its speed and agility.

LCA Typhoon
A light fighter for the determined pilot. Fast, agile and still a reasonably strong armor make this Schiff the perfect long range interceptor. The Typhoon is based upon the LCA Thunderstreak but provides less defense power in battles and multi-vessel fights.

Zorro


The smallest of the new Corsair ships, the Zorro is an explorer, but can also used as an interceptor. Better equipped than most light fighters, it still lacks a strong enough hull and the firepower to be a threat for a very heavy fighter, but has been said to be extremely fast.

Cheetah


The Cheetah was originally built by the Junkers to get in and out of battles and skirmishes to prey on loot and wrecks. However, several police forces realized that when modified it is also a good ship to intercept pirates. Several Cheetah squadrons are now in service throughout Sirius.
entries.translation_text:
Cheetah


The Cheetah was originally built by die Schrotties to get in and out of battles and skirmishes to prey on loot and wrecks. However, several police forces realized that when modified it is also a good ship to intercept pirates. Several Cheetah squadrons are now in service throughout Sirius.

entries.source_text:
Telestria


The Telestria is a heavy cruiser that was designed by the ASF right after the exploration of Sol. Unfortunatly one scientist stole the blueprints for this and other ships and sold them to the CSF. The Telestria project was a try to get rid of CSF forces once and forever. Today we know that this plan failed.
Heavily armed this cruiser can deal even with a group of smaller cruisers such as the Midnight Hammer.

Olympus


The Olympus is the counter part to the Telestria. A brave scientist got hold of the blueprints for this incredible cruiser. The Olympus is a masterpiece of technology. Stronger than everything that has been developed so far.

Proton


The Proton class battleship is another stolen project that found it's way to the Confederated Strike Force. Eventhough this ship has less hull then the Olympus the firepower equals its big brother.
entries.translation_text:
Proton


The Proton class battleship is another stolen project that found it's way to the Konfoederierte Eingreiftruppe. Eventhough this ship has less hull then the Olympus the firepower equals its big brother.
entries.suggested_text:
Proton


The Proton class battleship is another stolen project that found it's way to the Konfoederierte Eingreiftruppe. Eventhough this ship has less hull then the Olympus the firepower equals its big brother.

entries.source_text:
Tellurium


The Tellurium is another great development of the ASF forces. Unfortunatly like many other ships the blueprints for this ship got stolen by CSF forces.
This cruiser is less strong than the Telestria class but has enough firepower to be a real danger to all kinds of small ships.

Wizard


The Wizard is a very heavy fighter produced by a secret ASF facility. The ship is very agile and armed with the best guns available. This ship is pure high tech. A CSF version called 'Fatality' has been seen close to ASF space.

Fatality




The Fatality is the CSF's answer to the ASF Wizard. In fact, though the exact circumstances are unknown, many engineers are certain that the Fatality was reverse-engineered from stolen ASF plans. Fast and deadly, the Fatality is a worthy opponent.

Royal


The Royal is the ASF pride. This ship is a combination of massive firepower, agility and a strong hull. This for sure is the king of the ships, that is exactly what the CSF thought when they created their first copy of that ship.

Titus


The CSF Titus' design was converted from plans for the ASF Royal. For a fighter with enough firepower to overwhelm even heavily armed gunboats, it maintains surprising speed and agility.

Bastard


The Bastard is a very heavy fighter with medium agility. It has heavy guns and one turret. 
This and the finest equipment can be a real threat even for experienced pilots. High tech 
combined with solid ship design.
entries.translation_text:

entries.source_text:
Griffin


The Griffin was one of the first experimental ships where nomad technology was combined with a human ship. It is not as strong as other very heavy fighters but it has gained a very good agility which gives a great advantage in combat.

Stormcrow


The Stormcrow is an IMG production that very soon became very favorite all over the central Sirius sectors. Not too expensive, fast and with best equipment this ship is a very good life assurance.

Trident


Trident, Bidents big brother is a heavy fighter at low costs. Eventhough the ship can not mess with very heavy fighters it is an alrounder which can deal with any other danger in Sirius due to its agility.

CLASS: Dunkirk
GRAVITY: Partial
DOCKING: Yes
AMENITIES: Yes
POPULATION: 13400



This shipyard is the pride of the Kusary naval forces. It holds almost half of the production capacities of entire Kusari military. The station has been build far away from every known civilian trade routes to avoid attracting unneccessary attention. Rumors say that next to the ordinary capital ship construction new kinds of military vessels are getting developed here.

New Hongkong is the core region of the traditional chinese culture. The system itself is one of the main production centers of the Koalition. 30% of the  Koalition goods are manufactured in the large station complexes that can be found here.

entries.source_text:
Swashbuckler


This Pirate built ship is fitted with twin Rum dispensers at both 
the bow and stern cocktail bar area. When purchased a crew of 
dancing girls, or male strippers (whatever takes your fancy) will 
make their way to the bar to work for you. Although this ship 
handles quite sluggish, the weapons capability, sheilding, and 
speed of this ship makes it good to fill the hold with plenty of 
doubloons and stolen goods, and have a chance of sailing away drunk 
as a parrot.

entries.source_text:
Butcher


This ship seems to be among the first, which was successfully merged with the Nomad technology. It is equipped with several new technologies and has a modified weapon system which firepower can be very deadly. It is said that the Butcher was conceived in the Edge Worlds - but this statement can not be confirmed

 Although it does not have the best armor, its maneuverability ensures resistance in most battles.

Trailblazer


Another fighter built for recon, the Trailblazer is another 
superior exploration vessel built by Bretonia. It has optimal speed 
as well as unhindered maneuverability to allow to it to escape most 
hostile situations quickly. It also contains sufficient defensive 
abilities that allow it to take on light threats.

entries.source_text:
Shade

 The Shade is equipped with some of the higher class technology, which is mainly suitable for fast and offensive attacks. This ship is marginally faster than most other fighters. With its heavy firepower it can deal enough hits to paralyze or kill the opponent. Then it can leave the fight just as fast as it arrived to avoid further difficulties. 

 It is mainly used for the support and defense of bases and can also be used for some reconnaissance flights.

Werewolf


A true predator, the Werewolf is a deadly opponent on nearly any type of battlefield. It was first constructed as a joint project between Liberty and Bretonia. The Werewolf is considered a potent fighter that has the ability to both outmaneuver it's enemies while giving a punishing blow at the same time. The ship's new design can often intimidate newer pilots to not even engage this ship - which can often ensure a easier victory in some battles. The Werewolf in short, can effectively "maul" any enemy it comes across.

Tiger


This may be a light fighter but there is not many things that are 
"light" about it. Although the Tiger cannot do as many multi-role 
jobs like other Light fighters, it is made mainly for dealing out a 
true torrent of firepower to allow it to make partial or heavy 
damage against enemy fighters or gunboats to allow the VHFs to come 
in and finnish them off. Compensating for it's advanced abilities 
is it's maneuvering. The Torrent loses partial maneuvering due to 
it's newer armor.

Dom'Kavash Bomber
This Bomber presents a perfect balance of animate and inanimate matter. Together they work in harmony to achieve outstanding performance. Revolutionary engine technology allows for increased payload and the addition of armoring growths without sacrificing superior speed. Strafing jets and limited thrust vectoring make the Schiff able to turn surprisingly well considering its mass. Without a doubt, this design specializes in defeating fighter resistance and terrorizing commercial Schiffping.

Lich Nomad Zerstoerer
This Schiff only started to be encountered only a few months ago from a few deep space explorers - many of which did not live to tell about it. The Lich appears to be similar to the original Nomad Korvette. Although this Schiff is more deadly including harder armor as well as even more dangerous weapons as well as equal maneuvering to the Interceptor to allow it to hold it's own in nearly every fight. Avoid contact with this Schiff!

Haunt Nomad Kreuzer
The Haunt is another newer Nomad Schiff that was recently seen ahead of large Nomad fleets. It does have strong armor like other Nomad capital Schiffe and very powerful engines that allow it to shoot through enemy lines and out again quickly. It has been highly recommended by the House and Orden Militaries to destroy these Schiffe as quickly as possible to prevent heavy Nomad attacks.

Kelyrd-ray Projector
There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a plasma weapon and it is dangerous.

Nyses'o Blaster
There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a tachyon weapon and it is dangerous.

Cer'lor Emitter
There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a laser weapon and it is dangerous.

There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a tachyon weapon and it is dangerous.

There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a particle weapon and it is dangerous.

Que-irtor Gun
There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a pulse weapon and it is dangerous.
The Dom'Nepesh Torpedo Launcher is a high tech machinery which seems to be extremly complex but not as efficient as it really could be. We can only hope that the Dom'Nepesh don't find out about that.
Eventhough the Sentinel Torpedo Launcher can be compared with the Dom'Nepesh version it seems to be less complex but still effective. A very dangerous weapon in the hands of such a race.

entries.source_text: Jinan is the largest fuel depot in this sector and delivers this important good to the sectors nearby. Jinan holds a key position to success or failure of military opperations in the nearby systems.
Bengbu is a restricted area. Eventhough the docks can get used by most traders the most areas of this station may not be entered. The reason for this is unknown but there are thousands of rumours.
The Lanzhou Werft is one of the many production facilities for Capital Schiffe. Mainly cruisers and battleSchiff are produced here but from time to time even liners get released from the docks.

The Koalitions-Rogues are a small group of pirates which do their best to disturb the Koalition military operations. Like other criminal organisations the Koalitions-Rogues aim for the big profits of other people. Eventhough they stand no chance against the military power of the Koalition they have learned to survive for many decades.

New Beijing is the home of the chinese population that belongs to the Koalition. Even now these people keep their traditions in this modern times.  The system is highly populated and you can make a good deal at almost all stations.

The asteroid belt is the region of the Solar System located roughly between the orbits of the planets Mars and Jupiter. It is occupied by numerous irregularly shaped bodies called asteroids or minor planets. The asteroid belt region is also termed the main belt to distinguish it from other concentrations of minor planets within the Solar System, such as the Kuiper belt and scattered disc.

entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>A small field of frozen water and oxygen crystals. Such areas are often used to extract water for space stations.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

Shroud


Local scientists have found the plans of several historical ships. One of these Ships was the light fighter Shroud. It was not possible to decode all information about the historical weapons, engines and thrusters because somehow parts of these plans got lost. Therefore some engineers came with the idea to mount modern VHF equipment on this ship. The result is a very agile and deadly fighter.

Ragnarok Esthar Korvette/VHF
The 'Ragnarok' is a ship that blends the lines between Korvette and Jaeger. It is an Esthar design, a workhorse vessel designed to carry equipment and cargo; It's two huge engines producing a massive amount of thrust, and it's variable geometry giving it unparalleled manevuering for a ship of it's class. However, it's heavy armour, potent weapon systems and trademark gauss rifle lend it more than mere survivability, it can duke it out with the best of them and lend serious fire

Much to the consternation of Orbital Spa & Cruise, Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries Industries has filed for a permit to establish a colony on Teltow, to assist in the mining of beryllium in this system, and possibly build a resort for miners to use during their recreation time.

Teplice is a planetary anomaly, in such a close orbit to its sun that its surface has been turned to ash.  Bretonian astronomers believe it will fall out of its orbit into its sun within the next few millennia.

The colonists of the zealot sect who first developed this planet named it Prophecy after unearthing some ancient manuscripts.  Subsequently, many of the original colonists embarked on an expedition to find the "Lost Paradise" described in the texts. Many were killed before they reached their destination, somewhere in Nomad space.  Since that time, Prophecy has become an important commercial center.

Initially established as a listening post, Hope was named for the aspirations of a faction of zealots who originally colonized this system. It has served as a guard post for police and gun runners ever since that time.

The Triangulum space city is heart of Rhinelands military reaserch and training facility for the Rheinland elite pilots. Rumours say that military Schiff prototypes are being developed in the military areas of this station which is far away from every known civilian trade routes deep inside the Utopia system. Eventhough some parts of this giant station are accessible and even run by several commercial companies the main part of it is considered a high security area.

The Bismark was recently build here in Utopia. It is being said that it is full of new Rheinland technology that is going to get tested in the nearby Omega systems. Right now it serves as first and last defence line of the Triangulum Station.

The Dervon System was home of an Ancient race that got destroyed by die Nomaden. Today only automated drones protect the few last stations of this system while the entire population got killed thousands of years ago.

entries.source_text: Die Knappschaft der Gasschuerfer has a few of these Mobile Research Station to scan entire systems for minerals, gases and other rich resources. Drawback in this indeed very effective method is that in combination with the Research Station a command module is required in order to record the data and transmit it to the next KGS station. Somewhere in this system such a command module full of valueable data must exist. It is higly recommended to search it.

The Command Module can in combination with a Mobile Research station scan entire systems in just a few weeks. The received information is getting stored here and sent back to the next KGS controlled Station.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 12,753 km.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 5.98 x 10e24 kg.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Terrestrial</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -46°C to 43°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>FLUCHTGESCHWINDIGKEIT: 11.27 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>3500 years ago Planet Devra was home of a race similar to us humans. The civilisation which we meanwhile call Ancients reached high technological standards long before they decided to expand into the deeps of space. It did not take long for them to use the resources of the nearby planets and to build giant space stations around their homeworld. Still this race was not prepared for the nomads. The first Schiffe trying to leave this system were very soon attacked and giant fleet made sure that the Ancient homeworld had to fall. Surprisingly the space stations were left intact. Until today these stations automatically do their job like thousands of years ago, protected by AI drones.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
Attention Pilot: The Gas Miners Guild needs your help.
Our Scans of this system have lead to the conclusion that the Ancients hold the key to the Hyperspace technology that is currently used by the Dom'Kavash to invade the Altair systems. We have been working for some time to build an own Hypergate in Omega 3. The problem is that there is some data missing and these Ancient drones show hyperspace signatures which let us think that they were build to jump to distant systems. However, we need that information, now. Kill three Ancient fighters, you have to be very close to them to collect the data, then head to the Omega 3 system. You will find one of our hidden Research Stations there.

entries.source_text: The information from the data disk show that die Nomaden expect something to arrive. It is not clear what this could be but it has something to do with a distant sector of the galaxy. You should try to find earth. Talk to a few people, check for interesting news. There must be a hint bringing more light to this mystery.

Major Lorne Franklin, Victory Cruiser.
It's likely that I am the last survivor, all others are dead. Soon, I will run out of fuel. My engines were hit by a green plasma weapon. I don't even know where the gunfire came from. Using my thrusters was my only chance to escape, but now I am stuck here. 
One hour ago I received a transmission from those aliens. It appears to be a standard data package for one of their new satellites. Maybe it is their way of programming those massive stations. The transmission was encrypted but I was able to translate a few words. 'Utopia' and 'Stone'. I wish I had enough time to figure out the meaning of this.

Oh man, that's a suicide mission.
Walter is my name, Hans Walter. To whomever ever finds this message, I will not get out here alive. Tell my wife that I love her. I shouldn't have volunteered for this mission, now I have to pay the price.
A giant gate is just a short distance away from here. I've never come across anything like that before. We stand no chance... we stand no chance.

This is Corporal Lehmann of the former Rheinland Kreuzer Victory. I was able to scan a large satellite right before it was activated. I linked my systems with a panel on the hull and received a stream of data. Pictures, thousands of pictures. Places I have not seen before.  One contained a star cluster, and in the background, there was a field of planetary fragments. This seems to be important. While browsing through the scans, I now see a lot more of them. Oh my god. That's not possible. That's the Utopia system. Rheinland has a military base there.

Impressive, you made it. These information are very valueable for us. Now we can complete the hypergate sequences. If you are want you can go through the gate now. But be aware that we don't know whats behind it. You might even get stuck on the other side and have to find another way out, so it would be good if you check your equipment first before you travel to the other side. We already have sent an expedition fleet through the gate but they have not returned. Maybe you will have more luck. If you find the other pilots, bring them back.

entries.source_text: These jumpgate do not seem to have an external powersource, they take their energy right from the jumptunnel. Power generators probably would not be able to deliver enough energy for travels between the mass rich Inner Core systems.

Energy Crystals are very rare in our galaxy. In Sirius and Altair only very few areas exist where these high energetic objects can get found. However here environment of the Inner Core systems of our galaxy offer good conditions for those crystals to grow. Often they are being used with technology that requires very high energy outputs such as cloak generators.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 18,207 km.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 7.11 x 10e24 kg.</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Ice</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -173°C to 1°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>FLUCHTGESCHWINDIGKEIT: 14.22 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>Ryl is an iceworld drifting around a blue and a green star. entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 8,972 km</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 4.78 x 10e24 kg</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Desert</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -70°C to 50°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>FLUCHTGESCHWINDIGKEIT: 9.75 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Despite possessing a thin atmosphere, this planetoid is rendered uninhabitable by the choking, acrid dust that covers its surface -- in some places to a depth of several kilometers. entries.source_text: The Dom'Kavash Defence Stations are giant energy relais being able to emit high amounts of energy. The effect can be compared with the Ion Cannons that he Koalition does use but is of course much more efficient.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>DIAMETER: 8,972 km</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>MASS: 4.78 x 10e24 kg</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TERRAIN: Desert</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>TEMPERATURE: -70°C to 50°C</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>FLUCHTGESCHWINDIGKEIT: 9.75 km/sec</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TEXT>Despite possessing a thin atmosphere, this planetoid is rendered uninhabitable by the choking, acrid dust that covers its surface -- in some places to a depth of several kilometers. All survey probes have either been swallowed by the dust oceans or ceased functioning shortly after planetfall, presumably due to the nearly microscopic dust particles working their way into the delicate electronics.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: The Rywkim is the newest Battle Station of the Dom'Kavash. It is just a few hundred years old and slightly bigger than the others. The station hold thousands of fighters and even Dom'Kavash Schlachtschiffs can link with it.

The purpose of this station is not entirely known. Like on the other Dom'Kavash stations the access to most areas is restricted. Eventhough this station is heavily armed it does not have any fighter bays. Drokorm appears to remain a miracle.

The theory that Dom'Kavash Schiffe are organism which can operate completly free of control has turned out to be wrong. Like human spacecrafts these Schiffe need pilots which get trained at big military stations. Draghdan is one of those Stations.

Eventhough the Dom'Kavash technology is the most advanced one, the Dom'Kavash never stopped doing researches of any kind to improve their equipment. The Jartltend Research Station is specialized in heavy arms.

The Chralrgha Breeder is a large Schiffyard being specialized for building motherSchiffe. The tentacles of this station are the main production units. Secondary production units can build fighters inside the station.
Mannenth is a deep space research station, scanning the galaxy for interesting objects. When die Nomaden tried to open the Gateway to the Inner Core they linked it with this station.
Kyshfenth belongs to the first stations that were build in the Inner Core Sector. That was thousands of years ago. Over the centuries this station was genetically modulated to fit the changing needs.

Nerllard is the biggest Refinery that the Dom'Kavash ever build in this sector. The amount of resources in the nearby systems and the needs of the empire required such a large station. Still it is not able to cover the full needs of the Dom'Kavash and its miliary in these times of war.

The Rhistis Breeder is a large Schiffyard being specialized for building gunboats. The tentacles of this station are the main production units. Secondary production units can build fighters inside the station.
The Kirrt Outpost very soon developed to be one of the most frequently visited stations in this system. Unlike other Outposts the main objective of this station is commercial success.

Chrazll is the main communication hub in this sector. The station is linked with all other Dom'Kavash stations in this sector and coordinates the entire production process of the space stations nearby.

The Smonkves Breeder is a large Schiffyard being specialized for building cruisers. The tentacles of this station are the main production units. Secondary production units can build fighters inside the station.
This Schiff did belong to the KGS fleet which was sent to the Inner Core some weeks ago. It is not known what happened to the other Schiffe of that fleet but probably they were destroyed aswell.

The Dzerzhinsky Militaer Academy is the number one training area for Koalition pilots. Here they learn how fly fighters, bombers and even Capital Schiffe. The Academy offers countless docking areas for fighters and battleSchiffe.

entries.source_text: The Yinchuan Outpost is located in the Kalinin System far away from the main trade routes but secure from hostile attacks. The system is very important for the Koalition future due to its natural resources and Yinchuan will open the doors to this future.

Gansu is a small size research station here in the Gararin System. Its current objective is to scan the entire system to create detailed maps and locate a hidden jumphole that the nomads used to invade this system.

entries.source_text: Singapore Station is a giant sensor array scanning this sector for nomad activities. Next to that it also is the most dangerous Koalition Station since the risk being detected by die Nomaden in the nearby systems is very high.

entries.source_text: Maskat is a standard trading station of the Koalition. Big sectors are controlled by the military and only serve military purposes. The remaining public areas of the station allow a maximum of commerce with a minimum control.
