entries.source_text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>Gammu is a world populated by robots. It is absoltuly unknown where these come from and what they actually do here. On their chest the words Digital Anvil are printed. Probably they were property of Digital Anvil, but who knows. Be careful when you get offered there finest drink on the bar. That is pure oil.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?><RDL><PUSH/><TEXT>We thought it could get not more curious but this planet is populated by monkeys. Speaking monkeys. No really... they do. It is obvious that somebody is trying to fool us.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

Vodka is composed solely of water and ethyl alcohol with possible traces of impurities and flavorings. Vodka is made from a fermented substance of either grain, rye, wheat, potatoes, or sugar beet molasses.

Vodka’s alcoholic content usually ranges between 35 to 50 per cent by volume; the standard Russian, Lithuanian, and Polish vodkas are 40 per cent alcohol by volume (80 proof).

Historically, this alcoholic-proof standard derives from the Russian vodka quality standards established by Tsar Alexander III in 1894. The Muscovite Vodka Museum reports that chemist Dmitri Mendeleev determined the ideal alcohol content as 38 per cent; however because in that time distilled spirits were taxed per their alcoholic strength, that percentage was rounded upwards to 40 per cent for simplified taxation calculations.

Rum is a distilled beverage made from sugarcane by-products such as molasses and sugarcane juice by a process of fermentation and distillation. The distillate, a clear liquid, is then usually aged in oak and other barrels.

The majority of the world's rum production occurs in and around the Caribbean and in several Central American and South American countries, such as Guatemala, Colombia, Venezuela, Guyana and Brazil. There are also rum producers in places such as Australia, Fiji, the Philippines, India, Reunion Island, Mauritius, and elsewhere around the world.

Light rums are commonly used in cocktails, whereas golden and dark rums are also appropriate for drinking straight, or for cooking. Premium rums are also available that are made to be consumed straight or with ice.

Rum plays a part in the culture of most islands of the West Indies, and has famous associations with the Royal Navy (See: Grog) and piracy (See: Bumbo). Rum has also served as a popular medium of exchange that helped to promote slavery along with providing economic instigation for Australia's Rum Rebellion and the American Revolution.

This repair buoy was deployed by one of the KGS scouts which have passed through the hypergate before. It is able to repair hull damages aswell as damages to all Schiff systems. Make use of it to pass through this area of space.

Ganymede is a satellite of Jupiter and the largest satellite in the Solar System. It is the seventh moon and third Galilean satellite outward from Jupiter. Completing an orbit in roughly seven days, Ganymede participates in a 1:2:4 orbital resonance with the moons Europa and Io, respectively. It has a diameter of 5,268 km (3270 miles), 8% larger than that of the planet Mercury, but has only 45% of the latter's mass. Its diameter is 2% larger than that of Titan, the second largest moon. It also has the highest mass of all planetary satellites, with 2.02 times the mass of the Earth's moon.

Proteus also known as Neptune VIII, is the second largest Neptunian moon, and Neptune's largest inner satellite. Discovered by Voyager 2 spacecraft in 1989, it is named after Proteus, the shape-changing sea god of Greek mythology. Proteus circles Neptune in a near equatorial orbit at the distance of about 4.75 equatorial radii of the planet.

Despite being more than 400 km in diameter Proteus has a somewhat irregular shape with several slightly concave facets and relief as high as 20 km. Its surface is dark, neutral in color and heavily cratered. The largest crater is more than 200 km in diameter. There are also a number of scarps, grooves and valleys related to large craters.

Proteus is probably not an original body that formed with Neptune; it may have accreted later from the debris created when the largest Neptunian satellite Triton was captured.

Miranda is the smallest and innermost of Uranus' five major moons.

It was discovered by Gerard Kuiper on February 16, 1948 at McDonald Observatory. It was named after Miranda from William Shakespeare's play The Tempest by Kuiper in his report of the discovery. The adjectival form of the name is Mirandan. It is also designated Uranus V.

So far the only close-up images of Miranda are from the Voyager 2 probe, which made observations of the moon during its Uranus flyby in January, 1986. During the flyby the southern hemisphere of the moon was pointed towards the Sun so only that part was studied. Miranda shows more evidence of past geologic activity than any of the other Uranian satellites.

Mimas is a moon of Saturn which was discovered in 1789 by William Herschel. It is named after Mimas, a son of Gaia in Greek mythology, and is also designated Saturn I.

By diameter (396 kilometers) the twentieth largest moon in the solar system, Mimas is the smallest known astronomical body that is thought to be rounded in shape due to self-gravitation.

Enceladus is the sixth-largest moon of Saturn. It was discovered in 1789 by William Herschel. Until the two Voyager spacecraft passed near it in the early 1980s, very little was known about this small moon besides the identification of water ice on its surface. The Voyagers showed that the diameter of Enceladus is only 500 kilometers (310 mi), about a tenth of that of Saturn's largest moon, Titan, and reflects almost all of the sunlight that strikes it. Voyager 1 found that Enceladus orbited in the densest part of Saturn's diffuse E ring, indicating a possible association between the two, while Voyager 2 revealed that despite the moon's small size, it had a wide range of terrains ranging from old, heavily cratered surfaces to young, tectonically deformed terrain, with some regions with surface ages as young as 100 million years old.

Iapetus occasionally Japetus is the third-largest moon of Saturn, and eleventh in the solar system, discovered by Giovanni Domenico Cassini in 1671. Iapetus is best known for its dramatic 'two-tone' coloration, but recent discoveries by the Cassini mission have revealed several other unusual physical characteristics, such as an equatorial ridge that runs about halfway around the moon.
The Dom'Nepesh Torpedo is a high tech machinery which seems to be extremly complex but not as efficient as it really could be. We can only hope that the Dom'Nepesh don't find out about that.

Suleos orbits together with Ingetia Planet Galan. It is a rocky moon formed in volcanic upheavals that have long since stilled and grown cold.
Mineral surveys indicate rich deposits of gold 24km below its surface.

Mass:  6.12 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  archipelago
Temperature:   7°C/161°C
Escape Velocity:  11.83 km/sec



Sekeos is a very hot world full with toxic gases and high vulcanic activities. 
This very large moon is the complete opposite of its cold brother Gallus.
It is suspected that Sekeos was formed close to the center of the Tarsus system and slowly moved outwards until being captured by Gallus' gravity.

Until now no detailed mineral scans were made.

Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -240°C/-270°C

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1037.2 km
Mass:  102 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Archipelago
Temperature:  -40°C/-10°C
Escape Velocity:  3.12 km/sec



Eventhough just a bit smaller than Planet Shadun this large moon is much lighter. Its small iron core can not create a magnetic field strong enough to protect its surface. Girods orbit close to the asteroid field has caused thousands of impacts. Many of the craters are relative young.

Terrain:  Archipelago

Diameter:  510.2 km
Mass:  104 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Archipelago
Temperature:  -80°C/140°C
Escape Velocity:  3.82 km/sec



Large areas of Rildims surface are covered with a thick layer of ice. However this small moon is still geological active. Parts of the moon are free of ice and large vulcanos emit high amounts of deadly gasses.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1122.2 km
Mass:  119 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Archipelago
Temperature:  -20°C/40°C
Escape Velocity:  3.32 km/sec



Hinar is a dry but habitable moon orbiting Planet Orestes.  On the ground of the deep valleys and cannons small water lakes allow the survival of primite life. The amount of oxygen in the atmosphere is low but not critical.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  990.8 km
Mass:  1.119 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  11°C/22°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Tongha is a medium sized moon used by the ALG as the repository for unstable industrial waste. The amount of stored waste is so high, that they have irredeemably contaminated more than 80% of this moon’s surface.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  221.8 km
Mass:  229 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -240°C/-270°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec



Inair is one of three small, icy moons that orbit Planet Skye. Despite having rich mineral deposits of Cobalt ore, this moon and its two brothers, are marked in navigation systems as too dangerous for any mining operations due to the instability of Planet Skye.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  201.1 km
Mass:  219 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -210°C/-251°C
Escape Velocity:  2.16 km/sec



Stotur is the second of Skye's three icy moons. The Rheinland Government forbids landing on this moon. This action was taken after they lost an entire exploration expedition as the result of an unexpected shift of ice layers. Another lost opportunity due to the instability of Skye.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  232.4 km
Mass:  228 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -191°C/-228°C
Escape Velocity:  3,25 km/sec



Cerer is the last of three icy moons orbiting Planet Skye. All accessible records are sealed and have been marked as confidential. Because Bretonian navy transport ships were observed on multiple occasions, it is highly possible that there are hidden military installations in the area.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  221.3 km
Mass:  0.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



The large moon Endvori, that orbits the water-rich planet Legacy, has from the beginning been a candidate for terraforming projects.  Because of the dry surface of this moon scientists and engineers are still looking for an economic means of transfering water from Legacy to Endvory.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1191.8 km
Mass:  1.215 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -111°C/-15°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Raktano is rich in resources of very different kinds: metals, hydrocarbons, even łHe was found in huge amounts.  So the idea of building an orbital ring with several facilities around planet Legacy - similar to  Wheel of Sirius - was born.  However, until now, this project lacks funding because it is in competition with the terraforming project on Endvori.

Diameter:  790.8 km
Mass:  1.201 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -111°C/-54°C
Escape Velocity:  3.14 km/sec



A desert moon that is uninhabitable due the strong sandstorms that are capable of destroying anything on the surface. Planetform, Inc. investigated terraforming possibilities here, but they soon discovered that such a project is far beyond the capabilities of current human technology.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  181.3 km
Mass:  2.413 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  42°C/78°C
Escape Velocity:  2.37 km/sec



The moon Irninas became famous for its very dense magnetic field. Plans to tap this field to produce energy were abandoned due to lack of funding. The idea was to create a giant dynamo by wrapping this moon with giant copper cables.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1147.2 km
Mass:  2.742 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -50°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.57 km/sec



This is a barren, dark moon with a thin atmosphere. The CSF use to have well hidden bases here for a very long time. Today you will only find the ruins of the bases and countless ASF and CSF shipwrecks. The battle for Yerih lasted for almost three weeks with both sides suffering heavy casualties.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1221.8 km
Mass:  229 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -215°C/-270°C
Escape Velocity:  2.17 km/sec



Enhwar is a medium sized moon used by the major houses of Sirius as training ground for their space troops. Unlike Iaentha, here there are training facilities and huge special complexes that offer many different training scenarios, which are necessary for the teaching of many different types of fighting tactics. Every member of the houses special assault teams spend a few long months here.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1844.2 km
Mass:  1.442 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  50°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  6.11 km/sec



Scientists are still not sure if Emoth orbits Planet Gorm or if the reverse is true. Emoth’s atmosphere and surface have good potential for terraforming and thus Planetform, Inc. has it on their list of possible future projects.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1211.8 km
Mass:  1.114 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -51°C/12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.41 km/sec



Wiest is a medium sized moon, which orbits Planet Samos along with its small brother Banhona. Wiest has an arid surface, on which there can be seen water trails, which indicate there were large bodies of water in the past. Scientists from New London have tried to find the cause for such a serious change. One theory speculates there may have been a solar eruption from the central sun, which struck Wiest just as its shadow covered the Planet Samos. While Wiest died during this cataclysm, its position saved Planet Samos from the same fate.

Wiest is a medium sized moon, which orbits Planet Samos along with its small brother Banhona. Wiest has an arid surface, on which there can be seen water trails, which indicate there were large bodies of water in the past. Scientists from New London have tried to find the cause for such a serious change. One theory speculates there may have been a solar eruption from the central sun, which struck Wiest just as its shadow covered the Planet Samos. While Wiest died during this cataclysm, its position saved Planet Samos from the same fate.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  691.1 km
Mass:  719 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -111°C/-2°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Banhona is a small barren moon in low orbit of the Planet Samos. Its surface appears burnt and inhospitable, but there are indications that there is more to Banhona then meets the eye. Bretonia Police patrols have reported more Xenos container depots in this area, but they have never noticed any Xenos ships. Rumors say that Xenos are preparing to build their new base somewhere in this system and Banhona is a hot candidate for the future location.

Hesam is a large barren moon orbiting Planet Mysorge. Some time ago, IMG performed deep scans, which revealed large deposits of iron ore. Under normal circumstances, extensive mining operations would already have started, but the Outcasts strong presence in the surrounding area has seriously delayed these plans.

Diameter: 1247.2 km
Mass:  1.742 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  50°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



"Ruskel is second of Ortega's two moons. Unlike Kimeny, embryonic biological life exists here. Moss covers the greater part of the surface, and there are visible signs of the presence of abundant water sources. The Bretonia government imposed quarantine on Ruskel pending the results of a comprehensive study of the present microorganisms.
<<<< QUARANTINE - BIOHAZARD DETECTED >>>> "

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  5847.2 km
Mass:  2.742 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -150°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



This large moon orbiting Planet Teltow didn’t offer anything special until a small Nomads base was discovered. Battleship Reliant was "lucky enough" to track the low energy signature from the base, but the Nomads launched a heavy counter-attack and the Reliant destroyed. However, intelligence about the base had been successfully transmitted. A few days later, a small Order fleet jumped to the location and engaged the Nomads, destroying their base and numerous ships.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  9456.4 km
Mass:  4.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/50°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



"Tonkai is an Earth-like world with oceans of water and oxygen atmosphere, it orbits planet Ghai along with two other moons. It appears inhabited by Nomads that have installations around the ocean shores, probably breeding facilities or resource bases. It also has structures that do not belong to the Nomads, probably Dom'Kavash origin, that appear to be still active. The Coalition has planned to nuke these installations to disrupt the Nomads war machine, but the operation is delayed due to Nomad and Dom'Kavash forces operating in the system.

<<<< WARNING - NOMAD POPULATION DETECTED >>>>"

Mawor is a secluded icy moon isolated in Mandar space and is overrun by hordes of Nomads within this system. If you've any wits about you, you won't dare stray too close, for only a few have survived this harsh space in Mandar.

Terrain:  Dessert

Composed of only sand and rocks, Nocha could serve the Coalition as a forward base, but it looks like phantoms from Moorn are here as well.  Authorities decided that this moon, like the planet that it orbits, should be avoided.

Something odd is going on here, four moons orbiting a small planet appears unnatural.  It looks like someone has placed them here and synchronized theirs orbits.  Coalition scientists have a small field base here for gathering survey data.

Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -51°C/57°C
Escape Velocity:  6.36 km/sec



"It appears that this Otjo moon had a dense population in the past, scans revealed more ruins of huge cities with massive complexes.  However, scanners detected very high levels of radiation there.  What happened to cause this is unknown and we can only hazard a guess.

<<<< DANGER – HIGH RADIATION DETECTED >>>>"

Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Estani looked like an empty, uninteresting, small moon until an entry to a larger underground complex was located on its surface.  A survey of the complex just started, but already the first results show that the builders of the complex were an extremely old civilization.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1327.3 km
Mass:  1.713 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Iairt is a sandy moon orbiting planet Quaila.  It has an atmosphere of carbon dioxide and is unable to support life in its current state.  It can be terraformed, but due to its location this operation might not be worth the effort.  On the surface of the planet, a Coalition automated research module has been deployed in order to overwatch Quaila’s indigenous population, but only Coalition engineers know how this complex works in such conditions, as it seems that sandstorms on the planet can easily disrupt electronic equipment.

Mass:  1.213 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  51°C/84°C
Escape Velocity:  2.98 km/sec



Tontpol is medium-sized moon containing various rare minerals and ores below its surface.  The Coalition has almost completed preparations for mining operations here.  On the surface, they recently built the first defensive platforms, which should guard mining sites against the Nomads.

Diameter:  251.1 km
Mass:  259 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -199°C/-267°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec



Eryl's position reminds you a bit of Earth's Moon.  Unlike the Moon though, it contains huge amounts of frozen water.  If anytime in the future, habitable Planet Eniwetok which Eryl orbits, is settled, it will be a perfect source of water for a newly built coalition colony.

Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -145°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  4.17 km/sec



Skelrsul is unwelcoming to humans due to the lack of water.  However, this moon has wide canyons where scarce water patches were detected that are providing a good environment for the genesis and existing of a primitive life form, like bacteria.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1787.2 km
Mass:  1.942 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  37°C/247°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



Engady surveys have not shown even the slightest signs of life here.  This sterile moon is full of heavy metals from which radiation is present everywhere on the surface.   Some of these metals have an extraordinary importance for the production of special alloys forming the hull of space ships, but prior to any mining here, the minors will needed to resolve the need for an automated, unmanned mining system.  Humans can survive here only when they wear heavy anti-radiation-suits.

Coalition explorers, which landed here, found huge unnatural craters, sintered pieces of land, disruption of gravity and places with extremely high radioactivity. What happened here to cause three moons to be ripped out of their original orbit remains a mystery.

Isqua had met the same fate as Quarile and Eleusis. With the changed orbit came violent earthquakes, climate change and now this moon is  dead with most of its surface covered by ice and igneous rocks.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  327.8 km
Mass:  289 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -221°C/-255°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec



This icy moon's core is composed of solid iron. This, unfortunately, determines Novara's moon fate. The strong magnetic field, which Novara produces, works like a magnet pulling this moon closer and closer. Approximation is a very slow process which however will one day end with a colossal collision. When that happens, no one will want to be close to this place.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  5290.8 km
Mass:  3.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -144°C/-18°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Onew, which is now a dead and very cold moon, was once one of the few populated worlds in this system. There are still numerous ruins visible which are now covered with a solid layer of ice. Maybe that fate, which met this moons brother Osrad, had also something to do with the extreme climate observed here.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1410.8 km
Mass:  1.119 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -51°C/-12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



On first look Osrad is only one of the many unstable moons with strong volcanic activity and an atmosphere filled with volcanic ash. A second glance however revealed very strong, unnatural radioactivity. Normally this would’ve remained a mystery, but on the planet surface  a weak signal stream identical to these used by Dom'Kavash motherships was detected. It is reasonable to assume that one of their ships crashed here.

Normally this would’ve remained a mystery, but on the planet surface  a weak signal stream identical to these used by Dom'Kavash motherships was detected. It is reasonable to assume that one of their ships crashed here.

Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -140°C/-220°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec

Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec

Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  71°C/98°C
Escape Velocity:  3.38 km/sec



Scanning performed on this moon revealed that Essasho was once a terrestrial world with limited sources of water. Because there are now only ruins, arid steppes and deserts, it is safe to presume, that there was a need for continuous shipment of water.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1290.8 km
Mass:  1.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -151°C/-12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Gosul, like the Planet Portlad which it orbits, is very far from the usual routes in this system. First human ship, which had the chance to scan them, revealed that Gosul have on its surface, tiny traces of energy signatures which may be linked with Dom Kavash. Further scanning was not possible due a sudden significantly stronger Dom Kavash presence in nearby.

Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -151°C/-12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec

<<<< WARNING - BIOHAZARD DETECTED >>>>"

Diameter:  3750.8 km
Mass:  1.277 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -21°C/-32°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Long-range scans revealed that this moons whole surface is apparently artificial as metal plates cover it.  The thin atmosphere pulsates with energy and overall energetic output is far beyond anything build by humans.  All findings indicate that the Nomads transformed Raymim into a gigantic factory.

Ice, stone and volcanoes covers the surface of Draenth, a moon orbiting Planet Horath.  The survey found old traces of extensive mining, but despite exhaustive research completed by the Order during the Nomad War, they never determined the commodity mined.

Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -44°C/210°C
Escape Velocity:  4.17 km/sec

Terrain:  barren

Diameter:  2456.4 km
Mass:  2.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -51°C/57°C
Escape Velocity:  5.36 km/sec



Large oceans and an atmosphere rich with oxygen content makes this moon of Galosa, a candidate for colonization.  There is only one possible problem and it is that the Order suspects that the Nomads could have a small hidden base here.  A detailed scan was initiated which has not been completed.

Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  10°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



On Tiaqueo, which is the second moon of Galosa, there is continual strong volcanic activity.  There are also huge areas with high content of titanium. Kruger at one time started mining there, but this attempt ended in disaster after a unforeseen violent volcano eruption.

Fluchtgeschwindigkeit:  5.17 km/sec



On Tiaqueo, which is the second moon of Galosa, there is continual strong volcanic activity.  There are also huge areas with high content of titanium. Kruger at one time started mining there, but this attempt ended in disaster after a unforeseen violent volcano eruption.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  2121.3 km
Mass:  1.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  31°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.78 km/sec



All indications are that Imera is a habitable moon whose atmosphere has the correct balance for humans.  Coalition xenobiologists did extensive research here, but as of now, they have not found any signs of the dangerous microorganism that is on Planet Xiamen, around which Imera orbits.

Escape Velocity:  5.37 km/sec



Nalineo is a volcanic moon that has an atmosphere filled with tons of volcanic ash.  Micrometeorites from the surrounding asteroid field rain down on it continuously. It is not safe to even fly close to this moon, and attempting to landing here is asking for a quick death!

Diameter:  1941.2 km
Mass:  2.242 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -23°C/214°C
Escape Velocity:  4.87 km/sec



Ranan is a cold, rocky world orbiting planet Tibet. Low temperatures, rough terrain, lack atmosphere or inert gases and complete lack of water prevent the existence of any life. It may have any valuable resources, but geological research needed to confirm their presence is pending due to the Nomad and Dom'Kavash hazard.

Yerndyn is, like its red brother Weash, a rich source of raw materials for the Coalition colony in this system.  Besides the frozen water found here, there are rich sources of titanium ore, which has made this moon exceptionally important.

Diameter:  4290.8 km
Mass:  1.919 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -145°C/-11°C
Escape Velocity:  5.44 km/sec



Vesdyna is a large, rocky and lifeless moon orbiting Planet Ningxia with nothing special to offer. This changed when two coalition transport ships disappeared while in moon orbit.  Because Coalition Rogues were spotted in this remote area, the Coalition Military decided to build multiple scanning platforms equipped with long-range sensors on Vesdyna's surface.

Diameter:  1022.2 km
Mass:  119 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Archipelago
Temperature:  -20°C/40°C
Escape Velocity:  3.32 km/sec



Theres is a large moon orbiting planet Balboa. It appears to have oceans of water and thus may be habitable. Unbeknown to the Coalition, Coalition Rogues from Chkalovsk Rogue Base nearby have long-term plans on deployment of a hidden settlement on Theres in order to have an evacuation point should Chkalovsk be found by Coalition forces and overrun.

Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



Stuald is another moon of Eleusis. While Irvor is a Coalition SpetzNaz (Special Purpose forces) training ground, Stuald offers a weapon test and development area.  It is the place where the 10G42-fighter gun, now known as the Coalition Gatling, was developed and tested to become a main weapon of Fighter Corps.

Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -141°C/-5°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Ildale is the sole moon orbiting planet Kazakh. It is rocky world with canyons and a bit higher background radiation that implies Uranium ore. Coalition has plans for deploying surveying and mining operations, but they are pending due to possible Nomad threat and Rogues presence. Rogues appear to have an eye on it too, due to the need of Uranium for Achinsk Station's reactor.

This moon orbiting Planet Medina contains large deposits of heavy metals. They are also reason why is this moon uninhabitable and mining is done by automated mining machines. On surface is only one small control station where is in short periods changed maintenance staff. Rumours say that the service at this station is considered a punishment for these which are deemed as expendable.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1561.7 km
Mass:  1.349 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -132°C/45°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



"Rothveru's ridges and mountains are rich in various ores and minerals. A couple of mining colonies are deployed there. These colonies use prisoners as the labor force, thus landing is restricted only to authorised military personnel. Colonies are well-protected from both outbreak and outside attack, due to dangerous criminals inside and presence of Coalition Rogues outside. Any ship entering atmosphere without permission will be swiftly destroyed by powerful anti-air batteries, and any riot inside will be subdued by any means necessary — including up to using weapons of mass destruction. No one has ever escaped Rothveru's labor camps, so the Rogues hope to intercept prisonships before they reach this place.

<<<<WARNING: ACCESS RESTRICTED TO COALITION MILITARY SHIPS ONLY! ALL TRESPASSERS WILL BE TERMINATED WITHOUT WARNING!>>>>"

Mass:  2.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/78°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Alekimi is a moon that is covered in rocks and sand. Research made by Coalition Fund of Scientists shows that life existance is impossible due to lack of rainfall and therefore dismal atmosphere. However the rocks which are not covered by sand appear to have a content of valuable metals but it is too sparse to consider mining it.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1290.8 km
Mass:  1.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -151°C/-12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



The Coalition is very interested about Aughlbel due to its stable surface and strategically positioned near the Trade Lane linking Er Riad and Yakutsk. This moon is the perfect place where military bases, facilities producing defensive platforms, and space-sensors, can be built .  Aughlbel could be in the near future, the main Coalition military base in this system.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  2456.4 km
Mass:  2.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/50°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



Banrpaer is the second of Abadan's two moons. While there are plans to build military installations on Aughlbel, Banrpaer is an ideal candidate for colonization due to its breathable atmosphere and large water sources. With a military base and separate colonized planet the Coalition can finally secure this system and eliminate local rogues plaguing Nedjef space. This can also open a way for mining activities in local asteroids fields rich in minerals important to the space Industry.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  3221.3 km
Mass:  2.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  51°C/78°C
Escape Velocity:  2.58 km/sec



Schotia is a moon orbiting planet Damaskus. It's a barren, desert world, with little water and conditions unable to sustain anything bigger than primitive life forms. Big rocky canyons can be seen on its equator that can be the result of severe asteroid hits. Said canyons can contain valuable resources, so Coalition considered terraforming Schotia and starting a mining operation. However, Coalition Rouges that roam Meschhed pose a serious threat for the project. Rumors say they themselves either have an eye on Schotia or even have a hidden base somewhere on the surface or under it.

Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  51°C/78°C
Fluchtgeschwindigkeit:  2.58 km/sec



Schotia is a moon orbiting planet Damaskus. It's a barren, desert world, with little water and conditions unable to sustain anything bigger than primitive life forms. Big rocky canyons can be seen on its equator that can be the result of severe asteroid hits. Said canyons can contain valuable resources, so Coalition considered terraforming Schotia and starting a mining operation. However, Coalition Rouges that roam Meschhed pose a serious threat for the project. Rumors say they themselves either have an eye on Schotia or even have a hidden base somewhere on the surface or under it.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1344.8 km
Mass:  1.249 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -51°C/44°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Rhuaugh is one of two moons orbiting planet Ryl. It's a world of dust, sand and rocks. Something could surely live here if not for the moon's atmosphere consisting mostly of carbon dioxide that conserves temperature and keeps this place burning hot - unlike another Ryl's moon, Nyskel. However, traces of some kind of terraforming gas was detected, meaning that terraforming was attempted here, probably for some resources this moon may harbor. But it seems like the terraforming project was abandoned for some reason.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1122.2 km
Mass:  119 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -120°C/21°C
Escape Velocity:  3.32 km/sec



Nyskel is another moon that orbits around planet Ryl. It is a polar opposite to Rhuaugh in terms of its enviroment: while Rhuaugh is a desert, Nyskel is covered with glaciers, with an atmosphere that is unable to sustain a high temperature. Just like with Rhuaugh, it seems like there was an attempt to make this place habitable, probably because of found resources, but it was abandoned.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  3221.3 km
Mass:  3.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Raner, a burning hot world of rocks and sand, is a moon orbiting planet Brurr. Ridges and canyons on its surface can be seen from space. The Temperature never gets lower than 100 Celsium degrees, which prevents existence of any life. One of reasons for such hellish conditions is an atmosphere consisting entirely of methane. The lack of oxygen prevents any explosion of it, however, its presence implies that Raner once had a population of carbon-based lifeforms. But it appears some sort of cataclysm (either because of natural or unnatural events) happened and Raner became what it is today; a dead and desolate desert.

Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  41°C/74°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Oldtur appears it was once a place with many mining facilities. All of these are today only ruins, but their extraordinary sizes and the number of locations suggest that this moon was once an important source of raw materials for the Dom Kavash.

Diameter:  290.8 km
Mass:  0.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -151°C/-12°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Whole surface of Chrodd's second moon is covered by sand and upon first look appears completely without any life. It was a huge surprise, when scanning revealed a small, circular rocky place with a tower like building on it. Who built a building that is more than 300 m high on the moon such as this, as well as its purpose, remains a mystery.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1290.8 km
Mass:  1.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -144°C/-7°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



">>>WARNING!!<<<<

Although Kelengi is agglomerated from asteroids and rocks from the Chros field and the Crydiss cloud and therefore very instable, the Sentinels, which operate a base nearby, have constructed different facilities on it. Officially the purpose is unknown. But there are reports that several human vessels were lost in Celldra, especially near Kelengi. This and the observed Dom`Kavash-missions into this area fed rumors, that the Sentinels have established a new kind of warfare based on electronic assaults to the ship-computers. Pilots in this area should pay attention to this and leave immediately!"

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  3540.8 km
Mass:  2.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -111°C/-18°C
Escape Velocity:  3.47 km/sec



Like its planet Peltctor, the moon Kalny is still growing due to impacts from the surrounding asteroids, but even faster. Scientists have calculated, that in about 3000 years Kalny will have the same mass as Peltctor and this will have a big influence on the orbit of its second small moon Endir. The most probable scenario is, that Endir then will be swallowed by Kalny.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  221.8 km
Mass:  229 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -212°C/-244°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec



Rich with frozen water, the small moon Endir had its origins somewhere out in the Crydiss cloud and was caught by Peltctor’s gravitational pull. As the past of Endir is still unknown, its future is not. One day it will be swallowed by the large and still growing moon Kalny and therefore provide it with water. Nevertheless, the conditions in the Crydiss cloud are so harmful, that only low lifeforms could ever exist here.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1661.5 km
Mass:  1.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -121°C/41°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Enthessi is a medium-sized moon that orbits planet Gunnild.  Energy signatures detected on the surface of the planet are from an alien origin.  Those signatures indicate that there is a small installation with a powerful subspace transmitter.  Enthessi might have been used as an overwatch and control post over a Nomad breeding colony on Gunnild.  It seems to be an automated facility, as it does not respond to calls and moon itself has no landing area.

Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -111°C/-22°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Kelusk is just like the Nevada desert on the planet Earth; dusty, barren, and not much going on. But, because its partnering moon has such a massive magnetic field, it is bound to end up colliding with the other moon over time.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  2511.2 km
Mass:  2.541 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -70°C/147°C
Escape Velocity:  5.87 km/sec



Despite the missing atmosphere the Dom'Kavash established several colonies covered by giant domes on the moon Umchea a long time ago. In the beginning of the wars with the other alien-factions these colonies were given up. In their hate against Dom'Kavash this moon was the target of several nuclear-strikes, one bomb for each of the colonies. Scanners still show relics of the destroyed technical infrastructure.

Diameter: 411.5 km
Mass:  0.813 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  31°C/84°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



When the first human exploration ship passed this moon Ageinn, the myth tells, its captain called it "Dune". In fact there is nothing than desert with giant rocks on it. Nothing, even no atmosphere. That's why until now no effort was made to gain more information about Ageinn.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  2290.8 km
Mass:  1.719 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -11°C/32°C
Escape Velocity:  3.74 km/sec



Sayfild is the only celestial body in Ryssk with an atmosphere dense enough to support higher lifeforms. Scanners show artificial structures beneath Sayfild's dusty surface, which prove that there was a Dom'Kavash colony a long time ago. It seems that this colony was abandoned due to the invasion of Warriors and Dom'Razak into this system.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1270.8 km
Mass:  1.201 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -101°C/-21°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



The moon Therit was the biggest supplier of energy crystals in Ryssk. In contrary to the other crystal-fields in Venn, Rhuntath, Dras and Zhiklor, all crystals in Ryssk were somehow agglomerated on the surface of Therit. Since the Dom'Kavash have mined nearly all of those energy crystals, the surface now has another color than historical pictures the Dom'Kavash have shown to our scientists. Long ago this moon glittered in different red colors and it was possible to see this beauty from one astronomical unit distance with naked eye.

Terrain:  Dessert

Diameter:  1550.1 km
Mass:  1.277 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -112°C/-7°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Smolae orbiting planet Nosl is a medium-sized moon. The Dom’Kavash have set up mining here as rich deposits of Cobalt and other ores are in abundance. This seems to be one of the sources of their ore that integrates with the organic material to make their ships.

Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -231°C/-269C
Escape Velocity:  2.77 km/sec



This moon is on the far edge of this system and it appears to be even more icy cold and insidious as normal icy moons can be. If you dare to venture there and collect water then be sure you take some thermals with you!

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1521.3 km
Mass:  3.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  37°C/84°C
Escape Velocity:  2.38 km/sec



Ineev is a desert moon with an atmosphere with traces of carbon monoxide.  Additionally, the scans were unable to identify the composition of the desert’s dust as well.   Since it orbits with one side permanently facing Planet Yic, larger craters are visible on the leading hemisphere where the impacts would be more frequent and violent, then those on the trailing hemisphere.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  3456.4 km
Mass:  2.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -57°C/51°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



"Rotating on a stable orbit around planet Falum, Taslunt has Earth-like conditions and is clearly inhabited by Dom'Kavash, as indicated by the lights on its surface. However said lights don't cover much of planet surface and are primarily located near the shores of seas and oceans. The purpose of the Taslunt settlement is unknown as landing is prohibited and the moon has none of the docking equipment like docking rings or mooring fixtures, but it may be either a mining or recreational colony.
<<<< WARNING - DOM'KAVASH POPULATION DETECTED >>>>"

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  227.8 km
Mass:  239 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -240°C/-270°C
Escape Velocity:  2.14 km/sec



"Esagee is frozen icy world orbitting planet Sampol. It, however, has some sort of energy signatures at a relatively shallow depth below the surface, some of them identical to Dom'Kavash Defence stations. Whatever is there — be it a prison colony, top secret research laboratory, military base, government vault or all of the above — Dom'Kavash don't want anyone to even land on it.

<<<< WARNING - DOM'KAVASH POPULATION DETECTED >>>>"

Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -40°C/44°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



"Kimish was, as indicated by numerous city ruins, once populated. Now this moon atmosphere is filled with very aggresive microorganism and the whole surface is covered by some form of protoplasma. Some human scientists think that the Dom Kavash in the far  past used this moon for biological experiments which have gone too far.

>>>>WARNING! BIOHAZARD DETECTED!<<<<"

Mass:  1.227 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -144°C/-27°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Gharay is medium size moon orbiting Planet Dusiss. Crystals containing titanium and iron cover the majority of the surface. This, in combination with the strong and frequently occurring magnetic storms, makes this moon a death trap for anyone foolish enough to land here

Fluchtgeschwindigkeit:  5.17 km/sec



Duough is one of the two moons orbiting Planet Nohrd. Its atmosphere is filled with volcanic ash and detected volcanin activity was evaluated as too dangerous, like on Lais, for starting any kind of exploration on the surface.

Temperature:  150°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



The moon Hineldu, that is in orbit of Quondash, has a thin and hard crust.  Scanners show a composition that led to the conclusion that this moon was captured by the gravitational field of the Quondash at flyby.  Its origin is unknown.

Diameter:  287.8 km
Mass:  289 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Ice
Temperature:  -231°C/-258°C
Escape Velocity:  2.17 km/sec



Covered with carbon dioxide ice and carved throughout with huge canyons, the Hadyn orbits planet Noyging.  Scans have revealed a rich jumble of several different kinds of metals under the icy surface.  Therefore, it seems illogical that there are not any signs of mining activities by Dom'Kavash.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  4288.1 km
Mass:  4.219 x 10e23 kg
Terrain:  barren
Temperature:  -11°C/85°C
Escape Velocity:  3.44 km/sec



Swielm is a large moon with an unstable orbit and similar density as Saynyso.  It is a paradox in that its high gravity would ensure the existence of a dense atmosphere and archaeological research proved, that thousands of years ago there was a rich biosphere similar to earth’s jungles around the equator.  Nonetheless, nothing is left and it is just a cold and dead moon.

Temperature:  -10°C/250°C

Saynyso is a moon with very high density, based on the high quotient of Iron and Transuranium elements, and is responsible for gravitational shear forces which regularly cause violent earthquakes on planet Chithar.

Diameter:  2521.3 km
Mass:  3.913 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  Dessert
Temperature:  54°C/77°C
Escape Velocity:  2.78 km/sec



The dry moon Dight, with its rusty looking surface, was one of the main sources for rare metals before the Dom'Kavash developed the technology to replicate all kinds of materials from energy.  Huge craters are silent witnesses of this early history of the Dom'Kavash.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  5456.4 km
Mass:  3.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -50°C/50°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



A large amount of water vapor in the atmosphere, in combination with archaeological researches, fed rumors that the water of Shyslor's sub-terrestrial caves was transferred to this moon known as Banran.  Maybe this was one of the early attempts of terraforming the moon.  The Dom’Kavash never satisfyingly answered questions about it.

Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  10°C/250°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



Long range scanners detected empty giant caves inside the moon Shyslor. An expedition found that these caves were filled with water, thousands of years ago. How and when the water disappeared is not known.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  1847.2 km
Mass:  1.742 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  volcanic
Temperature:  -47°C/87°C
Escape Velocity:  5.17 km/sec



Isime is a moon of planet Meitkin.  It seems to be terraformed, but the results of terraforming do not appeared used at all.  Probably it was a terraforming experiment or failed attempt, or abandoned since the catastrophe that happened to Meitkin.  Still, Isime is habitable and appears to have small building clusters on its surface, but it features no landing facilities.

entries.source_text:
Diameter:  6456.4 km
Mass:  4.434 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:  -77°C/58°C
Escape Velocity:  8.36 km/sec



Sniough with its thin atmosphere was not considered for settlement projects for a long time, despite the adequate gravity.  Since the discovery that many of the plants of the tundra-like vegetation produce valuable pre-materials for pharmaceuticals, active traffic between the orbital stations of planet Death and Sniough has developed.

Welche Atmosphaere auch immer einst vorhanden war, ist im Laufe der Jahrtausende ins All entwichen.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: Dry docks can be found all around the Koalition systems. They mainly serve as repair facilities but can also be used to construct new Schiffe. Dry docks are larger than normal Koalition Schiffyards and only here the biggest Koalition Kreuzers can be build. This requires constant supply deliveries from nearby Stations or Planets.

This Nomad structure was created with the material from the nearby asteroid fields. Its shape reminds of the already known Nomad Outposts but this one seems to be unfinished and abandoned. Liberty-Marine has sent a taskforce to this place to ensure that it is no threat to the nearby human colonies.

Borealis


The Borealis is the big brother of the Equinox and belongs to the best fighters in Sirius. The ship was designed, developed and produced by private investors which took part in a ship building competition.

Equinox


The Equinox was built for recon. It is superior exploration vessel built by private investors. It has high speed as well as unhindered maneuverability to allow to it to escape most hostile situations. It contains light defence abilities that allow it to take on light threats.

Quasar


Liberty Navy started to developed a new kind of fighter after the Nomad threat was reveiled. The development took much longer than originally expected and so the contruction of the Quasar just recently finished.

entries.source_text: The Nomad Reaper for sure belongs to the most impressive Nomad Schlachtschiffs. Since the discovery of the Nomad Strike Carrier we know that die Nomaden have various kinds of superior Schlachtschiffs that outrange the firepower of our Schiffe.

Der Orden used originally Deliverance as base containing fighters wings guarding Sol system against die Nomaden lurking in Styx System. This has changed when were near Dimensional Rift activated Ion Canons which proved as the most effective defensive weapon. Today is Deliverance used as maintenance and refitting mobile base for those going to Altair Sector.

Order Destroyer
(Broadsword-class)

Funded by by the houses and based on Liberty design concepts this Order destroyer is constructed by a small consortium of local shipyards. Never before this ship class had to prove its worth in combat but the Order considers this ship a good investment into Sirius' future.

entries.source_text:
Maco


The Maco is the first independent ship design produced by the Coalition Rogues in secret underground facilities. The hope was to gain a tactical advantage over the military with this new fighter type.

entries.source_text:
After the exodus from Sol five Alliance SleeperSchiffe reached the Sirius sectors where the survivors of the Koalition War started to settle and live in peace for centuries.
Four of these SleeperSchiff reached habitable worlds where the colonists started to build the four Houses of Sirius: Liberty, Rheinland, Kusari and Bretonia.
The Hispania never reached its destination after being sabotaged by Koalition agents. Half of its occupants used escape pods to abandon the Schiff, becoming die Korsaren. The other half stayed and drifted with the Schiff, eventually founding a separate colony and becoming die Ausgestossenen.

The Inner Core Sector is a space region in the center of our Galaxy surrounding a massive black hole.

Scans indicate giant alien structures and debris fields in most of the systems of this Sector.

The Altair Sector is a region far away from Sirius.

After the Coalition War and the escape of the Allience Fleet the Sleepership technology was reverse engineered by Coalition scientists. In combination with the Warp technology a giant rift was formed leading from the Sol System to a small system in the Altair Sector.

When the Sol System was overrun by Nomad forces the Coalition had no other choice to seek for a new home in Altair.

The Canis Sector is a big mystery.

This region of space was cut off from the Dom'Kavash empire aeons ago but unlike the Kavash ruins that were found in Sirius the stations and structures in Canis are still intact.

The Sol Sector is a large, mostly unexplored region of space.

Mankind never got the chance to travel to other system in that region before the great exodus from our old homeworld, the Sol System.

With re-discovery of Sol many people decided to return home and colonize this area of space again.

The last leg of a route leading to the Dervon Sprungtor has been cleared through the field, but it is often the most dangerous part of the journey due to constant attacks by Nomaden.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
Juni and King were already waiting for me here. They want to find out what happened to a small battlegroup which was sent to Jack Blinchs coordinates. The last status report made no sense at all and then the ships just disappeared.
Juni appears to be worried as the last Nomad forces moved exactly into the direction of these coordinates after the main fleet was destroyed at Saturn months ago.

Now I have to decide whether I to go on that mission or explore some new systems and  return to the Order HQ later.

entries.source_text:
When I arrived at this station the Osiris decloaked near it. I should have known that Orillion is involved and as usual two steps ahead.

It looks like this is more than just an ordinary research station, hidden in the far regions of space. With the cooperation and resources of GMG a giant hypergate was built. The scans from Dervon helped to activate it and send an small expedition fleet through.

Since this fleet has not reported back in time a scout will be send to find out what happened. Looks like I am going to be the lucky guy that is going on this suicide mission.

Not long after the incident at the Dyson Sphere a Rhineland explorer found a new Jumpgate to a hidden system in Omicron Alpha. When the Schiff entered this system, the crew was shocked. It was the main reason for the rising Nomad activities in the whole Sirius sector. Containing one planet, its moon and over 20 Jumpgates to Liberty, Borderworld and many unknown systems it is a major threat for all houses. Rhineland, Liberty, Kusari and Bretonia decided to send their fleets to get this system under their control. But die Nomaden were already waiting for them. Hundreds of Schiffe were destroyed in the epic conflict now known as the Battle for X-3403. Capital Schiffe engaged some of the most massive and powerful of the nomad fleet. The sky was lit with thousands of Schiffe, both human and nomad firing missiles and all kinds of energy weapons at one another. Space was littered with the remains of cruisers, battleSchiffe and gunboats. Bodies floated endlessly into the vast regions of the universe. During the battle, the Kusari fleet began to chase a group of Nomad capital Schiffe through one of the uncharted gates. It is presumed they were destroyed in the system which they traveled as radio contact suddenly stopped. For days the battle ensued until the Nomad forces, diminished and exhausted retreated to the unknown, after destroying their underground base and with it the entire planet. The Battle for X-3403 was finally won. As a monument to the extreme chaos that was experienced in the battle, the remaining moon in this system was named Crossfire. However, with the Outcast homeworld just a few light years away, the system is still yet to be completely secure.

One day several months after the Battle of X-3403, a pilot under the employ of Cryer Pharmaceuticals picked up an emergency broadcast near one of the still uncharted systems leading from X-3403: "This is Vice Admiral Daisuke of the Kusari Marine! We are under attack by Nomad *#$*ces... we need immediate reinforcements! Our position is 12.*)"§12*33... Who ever can hear this please help us." The rumors that the Kusari Fleet is still out there are now confirmed. The Fleets of Liberty and Rhineland, the two most combat ready fleets since the Battle of X-3403, enter the system now known as Death Valley, nearest where the broadcast was heard, to rescue the Kusari. Meanwhile, in the Nephele System, a sleeper-Schiff wreck is discovered which looks similar to the old alliance sleeper-Schiffe. Cambridge Research Scientists entered the wreck to explore it and to have a look at the Schiff database. "Russian language?!?!... It's a few hundred years old Koalition Schiff!" They returned to the University of Cambridge to present their findings to the Bretonian Magistrate. However, their report is officially rejected due to the lack of open-mindedness of the Bretonia government.

The Nomad battle: Even with reinforcements coming to Death Valley the Kusari are not able to destroy the Nomad armada. Countless scores of lives are lost as the fight is nearing the 3-month mark. A single Kusari fighter blasted his way through the blockade in Death Valley and managed to deliver a data disk with invaluable information regarding the origins of the sleep-Schiff found in Nephele. Local scientists analyzed the data-disk and the files confirm what the Cambridge scientists discovered. The Sleeper-Schiff: Launched 150 Years after the Alliance left Earth and Sol for the Sirius Sector. The reason, still encrypted with outdated technology is yet to be discovered. It is theorized that the resources of Earth and Sol were completely drained and the sleeper-Schiffe embarked into unknown territory so that the remaining human population of Sol to find a place to call home. Some of the inhabitants in nearby systems may have heard something about this, so it is worth it, my friends, to investigate these theories.

Jump Coordinates found on the data-disk on the Koalition Sleeper Schiff allowed a jump-gate to be built in the far edge of Dublin. Unbeknown to the first explorers to travel through the jump-gate it was the link between Sol and Sirius through the system known as Hyperion which had at last been found. But Earth was not like how the halo-archives depicted it. The surface was scorched as if nomads had been there, not a single human survivor remained on the former human home-world. There was no doubt that the nomads were responsible. Scientists are now arriving on Earth to decrypt the old science centers left behind by the Koalition and maybe...just maybe we can find out where the Koalition went and why they really left Earth.

Finally, the Houses have found out where the Koalition disappeared to: another star cluster in the Altair Sector. Envoy's of peace formed by the re-established Allianz-Sternenflotte were turned away with gunfire. The Envoy fleet hovering in orbit above the Koalition home-world Murmansk was blasted into smithereens. It seems now, we are at war with the Koalition...again. War is why Nations are forged and destroyed. War is why Humans have prospered beyond Earth. War... war never changes, and the peace won by war never lasts long before some other threat appears in the distance. War it seems...never ends.

During a skirmish in Vorkuta in the Altair Sector between Koalition and Alliance forces, a new threat unveiled itself on everyone's Scanners. Dom'Kavash, the long forgotten race of beings who were once thought to inhabit the Sirius Sector returned. The skirmish was immediately terminated as the humans were destroyed almost instantly by superior firepower and technology. Facing a larger threat than Humanity has ever known since itself, there is now a larger political battle being fought. The Houses of the Alliance and Koalition must now decid if they can stand together, regardless of past differences, to fight the Dom'Kavash threat. Countless fleets of Alliance and Koalition were obliterated by bio-mechanical monsters of old. It was feared that the Koalition was nearing imminent destruction. No amount of firepower, it seemed was effective enough. Studies of the battles that ensued showed that for every Dom'Kavash fighter lost, 4 human Schiffe were lost. For every Dom'Kavash Kreuzer destroyed, 3 of our battleSchiffe were vaporized. These, and more similar statistics led to public release of military capital Schiffe of all houses as well as the creation of more proto-type Schiffe. Old schematics of proto-typed fighters were refreshed and the new Schiffe mass produced and released to the public. Dom'Kavash fleets were on the warpath to Human genocide. The End was near.

A massive fleet of Koalition Schiffe were commissioned several months after the Dom'Kavash invasion. The people were firm in their belief that the new fleet's assault on the Dom'Kavash blockade would have been a cakewalk. Nevertheless, that optimism was soon dispelled shortly after the assault began. Than one in a million miracle happened. The fleet broke through the Dom'Kavash blockade, a miracle eerily reminiscent of when the Alliance left Sol. Soon after a hyper-gate was discovered. The fleet entered, but never returned. Exploration Schiffe followed later and reported that the Koalition fleet had been destroyed by the inhabitants of the Inner Core systems. These inhabitants were hostile any force that was not Dom'Kavash. Mother Schiffe continued to attack humans in every way possible. A way through these systems is still being charted, but is highly dangerous and rarely ever successful. The Altair system was economically devastated not only due to the expense of the commissioning of the huge fleet, but also from the toll of the wars with both the Alliance and Dom'Kavash. The Koalition faltered as their outer defense lines fell and the Dom'Kavash spread into Sirius. Dom'Kavash armies flooded the sector, attacking everyone, but it seems they gave special attention to House Capitals: New Berlin, New London and New Tokyo. The fight spread to Omicron Alpha and X-3403. The genocide of Humanity was only just beginning.

We vastly overestimated the forces that attacked Sirius. It was later discovered that the fleets that attacked New Berlin, New Tokyo, New London, X-3403 and Omicron Alpha were merely scouts, seemingly looking for something. A professor at University of New Tokyo, Dr. Itao Hamasaki, believes that nomads in the Dyson Sphere sent a distress call which in turn prompted the return of the Dom'Kavash. The Dom'Kavash were initially mistaken that it was humans who the nomads considered the the threat and need eradication, but something far more evil and powerful was on the horizon. Ruins, found in the far reaches of the Borderworld systems, hint at an ancient civilization who ruled over a large area long before Humans. Initial excavations of these ruins have yet to determine the name of this civilization, but they are commonly referred to as the Ancients. It is hypothesized by Doctor Hamasaki that whatever it is that the Dom'Kavash are searching for is in these ruins.

The Gas Mining Guild poured billions of credits into research and development of a hyper-gate. Hyper-gates, until the completion of KGS's were those of the Kavash, so this was a huge leap for mankind. So large, that when a Research team went through the gate and never returned, this turn of events prompted a change in tactics for the Kavash. As it turned out, this hyper-gate led directly to the Inner Core of the Galaxy. As Edison Trent discovers, the Dom Kavash are waging a seemingly eternal war with foreign species: The Dom'Razak, the Dom'Setek and the Dom'Nepesh. Cut off from their resources, vastly outnumbered, and despite their technology being the most potent anyone has ever seen, the Kavash Empire now turn to humans for aid.

At the edge of destruction the Dom'Kavash for the first time in their history are forced to create an alliance with a minor species, the humans. If this alliance will fail the last defence perimeters of the empire will crumble. The Kavash will face their extinction and mankind might will follow. 
But mankind is divided and the alliance is at risk.

The fate of the galaxy is in your hand.

If you do not agree to this then you should not attempt to connect.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The full ruleset can be found at http://www.crossfire.swat-portal.com, you should read it prior you start playing.

If you do not agree to this then you should not attempt to connect.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><TEXT>The full ruleset can be found at http://www.crossfire.swat-portal.com, you should read it prior you start playing.</TEXT><PARA/><PARA/><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text:
Don't forget to join our multiplayer server for additional mod content and roleplay experience.

Claim the victory in great server events. Take part in exciting battles and prove your combat skills against other players from all around the world.

We already reported about strange space-living beasts in Gurm, Gladius, Mandar and Vorkuta. The first opinion about them was that they are species of Nomads, but it was refused, when our patrol had recovered sample of this creature. This creature has low common signs with Nomads, both morphologically and genetically. Their weaponry is also different.
So who are they, our new enemies? Professor Ronald Quintane from Alliance together with our top biologists from Mechnikov NII made a sensational discovery. They found trails of creature's genom in the ruins of old race called Dom'Kavash, and Nomads are seem to be their creation, bred specially to protect them. So, if Dom'Kavash first were reported to somehow disappeared, then this discovery can say: they did not died, they left for somewhere.
It is still unknown, are they gonna to return and take their former domain, or they are just watching, how are we here. Stay tuned for further research.

Our scientists have reverse-engineered some tech of aliens known as Nomaden. So now we are able to incorporate in with our weaponry. New weapon, marked 10G42 by GRAU and commonly called Koalition Gattling, is a deadly thing. It is five-barreled rotary particle cannon, able to deal serious damage with huge rate of fire and high projectile speed. It is still top-secret, what relation do they have to alien tech, how exactly do they work, and where exactly they are produced. But it is already produced in enough numbers to equip all fighters in Koalition fleet with this weapon. Scientists are working on further improving this weaponry, but no more information above development process is available.

Five years ago Koalition Space Marine lost a patrol in Yakutsk. Blackboxes showed that strange hole opened with shockwave, which damaged all patrol Schiffe beyond repair. Koalition has guarded this area for a long time. Now scientists from Sakharov NII are able to say: we do not need to guard this object, called Transdimesional Rift, since it is only one-side way. This Transdimesional Rift guides to unknown system in Sirius Space, in Allianz- territory. But since unknown system has no transdimesional rifts, there is no way to use it to return back to Altair. Still, way to Altair is another Transdimesional Rift in Sol, which guides to Styx system. This rift is two-sided, but Nomad presence in Styx does not allow not us nor Alliance to research it.

When Coalition Sleeper Ships left Earth, their database contained measuring of Earth days and years. That was made for a singular purpose: to save information about 9 may. That victory was long time ago, in 1945, but we shall never forget our past, and never forget our first serious victory against fascism. Every 9 May by the ancient Moscow's time Space Navy was deploying a parade near Coalition HQ.
But now it seems that we need to change our plans.
Unknown ships, which have relations to Dom'Kavash race (read news article: Not the Nomads) are noticed near Coalition HQ. Even if it is heavily armed, we can be unable to earn a peaceful surrounding for parade. So, now Advisory of Commissars of People are deciding, what measures should to be accepted. Those measures include: cancel the parade, move it to safe place, like Sovetskaya system or New Mekka, or increase the defense of Coalition HQ. The Advisory shall get decision to the public as quickly as possible.

entries.source_text:
When our sleeper Schiffe left Earth, we saved some schematics for our most sophisticated, dangerous and feared weapon: Ion cannons of "Dark Reign" class. Those are very powerful weapon, able to destroy a whole fleets with ease. In first, we created a platform for this weapon and used it as a main frame of Boridin space station, which was used during the habitation of Murmansk. Since all metal from Murmansk's core was aviliable to Koalition, we have built more of those defensive stations, and deployed them in our border systems: Gladius and Gurms, and near Koalition HQ.
After attacks of aliens known as Nomaden, those cannons opened fire at intruders. Dark Reigns destroyed a huge number of aliens trying to sneak in our central systems. We will be enough to say: no Nomad Schiff did reached Sovetskaya. All patrols in Gladius/Gurm are advised to head to the nearest Dark Reign in case of Nomad overwhelming pursuit. The same advice is for civilians, got into Gladius/Gurm for some reason. But be advised, Space Marine and Dark Reign operators bear no responsibility of the civilian causalities in Gladius/Gurm.

As Koalition people know, mining operation on Planet Murmansk can be look like killing two rabbits at one shot. In first, we made this giant planet habitable. In second, we got incredible amount of resources directly from its core. But such a "violent" operation can lead to no less violent consequences.
Scientists from Gagarin NII had developed a theory, that due to hollowing the core, Murmansk can lose its magnetosphere or atmosphere. Our planet's surface can break down, leading to the planetary catastrophe, some sceneries even include planetary destruction. Scientists began to develop a method to prevent the worst results. They have an idea to reinforce the "Great Mine" with a special constructions, and even make them habitable. Some even suppose a deploying the prison complex directly inside planet. But now, the most desperate Koalition pilots use the "Great Mine" as a training part, as known as "To Hell and back", which include flying through mine hole directly to planet center and performing the most complicated maneuvers there.

Second Year without causalities during "To Hell and Back"
The last step to becoming the Great Fighter Ace in Coalition is performing the maneuver training in Great Mine on Planet Murmansk. Great Mine is hole directly to center of planet. The Great Mine has special gates (including dynamically changing gates) and in center, there is some rotating gates. Training requires to do this with usage of cruise engines. Collision with these gates can lead to hitting lava inside planet and ship destruction, with known consequences. Pilots performing this training are aware of this - they are volunteering and have a right to change their decision even in beginning of event. Moreover, only most skilled pilots have a right to volunteer for trip "To Hell and back", non-secret requirements are 5 raids in Styx and Kandiris and more than one downed Nomad Battleship.
However, seems like now our pilots are better survivors. During two years, there was more than thousand pilots successfully done this training and survived. Even one Alliance female pilot, Jun'ko Zane, was able to get second high-score. But still, the highest score is I. Kojedub, which made it without any collisions, without lowering the speed and using Kossack close-range fighter, which is known for its low agility, and, moreover, with 0.5 promille of alcohol in blood.

Today our glorious Capital Marine is getting another heavy cruiser of "Krelow" class. Ships of this class are heavily armed and their primary task is to bring in a fire support with fleets of fighters or another Schiffe, while bombers target enemy capital Schiffe, acting like Alliance battleSchiffe. This cruiser, built on Murmansk, is outfitted with new technologies such as shield and upgraded fire control system.
This Schiff, together with a group of brand-new Kurgan gunboats, now is sent to patrol Sovetskaya system. Advisory is still deciding about deploying capSchiff patrols in Gladius/Gurm, because due to presence of Nomad Bomber patrols in these systems capital Schiff losses (with too heavy causalities in manpower and resources, which are needed to build and control capital Schiff like a Krelow class) are expected.

Koalition citizens! We live in a dark times. Inhuman enemy is looming at our doorstep. They destroyed our home planet and made us to leave it. They want to kill last human in the whole universe. The only thing that prevents them to do so with you is our victorious and glorious Space Marine. Join us and protect our united people! Join us to gain glory and respect in all our society!
To volunteer, come to any recruitment point on any Koalition base. You will get all necessary conditions, and if not at battle mission, you will get a 1-week holiday one time in a month, in which you can visit your home. You will not be just sent to patrol dangerous places - only experienced pilots are sent to patrol Gladius or Gurm, thus meaning of 2 years and having a special training, patrolling Gladius/Gurm is also needs your agreement. You can be retired after 5 years, or can continue your service as long as you want, the best Koalition pilot I. Kojedub continues his service for already 15 years.
You can be volunteered as a non-combat soldier (Intelligence officer, mechanic, capSchiff crewman, base dispatcher, repair Schiff pilot, etc) if you can't be volunteered for fighter corps due to health parameters, and can retire at any moment after 1 year of service.

Gas miners Guild and Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries Industries are searching for qualified technicians for theirs Gas Miners deployed in Sigma-13 and Hokkaido. In the past both corporations had sustained heavy personal and material loses due to criminals raids on the Gas Miners, but this situation has significantly changed. The Gas Miners now have greatly increase defensive equipment, patrols in their areas were increased, and the Gas Miner’s weakest area, their entrance points, have been substantially strengthened. Since changing to only battleSchiffe for personnel transportation, criminal activity has significantly decreased.

One of our journalist went deep inside the unknown systems and reported about a mysterious old-looking Bretonian Schiff which fought alone against one of the numerous Nomad fleets there. What was odd about this fight was the fact that the Bretonian Schiff not only survived, but completely destroyed all nomad Schiffe using guns that fired green plasma projectiles. The appearance and observed stats match exactly the weapons used by the Dom'Kavash! Our archives revealed that the observed Schiff was last seen more than 50 years ago by a religious group which left New Berlin and never returned. Could it be possible that they found a new home somewhere in the unknown systems? And where they found Dom'Kavash guns? Is it possible that the unknown systems are hiding a threat to humankind? Too many unanswered questions here!

Brothers and sisters, we have once again a chance to see our homeland! Our brother Jesoph Been a few weeks ago revealed a mystery about an unfinished Nomad fortress here! This base appears to be a weapons factory producing guns with unimaginable power. He was able to not only penetrate die Nomaden defenses but to also bring to us a few of these guns. So far all tests we have conducted indicate that these weapons can be easily mounted on human Schiffe and will destroy our captors – die Nomaden!

Die Gilde der Kopfgeldjaeger, which owns Sheffield station in Manchester system, today announced $5.000.000 reward for information which will lead to the person(s) which destroyed all external space storages next to Sheffield last week. BHG did not want to speculate about the reason for the attack, but we think that the purpose for this attack was to obtain popularity amongst Sirius criminals.

Dear visitors of the Custodian System. As there will be several events and competitions take place as part of to the centennial of the Union of Dock workers you might encounter some heavy traffic especially of Cargo Lifters and eventually other civilian space service vehicles around the docking areas of all planets in our system.
Please be carefull and fly sensible.

In recent news, Alliance officers have found out about a massive operation undergoing in the Outcast Nation. It seems there has been a coup to overtake the Council of Dons that failed. It only resulted in a massive conflict on Planet Malta in which 1700 Schiffe were lost, and over 59.000 people injured or killed. The Nación declared this an attempt to sabotage the Council, and blamed their rivals, the Corsair Empire.
The Corsair Empire responded on this transmission that they had nothing to do with it, and we quote : "If we were the ones to try and do it, there would be no man, woman or child left standing on the burning ground from our mighty warSchiffe"

Rheinland's top scientists on Planet New Berlin have starter research on some of the newest black-market weaponry. The amount of black-market weaponry that came in Peenemünde Research Center in the last couple of months has been increasing by each passing day. So far there has been a couple of highly-classified contractors, from which only one agreed to talk about it. One thing they mentioned is the amount of credits that has gone into this facility. The amount is staggering. Over 11 billion credits, from all around Sirius has been poured in the facility. Only recently built, it holds some of the most valuable research in Sirius.

The facility location is unknown, and also classified, because of the research inside, it's been a target of many unlawful groups like Red Hessians, LWB and Unioners. Every try to locate and capture and seize the facilities informations and research has failed each time, as the teams that work on it are evading all capture.

The research could possibly bring new designs in weaponry ranging from hand-held personal weapons to giant planetary cannons that are capable of tearing up hulls of capital ships in mere seconds. The value of the research is so high that every information about the facility, apart from the name is highly-classified and only accessible to highest ranking military and scientific personnel.
