entries.source_text:
In the recent events that occurred in Liberty, the Admirals of the First Naval Flotilla have received 9 new Dreadnoughts, codename Archangel. The new design of the dreadnoughts, with their new drive core has upgraded the low-on-power Virgina-class Dreadnoughts into fearsome opponents. The new Vancouver-class dreadnoughts are equipped with 27 high-powered turrets capable of tearing up anything infront of them, a forward particle cannon that is capable of obliterating unshielded stations in mere minutes, and 4 torpedo launchers that are a standard issue in the Liberty Navy.

Vancouver-class dreadnoughts were built on Norfolk Shipyard with assistance of Kusari Royal Navy and Deep Space Engineering. Some of the new attributes that make Vancouver class dreadnoughts more powerful is their newly upgraded drive core, upgraded Silaris armor made specially for this occasion and CBT shielding. The forward particle cannon is a newly issued prototype that has been installed only on the Vancouver class dreadnoughts, and so far in the testing it showed massive capabilities, but there are limitations on its use. In order to fire it up, the shield barriers must come down, redirecting power into the forward gun.

The sensor array on the ships has been upgraded, apart from the standard passive and active scanners, such as visual, thermographic, radio detectors and radar, to LADAR (LAser Detection And Ranging). The LADAR has a narrowed field of view then radar, but LADAR resolutions allows images of detected objects to be assembled.


The newly Antiproton thrusters installed on the Vancouver class are unmatched in Sirius. The main propulsion is provided by 1 large antiproton thruster, with both forward and backward exhausts. Antiprotons are injected into a reaction chamber filled with hydrogen, and the resulting matter-antimatter annihilation provides umatched power.

entries.source_text:
The officials have confirmed that earlier today, several dozen Golden Chrysanthemum members have assaulted a civilian outpost on Planet Kyushu. Rumors are spreading that Outpost Myanmoto was actually serving as a classified Kusari Naval Forces training ground. The GC ships passed by unnoticed by officers of the KSP and the KNF, just to uncloak and fire a barrage of missiles towards the outpost. The death count has increased to 7,000 people, and it's rising by each passing minute, as the rescuers are trying to remove the rubble from the station. Even though they passed in unnoticed, there was no time to cloak again, and the Chrysanthemum ships were either shot down by high-powered surface-to-air cannons, or by passing patrols nearby. Only one GC ship made it back to the nebula, where the officials stopped their chase

"It was a bloody mess. The explosions were so big I felt it on my skin, and this, this is a top grade officers armor. I shouldn't be able to feel any heat or cold underneath!" added Officer Nagato, who was stationed only 1 kilometer away from the station. "We were lucky that we spotted them before they cloaked again. They will pay for this!"

No response was given when the question about the base being a live-ammunition training ground for the KNF.

entries.source_text:
After the news of a handsome dispute between two recruiting teams on die Schrotties base Trafalgar, Vice-Admiral Chester W. Collins, headquartered at Schlachtschiff Suffolk said :
"We haven't seen any increase in Gaian activities yet and I doubt that they would be able to stand the Mollies and especially die Korsaren that pester us in Dublin. But they could become an increasing nuisance at the Dublin Gate, if they plan on blocking accsess to Dublin and the way to Sol from there. Unfortunatly the royal treasurer has declined my pledges for ..."

The abstract of a scientific research report by Cryer Pharmaceuticals shows disturbing implications. It seems that the alien organisms used widespread especially in Kusari space to boost food production have the potential of altering the human genom ! Changing us into something ... ALIEN! The report we were able to obtain a hardcopy of its abstract was almost immediatly classified and removed from the net on behalf of Kusari officials affiliated to Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries Industries and ... KGS.

About the recent rumors on probably genetically hazardous food Synfood issued an official statement :
You are what you eat.
Under scientificly proven and controlled conditions properly processed raw materials, composed and balanced to human needs. That's the proper nutrition for you and the ones you love. Food, grown on alien soil with, alien organisms as an alien fertilizer, sold as "luxury food" to be consumed without any further control, what do you expect it makes of you ?

The discovery a way back to the Sol under bretonian controll has put a lot of stress on ecologist activistes.
Here are some samples of students debates on Cambridge :
"Let's Go Home ! Now the way is open again let us leave Sirius and go back where humankind truely and only belongs to,
EARTH !
Stop the violation done damage to planets and nature in Sirius already. Sirius has changes us as well ! We are on the brink of
loosing our humanity here ! Look at the Outcasts ! Are they still humans ?
Let's put an end on the fruitless efforts of generating living space here in Sirius. Thou regrettable by its reason,
Sol is empty and free of others. There is plenty of room for all of us."

"Let's Protect Home ! Now the way is open again, all the bad that has grown up here in Sirius threatens our beloved home,
EARTH !
Don`t let them violate our true origin ! BMM, Plantform, IMG, Synfood. All greedy on the
vast resources of So l, now almost empty -even though for regrettable reasons- are set up to plunder it - AGAIN !
Do you want them ldo, what has been done to Leeds, New London, Stuttgart and Gaia already
to our one and only true mother EARTH ?

Which direction will win and may even become a new agenda for the Gaian pirate activities is not clear yet. An official of the Green Front :
"The rediscovery of Sol doesn't change anything about our goals of fighting any kind of violotion of planetary ecologies. But no one can stay
untouched by the the thought to have our true home at hand after centuries of exile here in Sirius."

Which direction will win and may even become a new agenda for the Gaian pirate activities is not clear yet. An official of the Green Front :
"The rediscovery of Sol doesn't change anything about our goals of fighting any kind of violotion of planetary ecologies. But no one can stay
untouched by the the thought to have our true home at hand after centuries of exile here in Sirius."

entries.source_text:
This is Sol News Broadcasting with the latest news,
Today an uncautious maneuver of an unregistered spacecraft on the run from local authorities caused a chain reaction inside the dense debris field around Earth. Two freigthers caught by suprise suffered extensive damage by drifting wreckages leaving one dead due to secondary explosions on one of the freighters while numerous broadcasting and surveilance sattellites where either destroyed or rendered beyond repair. Citizens of Asia could easily witness an impressive spectale as the sky was lit by falling debris for several hours. The government promised yet again to provide a quick solution for this uncalcuable thread to orbital shipping. Official speaker of ALG Waste Disposal (ALG), Reinhard Schneider, has announced that ALG is offering immediate support. The debris around Earth, it's oldest parts originating back to mankind's first attempts of space flight, have posed a constant thread to pilots over centuries, the thread only growing more potent as dozens of Coalition cruiser and battleship wreckages along possibly hundreds of fighters were added to the globe of orbiting waste during the Nomad Invasion of Sol.

This was Kate Harper on Sol News Broadcasting.

This station and the fishfood harvesting are only remnants to what this once was : the Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries secret centre of research and development. Did you know, that most of the artificial intelligent robots in Sirius came from Kurile ? There were also transgenetic experiments going on. All of our biotechnology originated here.

It's strange. During some test we conducted here with some captured Ausgestossene, we found similarities between the alien organisms found on Kurile and the changes in their genetic material. As if the same mutagene has worked on them. But that's classified.

The Cryer guys at Atka only see the chemical side of alien microorganisms. They haven't even tapped the true treasure, genetic transmutation.
Long ago our eggheads found that this world once was full of life with a highly complex ecosphere, but that by alien influence the DNA of each and every lifeform on this planet was changed to what you find today and it became this pott of poison you see today.

These Gaianer are just nuts. Recently two groups were here, both trying to recruit for the same : some heavy action on the Dublin Gate and some other gate in Dublin. Just when they came up to the bar they started some highly theoretical babble-rabble that become very ... "practical" in almost notime. Lot of work for our paramedics. Silly, eh ? They rather bash eachothers head than getting the job done. Not that I think they have any chance against the Mollies and Korsaren there.

You know that die Zoner, who settled the main planet granted the junkers the concession to run a prision ? Die Schrotties ! Sometimes it feels, as if there are more Mollys comming out of it, than any kind of prisioner goes in. It`s one more reason, why we are stationed here.

We tried to follow some KGS Schiffe we sighted when they were docked on Freeport 5 in Omega-41 but they vanished shortly after launching. Technicians there told us, that they saw those Schiffe later and they were bearing signs of repairs to severe hull and systems damages. Most surprising for them was the fact that such repairs can be done only in full functional Schiffyard, but nearest is The Ring in New Berlin which is some distance away. Maybe it has something to do with the numerous heavily guarded Rheinland Convoys, which were spotted north of Freeport 5.

Ive almost lost my sweetheart in Gurm! We were in a patrol when those Dom'Kavash gunboats attacked us. Her Schiff was cruise-disrupted, and under fire... Her Azan was almost done. If I didn't drawn fire, and if not for Dark Reign nearby, she'd was dead now... or worse. So be careful, if they got you somewhere in Gurm, Mandar or Vorkuta, run away, better to the nearest Dark Reign Ion Cannon and pray any your god for CM's deflecting cruise disruptors. There is almost no chance of surviving against it alone, and if they slowed you to impulse speed - you can begin to look for a flat in heaven.

Welcome to the middle of the maze. I am trying to find an exit from this place, because the one anomaly nearby is locked on itself.I saw some Schiffe were flying straight to the sun. Maybe, that can be useful.
Magnificent creation, isn't it? That star is called Sirius, ant this star has given a name to this sector. That's why we decided to build this international complex called Wheel Of Sirius here.

I've just returned from Gladius. Met Nomaden four times today. They are seem to be stupid... or desperate, but they are numerous. One time they tried to attack us near Ion cannon, one time we found them fighting with another our patrol, two times we fought them alone. My wingman's Schiff got damaged, but he is okay. I don't know, what do they need, and don't know, are they supposed to be so fragile, but i know: their weapon is pretty powerful. Try to avoid their shots and use rapid-firing weapon with high projectile speed. Our Koalition Gatlings are ideal for this. And more: their fighters in Gladius don't use cruise disruptors, but their bombers and interceptors do.

Our former equipment dealer was arrested a month ago. Milition says that he was selling weaponry and equipment to Rouges. I think he will be sent to work in ore mines or industrial plants, but in my opinion, he shall be shot. We have discovered a lost of 6 10G42's that you know as "Koalition Gatlings" in warehouse under his responsibility, that means they now are in claws of those bandits. You know, they are dirty bastards with dirty tricks, and even when we are fighting with aliens, they are still attacking us!

Yesterday I saw one of those creatures... Dom'Kavash Schiffe, right? They are really scary... and dangerous. I saw that thing trying to kill my escorter. That was good that he tricked it to nearest Dark Reign. His Schiff was too heavily damaged, but he himself survived. Hell, it's a good reason to get drunk!

Just returned from Styx. My wing took down one Nomad Schlachtschiff and hell of a fighters, bombers and interceptors. You know, there is almost no way of surviving Styx by long, but we had cloakings and so on. Only experienced pilots are sent to Styx. Usually they fly our, as I think, best Schiff, developed and evaluated during Alliance war - "Basilisk"-class. Nice Schiff, by the way. It has a great firepower, enough armor and more place for batteries and nanobots than any our Schiff ever, for exception of heavy Schiffe. You're from Alliance, right? I can say you, that you can even buy this masterpiece.

entries.source_text:
In the history of mankind, there has never been a discovery of a natural jumphole in the Sol system.

Numerous ships were dispatched to explore the asteroid belt during the late 22nd century, but there were no reports of any unusual discoveries published.
The opening of this jumphole appears to be sporadic and only occurs every few years.

Scanners have detected the presence of Nomaden in this system. But there is also a very unusual energy signature not far from here. It seems to be a very weak distress call on an former military frequency.
Even though there is a threat of Nomaden in this area, it may still be worth looking into this.

Unbelievable!
This is a fully intact Alliance sleepership. 

The ship's hull does not have any visible identification marks. Parts of the ship appear to be incomplete but the ship hull shows no signs of damage. It appears that this ship was launched before its construction was finished.

This explains why it ended up here. Only four out of seven power reactors were operational, and they became overloaded after a short period of time. 
Although there are no signs of life on the ship, there are also no dead bodies. It seems like the captain managed to hide his ship in this asteroid and evacuate the crew and passengers. I'm curious about their destination, where did they go?

It may be best to return to Earth. There's a chance that some information can be found in the old databases.

The old Alliance databases indicate that multiple Sleeper Ships were constructed, but only a few were able to launch prior to the conclusion of the Coalition war.

The last Sleeper Ship launched was commanded by General Atticus Rockford, but it is impossible to say how many others made their way out of the system without being officially mentioned in these recordings.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
It seems that there were more Sleeper Ships that managed to escape centuries ago, but what happened to these people? Are there more human colonies out there? The recent discoveries will definitely lead to the rewriting of history books.

entries.source_text:
Multiple coordinates have been submitted by one of the Dreadnoughts to plot a course through Kavash space.

It's best to take advantage of this opportunity and quit the battle while there's still time left. These cruisers are likely to be taken care of by the Dreadnoughts.

This city is old, very old, but the technology that is used here is beyond anything that a human mind could imagine. The same applies to the device that could be obtained from the Kavash Arc.

The Inner Core Hypergates are increasingly being used by enemy ships to invade the Dom'Kavash territories. The Kavash defense lines are crumbling and becoming weaker with each attack. The seriousness of the situation can be seen in the fact that a few Savage cruisers were able to slip through these defenses.

Destroying the Inner Core Hypergates is the sole way of changing the direction of this war.
This task is challenging due to the fact that these gates are heavily shielded and receive their energy directly from the Black Hole. These shields are impenetrable to even the Kavash. Attempting to enter or shut down the Hypergates is impossible.

Still, there is hope.
The Kavash devised a technique for overloading the energy beams between Black Hole and Hypergates.

The Kavash Arc's device is an experimental magnetic detonator for a singularity bomb that is powerful enough to destabilize the Black Hole. The Kavash expect that energy spikes of such a massive explosion would destroy the hypergates and close them once and for all.

There are some minor issues with this.
To build the singularity bomb, the detonator is not the sole component required and with such a weapon in their cargo hold, the Kavash are unsure if they will ever reach the Black Hole.

In order to win this war, it would be necessary to receive more assistance.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
This war is taking its toll on the Kavash. Under normal circumstances, I wouldn't care, but if the Kavash Empire collapses, we'll be the next ones, and we have no chance alone. I must return to Sirius and seek assistance. According to Kavash, there is a chance of finding a way back home in the Phanchdar system.

entries.source_text:
The welcome given by the Coaltion was not as friendly as I had hoped.

The battlegroup escorted you to a Carrier deep inside Coalition space where you were taken in custody.

The Commander of the Carrier Gorshkov has been leading the interrogation personally. Even though all questions were answered openly, you have been grounded for a while now.

It might be time to have a private conversation with the Coalition Commander.

Coalition Commander:
"Mr. Trent, I understand that you are dissatisfied with the current situation. I can assure you that we won't keep you here for more than what's necessary.

However, your story about these aliens needs to be verified.
The most significant question we have is how you were able to fly to the Menton System without passing our fleet at the Gurm anomaly.
The Coalition requires this information and it is my responsibility to obtain it. Sharing all details with us would be wise.

You will be my guest until that is done."

*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
That was not the hospitality I expected. While the Koalition is highly interested in Hyperspace technology, their methods of obtaining it are quite disrespectful.

It's not easy to trust the Coalition, but from their perspective, the situation is certainly not different. Our survival depends on our ability to work together and fight side by side.

The appearance of the Warrior fighters showed that the war has come to us and only together we will prevail.

The time has come to fly back to Sirius and prepare.

*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
The situation is worse than anticipated. Warrior heavy fighters engaged the Koalition Carrier in an assault. It seems that they either made their own Hyperspace gate or captured the Dom'Kavash Hypergate that leads to Altair after I passed through.

Back on Manhattan representatives of the Houses were informed about what happened after passing through the GMG Hypergate and the attack on the Coalition Carrier.

The Inner Core war is on the verge of reaching the outer regions of the galaxy, but none of these politicians are capable or willing to make a decision.

Perhaps Orillion and Juni will have a better chance of persuading these people to listen and take action.

After reaching der Orden HQ, Orillion mentioned an expedition that went deep into the Altair Sector to explore ruins that had been found on multiple planets there.
This expedition has just returned to Schlachtschiff Deliverance and has a lot of information to share.

The Expedition Fleet Captain brought to light peculiar energy readings that were emanating from the surface of a moon located deep inside the unexplored Altair systems.

Due to enemy ships appearing on the long range scanners and heading straight to the planet, it was not possible to investigate this discovery any further.

The expedition fleet's ships made use of the planet's sensor shadow to escape and quickly returned to Sol.

First scans of Triam show only minor natural resources but enough atmosphere to home of primitive live forms. There are hundreds of small ruins across the entire surface of this moon.

entries.source_text:
The obelisk is part of a large underground structure that resembles similarities to a giant mass accellerator. It emits enormous amounts of energy which seems to be concentrated on top of the building.

It might be that this large complex was once used to produce large amounts of anti-matter.

It appears that the Expedition Fleet was not disturbed by Dom'Kavash Schiffe.
It appears that a small scout wing of Warrior Schiffe is seeking the same energy readings. It's best to eliminate them before they can submit the location of this place.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
The anti-matter container is making me a bit uneasy. After all these years, if there were one minor malfunction, it could lead to the biggest explosion that humans have ever seen.
entries.translation_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
The anti-matter container is making me a bit uneasy. After all these years, if there were one minor malfunction, it could lead to the biggest explosion that humans have ever seen.
entries.suggested_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
The anti-matter container is making me a bit uneasy. After all these years, if there were one minor malfunction, it could lead to the biggest explosion that humans have ever seen.

entries.source_text:
The Kavash might be interested in this Anti-Matter Container. One is required to construct their Singularity bomb.

There is no longer any surprise about the presence of Warrior ships in Altair. It looks like they are aware of this weapons and are making every effort to stop the Kavash at all costs. The situation is extremely dangerous.

Juni has some promising news to share.

The Houses of Sirius have agreed to meet in Kyushu to discuss their response to the raging war in the heart of our galaxy.

Juni will be accompanying you on the flight to this meeting.

The Kavash showed up at the perfect moment. Their humble and friendly request for support definitely changed the situation. 

Two enemies can't be turned into best friends overnight, but alliances can be formed when necessary.
The Kavash give a detailed explanation of their situation and the dangers that mankind will face if their empire collapses.

The Admirals have no other choice but to agree to such an alliance.

After detecting a significant amount of Anti-Matter in the cargo hold, Kavash started uploading detailed blueprints for an Anti-Matter chamber and revealed that the reactor core of a Nomad station may be perfect for completing the Singularity Bomb.

The Anti-Matter Chamber's blueprints are truly amazing and complex. Building such a device is highly risky and there is no margin for error.

The construction of such a dangerous object needs to be done far away from any populated world, but it also requires the necessary construction equipment.
It's difficult to find a place like this.

Orillion advocated for the use of a newly constructed Order Research station situated within the Dyson Sphere. It is expected to be fully functional by now, yet it continues to operate with minimal staff.

Juni and King will be your escorts to that location.

The Outcasts seem to have well-trained spies. The news about war preparations has come to their attention and they appear to be extremely worried.

Although their colonies were hit hardest by the arrival of Dom'Kavash scouts in Sirius, they have no other option due to the presence of an even bigger threat. Fight is inevitable for them.

An Outcast delegation has already been sent to Planet Crete to negotiate a cease-fire with the Corsairs and to persuade them to unite the House of Hispania, at least for the duration of this conflict.

The Outcasts granted you free passage through their territory.

entries.source_text:
The scientists on this Station agreed to lend a hand. Well, that means most of them. A small group of scientists believe that developing such a device is too risky and have left the station one hour ago.

The blueprints are extremely complex and the construction could take a considerable amount of time. Exploring the nearby systems while waiting for the Anti-Matter Chamber to finish would be a good idea.

Juni and King will remain at the station to monitor the work on this device.

Two Nomad reactors are present in this chamber, but they must be shut down to extract the cores.

There were three power relays in the previous chamber. Maybe it's possible to use them to shut down one of these reactors.

With the completion of the Anti-Matter Chamber and the discovery of a suitable Reactor Core, it is time to construct the Singularity Bomb.

The problem is that we don't have any idea how to do that.
It's time to return to the Inner Core, but this time not alone.


The Osiris awaits you near the Nomad Gate.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
The scientists were pleased to witness our departure. I wonder why. 
It's possible that they were feeling a bit uneasy when they knew that our enemies were making every effort to destroy these devices and everything connected to them.
entries.translation_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
The scientists were pleased to witness our departure. I wonder why. 
It's possible that they were feeling a bit uneasy when they knew that our enemies were making every effort to destroy these devices and everything connected to them.

entries.source_text:
After a week, the Osiris has made it to the Sylroth Light Dome located deep inside Dom'Kavash space. Stations and defense platforms in the outer regions of the Kavash territory appear to have been heavily damaged.
Time is not on our side.

The components for the Singularity Bomb meanwhile were transferred to the Kavash station.
The only thing we can do now is wait for them to complete the weapon construction.

Our enemies are pushing harder and harder against the Kavash and it looks like their targets are well chosen. 

This time we could fight them back and buy some time for the Kavash to finish their Sigularity Bomb.
A small Dom'Kavash transport has reached the Osiris shortly after the attack and unloaded a giant package.
This bomb certainly is not meant to be mounted on a a small fighter.

Now we have to meet with the Kavash and plan our next steps.

The Kavash explained their strategy for the upcoming battle, and after several hours discussing the details, it seems that a solution has been found which does not involve suicide.

The element of surprise is on our side, even though our enemies know about the Singularity Bomb and what we intend to do with it. They tried to disturb the construction of the bomb and for sure they will do everything they can to prevent that a joint fleet of Human and Kavash ship can reach the Black Hole.

That's why the Kavash will surround their strongest Battleship with every available ship of their military. This massive fleet will set its course through the Inner Core systems directly heading to the Black Hole.

Our enemies don't know how the humans managed to reach the Inner Core. This is our key advantage.
Although the Kavash fleet appears to be making their way through these systems to transport the Singularity Bomb to the Black Hole, it is actually bait.

A large human fleet will safeguard the bomb as the Osiris carries it through the 'backdoor' to the Black Hole. If we're lucky, our enemies won't notice this coming and concentrate their attack on the Kavash.
That will open a timeframe for us to operate and deliver our valuable cargo.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
Certainly, that was a surprise. To me, it seemed like these insectoid drones were the Kavash. Now it seems like their empire is based on a complex caste system with many different specialized races.
entries.translation_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
Certainly, that was a surprise. To me, it seemed like these insectoid drones were the Kavash. Now it seems like their empire is based on a complex caste system with many different specialized races.

entries.source_text:
Back in Omega 3 the war preparations have started.

The fleets of the Houses of Sirius are heading towards the Hypergate, while the crew of the Osiris is preparing the warhead.

It won't take long until the Kavash will start their attack.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
So this is it. The decisive battle. If we don't succeed, all hope is lost. In order to survive, Kavash and Humans must fight side by side.
The only thing we can do at this moment is hope that our strategy will work.
entries.translation_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
So this is it. The decisive battle. If we don't succeed, all hope is lost. In order to survive, Kavash and Humans must fight side by side.
The only thing we can do at this moment is hope that our strategy will work.

The only thing we can do at this moment is hope that our strategy will work.

entries.source_text:
So this is it.
The last chance to prepare for the attack on the Inner Core Black Hole. The last chance to take care of unfinished business before the big battle.

The allied Fleets are on their way to Omega 3 and the Kavash are ready to break through the enemy lines.

All fleets have reached the Inner Core system but something went wrong.

Juni, King, and Trent were joined by the Order Fleet when they entered the system, while the Rheinland Fleet was completely separated from everyone else.

The Liberty, Kusari and Bretonia Fleets are located far away from the expected entry point. Their proximity to the Venn Gate makes them a likely target for any enemy ships passing through this gate.

Despite the main enemy forces' pursuit of the Kavash Fleet, we are still receiving significant readings of enemy ship signatures in this system.

Now there is no way back.
entries.translation_text:
All fleets have reached the Inner Core system but something went wrong.

Juni, King, and Trent were joined by der Orden Fleet when they entered the system, while the Rheinland Fleet was completely separated from everyone else.

The Liberty, Kusari and Bretonia Fleets are located far away from the expected entry point. Their proximity to the Venn Gate makes them a likely target for any enemy ships passing through this gate.

Despite the main enemy forces' pursuit of the Kavash Fleet, we are still receiving significant readings of enemy ship signatures in this system.

Now there is no way back.

entries.source_text:
The initial waves of enemy fighters have wreaked havoc on us. 
A large number of capital ships were either destroyed or severely damaged. Two fighter wings were lost, but the Osiris only suffered minor damages.

The other fleets had less luck.
Kusari, Liberty and Bretonia are reporting heavy combat and incoming enemy forces from the Venn System.

We are receiving distress calls from the Rheinland fleet. They require immediate assistance.

Every small victory is accompanied by heavy losses.
Without the Coalition's arrival, the Rheinland fleet would have been completely destroyed.

The Nassau can be repaired with the assistance of the Gorshkov Carrier. But that might take a while. The other Coalition ships have already started to move to Venn Gate, where they will support the other fleets that are desperately trying to hold the line.

It appears that more and more enemy forces are entering through the Venn Gate. The Kavash Fleet may have been defeated and we are now the main target.

The worst news, however, is that we lost contact with the Order fleet.

entries.source_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
We have completely misunderstood the strength of the enemy forces in this system. Our losses are incredibly high, and without the Koalition Fleet, we would be in dire straits. It's great that Commander Kamneva showed up at the right time to aid us.

*PERSONAL ENTRY:
Although the battle is over, it doesn't feel like a triumph. The prize was too high. The loss of Orillion was both a loss of a friend and one of the best leaders of our time.

entries.source_text: Despite persistent reports of  illegal or at least unethical collaboration between high-ranking Kusari government figures and members of die Hogosha, many ordinary citizens do not see any problem. A fisheries industry worker from Junyo told an interviewer “Die Hogosha may have a bad reputation among some, but they often help the common people in everyday life. The government moves slowly, but die Hogosha can get things done, without a lot of bureaucratic red tape."

An ice farmer from Tsushima said, “Whether it's helping with a small loan to tide you over, or helping protect a Schiffment too small for the authorities to be bothered with, die Hogosha are always there to lend a hand. Sure, it may be a little expensive, but you get the help when you need it."

A major tsunami caused by an undersea quake overwhelmed the shields on several Junyo platforms yesterday, causing severe damage and killing or injuring a still unknown, but large number of workers. Samura Industries Industries Industries Industries Industries spokesman Takeo Yamauchi expressed deep sympathy for the victims and their surviving families, but  insisted that the company's precautions had not been at fault. “Nobody could have predicted such high and destructive waves. The company's safety measures were more than sufficient to protect the facilities and workers from such disasters had the scale been within projected parameters."

The manufacturer of the shields that failed in the recent disaster at Junyo have been accused of selling defective shield generators, probably made by contractors outside of Kusari space. Company spokespeople have declined to comment, citing the on-going investigation. The name of the company has been temporarily suppressed by the government during the investigation.

Recent rumors among survivors of the Junyo tsunami disaster blame Planetform, Inc., claiming that the company triggered the massive undersea quake during clandestine experiments to raise land from the seafloor and form islands. Company spokesman Ichiro Naganami called the rumors “baseless” and “irresponsible”.

Kusari-Staatspolizei have increased their random scanning and stopping of private vessels as part of their intensified campaign to prevent flying under the influence of drugs, particularly the notorious Cardamine. “We have seen an increase in fatal accidents recently”, said Sub-sector Commander Takeshi Hayashi in a prepared statement for the media. “Our efforts to reduce smuggling and sale in Kusari space are beginning to bear fruit, but as long as there are users, there will be smugglers trying to supply them. Property damage, injuries, and even fatalities caused by drug-addled pilots crashing are tragic, and we are working hard to stamp them out.”

Rumors have begin to spread about new dangers lurking in the deep seas of Junyo. Some fisheries workers claim that the alien organisms seeded in the planet's oceans have done more than expected, producing sea monsters big enough to prey on low-flying Schiffe. One veteran Junyo worker, on condition of anonymity, said, “Die Kusari-Staatspolizei are blaming Cardamine use for the increase in crashes, but they are just trying to hide the truth from the public to prevent the spread of panic. There are things lurking in the sea that attack Schiffe around take-off and landing, when they're flying low. Nobody has clear proof of them yet, but they're out there, and they're hungry.”

Riffleman was an Eagle-class fighter used by a freelancer with clearance into Koalition space. Said freelancer was scouting the system and contact with him was lost. The fate of the pilot is unknown, as well as what exactly happened.  The official version Koalition Investigation Center offers is a Koalitions-Rogues attack. However, the cargo left onboard, as well as lack of the escape pod or its remnants onboard or around the Riffleman are major details disproving this.

Reaver once belonged to a Xeno pilot. Following his wing leader, said pilot headed to the Altair sector to wage a crusade against the Koalition. Reaver avoided the fate of his leader, Ravager, only to be intercepted in New Mekka. Koalition Marine pilots left the disabled Schiff untouched as a warning to all those who plan to betray their hospitality.

Quartermaster's pilot was a Corsair that tried to smuggle Artifacts into Altair, in an attempt to open a new black market. Apparently the Rogues gave him a clear message that they aren't interested in trinkets.

Ravager was an "Eagle"-class fighter belonging to a radical Xeno pilot. He decided to leave Sirius in order to wage a two-man crusade against the Koalition, deciding that he and his wingman alone, would be enough to bring it down on the inside. His first raid against the transport convoy was also the last, as Aden Station sensors had successfully tracked him down, and a wing of Koalition Marine fighters made short work of him.

Honeybee was a KGS exploration freighter sent to research gas deposits of Altair. Contact was lost in Er Riad system. The first suggested cause of the destruction of the Schiff was detonation of explosive gas pocket, but after the signs of particle weapon impacts had been discovered on the hull of the wreck, it is now believed that the Schiff fell victim to an attack by the Rogues.

Weaver was a transport constructed by the  KGS for the  Koalition as a part of the material help program. During the transport mission in Er Riad it was ambushed by Rogues. With all hope lost, the crew had decided to lure the Rogues into a minefield, where the Weaver has found its last resting place.

The wreck of a Rheinland "Valkyre"-class fighter registered as the Eisenstein. This fighter was assigned to the Rheinland fleet that ventured into Altair. As well as the freighter it escorted, Munificent, Eisenstein escaped from the onslaught. The hull of the fighter also has signs of "Koalition Gatling" impacts. The log files are less corrupted, and it appears that after Munificent was destroyed, Eisenstein used a cloaking device, but it ran out of power, dooming the Schiff. There still may be equipment left onboard, but its escape pod, though, is nowhere to be seen.

The wreck of a Rheinland "Humpback"-class freighter registered as the Munificent. Munificent was assigned to the Rheinland fleet that ventured into Altair.  The Munificent and its escort, the Eisenstein, appear to have avoided the destruction of the rest of the fleet only to end up here.  The hull of the Schiff has signs of particle weaponry impacts identical to the weapon known as "Koalition Gatling", but whether Koalition or Koalitions-Rogues were responsible for the attack, is unknown. The log files onboard are corrupted beyond restoration. There may be cargo and equipment left onboard.

This Large Transporterererer had somehow gotten into the Kalinin system, far from Sirius space. This Schiff was secretly used by die Ausgestossenen on a daring mission: Introduce the Altair drug market to Cardamine. The Rogues didn't like that attempt to steal the market away. The derelict Schiff now serves as a reminder of what happens to those who try to mess with the Koalitions-Rogues. The Schiff might have some hidden equipment onboard as well as its cargo.

This Sirius-built transport belonged to the Gas Miner Guild and was part of material support provided the Koalition. It was transporting Niobium to Yinchuan Outpost, but was captured by Koalitions-Rogues. It was then intercepted by the Koalition fleet and destroyed during a swift firefight. The cargo is reported to be still onboard as neither the Koalition nor Koalitions-Rogues have attempted to reclaim the cargo.

Snoop was a Schiff belonging to a freelancer working with the Koalitions-Rogues. Snoop was used to deliver various cargo between Rogue bases. One day, Snoop was unfortunate enough to be caught in a raid by the Koalition Marine. It was intercepted and disabled during an attempt to reach the Tomsk gate.

A small scout fighter Ghadhafi had been reported lost during a deep space mission in Kandiris.  It was probably attacked by Nomaden during an attempt to destroy the nearby Nomad installation and may have some equipment left on board.

The Ghasel is a Schiff that was unfortunate to be disabled by the strange and powerful power surge that went throughout the Yakutsk system. For some reason these Schiffe have not been recovered since the time of the cataclysm, despite scans showing some equipment remaining on board and the lack of the escape pod. The cataclysmic surge may have been related to the Transdimensional Rift located in the system.

The Eosander  is a Schiff that was unfortunate to be disabled by the strange and powerful power surge that went throughout the Yakutsk system. For some reason these Schiffe have not been recovered since the time of the cataclysm, despite scans showing some equipment remaining on board and the lack of the escape pod. The cataclysmic surge may have been related to the Transdimensional Rift located in the system.

The Krasna  is a Schiff that was unfortunate to be disabled by the strange and powerful power surge that went throughout the Yakutsk system. For some reason these Schiffe have not been recovered since the time of the cataclysm, despite scans showing some equipment remaining on board and the lack of the escape pod. The cataclysmic surge may have been related to the Transdimensional Rift located in the system.

The Pride of Russia is one of the fighters that were destroyed by the Dom'Kavash during the Tomsk evacuation, drawing fire away from the transports and allowing them to escape. To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

The Wolga is one of the fighters that were destroyed by the Dom'Kavash during the Tomsk evacuation, drawing fire away from the transports and allowing them to escape. To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

To honor the valiant action of their pilots, the Marine even sent a wing of cloak-equipped Basilisks from an elite Marine squadron to recover their bodies, sometime after the evacuation. Aufgrund der Eile der Operation befindet sich noch etwas Ausruestung an Bord.

This large transport was recently escorted by a small ASF patrol to Planet Crossfire when they were ambushed by a force led by two CSF battleSchiffe in the Doradus Field. There were no survivors from the ASF patrol and the transport Schiff was abandoned with destroyed engines and failed life support systems.  There may be something of value still hidden on board this Schiff.

This light fighter, build in Bretonia, was registered as a Schiff owned by Gateway Shipping. How it found its end here with cargo holds filled with drugs, remains a mystery. Gateway Shipping refused to provide any information about this Schiff or its pilot.

Mustang was originally owned by a small private company registered in Bretonia. Its special guns mounts and unusual thrusters suggest that this was not a mass produced Schiff. On Severn station rumors were heard that this Schiff was stolen a few months ago in Leeds.

Goza was one of the fighters build in Kusari, which die Ausgestossenen stole from local police and have used as an escort for Cardamine drug transports. During one of these black-market runs the convoy was intercepted by a Kusari Marine patrol and Goza ended its journey in a short but fierce fight.

Leonidas was one of the experimental light fighter Schiffe build for die Liberty-Marine. Its weapon system was heavily modified and capable to use guns normally mounted only on very heavy fighters. This Schiff was lost during navy operation aimed against Ausgestossene Schiffe smuggling Cardamine in Telosis system. How this Schiff got to Enyo remains a mystery.

Transporterererer Freya was last seen 3 years ago when it was chased by a Marine patrol from Peris Station. Routine scan revealed Cardamine cargo, but the smuggler was able escape to Cirrus cloud where the patrol lost all traces.

This small Clydesdale class freighter was owned by Zoner pilot Charles Lamb. Last report about this trader was more than three years ago when he was leaving Planet Eton. Due the remnants of cargo found in this wreck it is very likely that he tried to perform independent smuggling in Corsair controlled space.

Akyma was once a police patrol Schiff which did not return from a patrol aimed against smuggling in Sextans field. At Jade Station, in the police records, is store its last radio message about a successful operation against a freighter which was carrying a cargo of Cardamine.
Xhosa was once a Aegira Technologies Schiff used for diplomacy operations in hostile areas. This particular Schiff and its pilot Tim Yenzer was on die Korsaren most wanted list for a long time.

Liberty police had only a few indeterminate records about this small freighter and its last owner was unknown. Considering its cargo, it had to be one of the many smugglers working for die Ausgestossenen in Cardamine trafficking. Why this Schiff ended its journey in Snake cloud and appears to have been abandoned, remains a mystery.

Niepce was last owned by freelancer merchant Stephen Noyes. There is not much known about what he usually transported, but Noyes was known as specialist in old guns used on military Schiffe. On Planet Vernon rumors were heard that he lately had some troubles with Xenos due this "hobby".

Seicento, a Humpback class freighter, was registered in Rheinland to a Rheinlander citizen named Oliver Hartung. Polizei records on Planet Kappa contained notes about his involvement in the Unioner movement. It is very likely that this particular pilot was involved in black-market trading.

Seewolf was one of the cloaked Schiffe used in die Rheinwehr during the first Nomad War. Many of these Schiffe were lost after this war ended, either by being destroyed or stolen. This concrete Schiff was destroyed by die Liberty-Marine during operations against local smugglers in 821 AS.

entries.source_text: <RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>Gloom EMP Mine</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>The Gloom mine incorporates a basic Eraser-based warhead and replaces the original Drone Mine's filler with this warhead. The result is a EMP mine with similar properties to the Eraser missile. However, use this mine with caution, as a detonation too close to your own Schiff may be opposite to the intended effect.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

This mine deals almost the same damage as the Eraser missile</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>Fire EMP Mine</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>After intensive research on detonation effects, weapons engineers have finally achieved a breakthrough in EMP munitions research, combining a miniaturized explosive warhead with a shell of pulse filler, and miniaturizing as much of the mine as possible to obtain the most powerful EMP mine so far on the market.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: <RDL><PUSH/><TRA data="1" mask="1" def="-2"/><JUST loc="center"/><TEXT>Leech EMP Mine</TEXT><PARA/><TEXT> </TEXT><PARA/><TRA data="0" mask="1" def="-1"/><JUST loc="left"/><TEXT>This EMP mine combines the original Fire mine's original chassis with a new mixture to produce an EMP blast so large that even some of the Border World fighters' shields can be taken down within a few sequential hits.</TEXT><PARA/><POP/></RDL>

entries.source_text: There is not much information about this weapon. Unsere Wissenschaftler wissen nicht genau, was es ist und wie es funktioniert. Es gibt nur eine Sache, die wir darueber wissen.... it is a plasma weapon and it is dangerous.
The Proton Cannon is one of the heavy guns that the Koalition used during the war with the Alliance. This new version of the Proton Cannon has much better statistics than the previous model.

entries.source_text: This Holoprojector is creating low gravimetric impulses that can, in combination with a network of high energy lasers, form a hologram around a Schiff. This technology is used spread wrong information and let small fleets look even more dangerous. Disadvantage of this technology is that it does use extreme high amounts of energy.

The Schlachtschiff Torpedo is the most dangerous weapon. It can cause heavy damage on Schlachtschiffs and other structures. The explosion can do heavy damage even on giant battleSchiffe and break the shield protection.

Diameter:  14,519.6 km
Mass:  6.82 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  terrestrial
Temperature:    -36°C/49°C
Escape Velocity:  12.85 km/sec



54 years ago a group religious Bretonians went on a journey to find a new place of peace, a new home. History books report that they did find a hidden jumphole in an unmapped sector of Sirius. After they jumped the hole closed and never appeared again. This Planet might be their colony.

entries.source_text:
Warp buoys are used for superluminal travel within a system. Warp buoys must be entered from their origin point, usually located near key industrial, military, or civilian bases.

 Warp buoys are the fastest and safest method of transporting goods and personnel over large distances. Both the Alliance and the Coalition used this technology to reach their colonies in a short time.

CLASS: Chasins
GRAVITY: Complete
DOCKING: Yes
AMENITIES: Yes
POPULATION: 5K


Liberty always was in need of secret outposts to maintain peace on the colonies. Sidewinder station is no exception.
Hidden deep inside the Alaska system the Sidewinder station served as a military outpost and prison station at once. For decades the knowledge about this station was limited to very few people.

This Orden station has been constructed after the discovery of a nomad threat close to the sol system. But this station is more than a military outpost. It is a symbol of unity of the Sirius houses. A final defence line protecting the Alliance from an upcoming storm.

Troop Carrier
This small Troop Carrier once was used to transport large groups of civilists to colonize new planets. Nowadays this job has been taken over by Schlachtschiffs and Luxury Liners which is a much more comfortable way of travel for the passengers. The old Troop Carrier is now used by small private companies to transport all kind of commodities.

Nexus


The Nexus originally was designed to be a support unit for heavy battles where big repair ships are easy targets. Its small size would have been perfect for repairing battleships while they are still being attacked. Due to technical problems this idea has been dropped and the ship design was altered to a light fighter. The Nexus has one big advantage towards other light fighters: the original powergenerator which delivers a high amount of energy to all ship systems.

Cobra


The cobra is a solidly built and extremely agile fighter equipped with powerful weaponry. Like its namesake, it possesses a deadly bite. The origin of this design is unknown.

Raptor


A heavily armed prey with a large cargo bay, a well-designed power core, heavy weapon mounts, and an agile chassis, the Raptor deserves its place among the top fighters of the Sirius Sector

Chimera


A slim design with powerful weapons. The Chimera is build on Planet New London but the local government did fear that the ship will be used by the local pirates. That is why this ship design is not allowed to be sold there.

V-Jaeger
The V-Jaeger, amedium fighter that was designed for small raids against pirates and Wegelagerer. It turned out to be a good ship against other medium fighters used around the house systems of Sirius. The design is simple but effective.

Exocet


The Exocet is a medium fighter with very good short range abilities. Its heavy guns and overdimensional powergenerator makes this ship a very good choice for small raids or defending bases.

Mirage-X


The Mirage-X is based on the design of the Dagger combined with elements and technology of the  original alliance Mirage. The task was to maximize the firepower but the result was a loss of agility due to the heavy guns and the powergenerator.

Abraxas


The Abraxas is a new Liberty fighter. It has a slim design that has been created out of the old alliance vessels found in the databases on Earth. The ship is agile and deadly.

Cerberus


Ships of the Cerberus class are the ASFs pride. Finest technology the newest duranium hull have made this ship even stronger than the battleships of the house systems. The weapons are more than just deadly and the whole design has just one single weak point (information classified).

Midnight Hammer
The Midnight Hammer battleSchiff class is build somewhere in Kusari space. The exact place is not known. The CSF soon found out that this Schiff is very valueable and even able to be a danger to ASF's Cerberus class. Even if the design is different from the Cerberus the main components of both Schiffe seem to have the same origin.

Liberty Cruiser
(Lexington-class)

Though built by the Liberty Navy to be a medium-range vessel, the Cruiser class is a fine melding of punishing firepower and streamlined mobility.
entries.translation_text:
Liberty Cruiser
(Lexington-class)

Though built by die Liberty-Marine to be a medium-range vessel, the Cruiser class is a fine melding of punishing firepower and streamlined mobility.
entries.suggested_text:
Liberty Cruiser
(Lexington-class)

Though built by die Liberty-Marine to be a medium-range vessel, the Cruiser class is a fine melding of punishing firepower and streamlined mobility.

entries.source_text:
Bretonia Destroyer
(Sheffield-class)

Built in large numbers by the Royal Bretonia Navy, this class serves as a reliable sentry force as well as an effective method of mass deployment.

Rheinland Gunboat
(Emden-class)

This ship is used largely as a tactical support unit, however due to its speed it can also be used as a deep incursion craft for contact teams or recon.

Reaper


During the early days of the Coalition war the Reaper was one of the most valueable ships of the Alliance. But due to its size it soon became a target of the light fighters of the Coalition. Now after some changes on its design were made it is a powerful weapon again.

Damocles Kreuzer
The Damocles is a heavy cruiser that was going to be constructed at the end of the war between the Koalition and the Alliance. Now that a big part of the databases on Earth are decoded these Schiffdesigns are build by der Orden.

Valiant Korvette
The Valiant class gunboat is a nice addition to der Orden fleet. Being a concept of the old Alliance but never build during the war this gun will have to prove its worth in future battles.

Orkus Zerstoerer
The Orkus class is not as strong as the other destroyers or cruisers that are now build by der Orden but this Schiff does still show very good combat abilities and is a worthy opponent.

Gladiator Cruiser


The Gladiator is a medium cruiser with average fighting abilities. Because of its strong hull the Gladiator is going to fight in the first line of every formation.

Typhon Korvette
The Typhon class gunboat is one of the most valueable gunboats available. It has enough power to hold more weapons than other gunboats. In groups of 3 or 4 these gunboats can even take out battleSchiffe if needed.

Rage Zerstoerer
This destroyer class is build for close attacks against nomad forces. Der Orden took over this Schiff design from the old databases on Earth to build up a their new fleet.

Ares Kreuzer
The Ares is a standard cruiser design that has been developed at the end of the Koalition war. Many of those Schiffe were destroyed protecting the sleeperSchiffe when they launched from Earth and headed to Sirius.

Hephaistos Destroyer


The Hephaistos is a heavy destroyer used to break up enemy blockades and fly deep into enemy territory. It is more agile than other cruisers but less armored.

Saphiras Korvette
The Saphiras is a new gunboat developed by the LSF. The first few versions of this Schiff have been delivered to der Orden to test them in real battles. It looks like the Saphiras might become one of the standard gunboats in Sirius.

Herakles Korvette
The Herakles is a standard gunboat that has been developed in Bretonia. It existance has been classifies as secret but due to unknown reason some of these Schiffe are in der Ordens hands.

Broadsword Kreuzer
This cruiser is one of der Ordens main units in their fight against the nomad forces. It is fast to construct and not very expensive but on the other side it does not have a good hull for a Schiff of this class.

Spectra Korvette
The Spectra has its name from its new hull which is a result of a new hull type. New materials were used to build this Schiff reducing the mass of this Schiff. Maybe this will be used more often for future Schiff designs.

Mutineer


The Mutineer is a new very heavy fighter that is constructed by the Corsairs. Heavy armed this ship is one of the most valueable fighters in Sirius. Its only disadvantage is the loss of agility due to its heavy hull.
entries.translation_text:
Mutineer


The Mutineer is a new very heavy fighter that is constructed by die Korsaren. Heavy armed this ship is one of the most valueable fighters in Sirius. Its only disadvantage is the loss of agility due to its heavy hull.
entries.suggested_text:
Mutineer


The Mutineer is a new very heavy fighter that is constructed by die Korsaren. Heavy armed this ship is one of the most valueable fighters in Sirius. Its only disadvantage is the loss of agility due to its heavy hull.

entries.source_text:
Pioneer


The Pioneer belongs to the best what the Liberty engineers were able to create. It is agile and has a strong hull. Combined with its ability to mount heavy weapons this ship is extreme deadly.

Horizon


 The Horizon belongs, like the Pioneer, to the new ship designs developed in Liberty. It is very agile and has a high firepower. All in all a very good ship for a skilled pilot.

Iguana


This ship has not much in common with its name. The Iguana is a very heavy fighter build in Liberty as a result of the Nomad threat. It is agile and extremly powerful. In the hands of a good pilot the Iguana is a very mighty weapon.

Libertine Bomber
This heavy bomber comes with four torpedo mounts and is therefore a real threat to all capital Schiffe all over Sirius. But also normal fighters should be careful if they face such a bomber in a fight.

Lightbringer Bomber


The Lightbringer Bomber is not the best fighter in Sirius but for sure it is a danger to all big targets out there. With its three torpedo mounts the Lightbringer can blast away even the biggest targets.

Fury


The Cataclysm is one of the best fighters available. It is the first choice for every pilot that can't stay out of a heavy battle. The ship is agile, has a heavy hull and high firepower.

Devastator


The Devastator does not have a strong hull but it is more agile than other ships of its class. This ship is the first choice for every pilot that needs agility instead of a heavy hull.

Devilray


The Devilray is a light fighter designed for scout missions into unexplored territory. The Coalition does not use this ship very often lately due to the fact that it was not needed that much these days.

Dolphin


The Dolphin is a very heavy fighter even if the firepower is kinda low. Coalition pilots see this ship more like an cheap version of a valuable fighter that is only used when the need is highest.

Hermes


The Hermes is a light fighter build by the LSF. Is is used against local pirate groups in liberty. Like all other light fighters this Hermes is very agile but does not have much firepower.

Murphy


The Murphy has a design which is very different from other ships. The large engines dominate the ship while the other system appear very compact. It is not yet know how this ship performs in combat.

Shadowreaper


This is the re-development of the classic Reaper. It comes with several upgrades that improve many of the original ship systems. It also comes with slight design changes.

Stinger


The Stinger is a heavy fighter with average fighting abilities. Build on Planet Stuttgart this ship mainly was used by local freelancers. Due to its success against those local rogues this ship developed to one of the most favorite short range fighters.

Thunder


The Thunder is a very agile fighter with a high firepower. Its only problem is the weak hull. In the end this ship design will have to prove its worth against enemy forces.

Nomad Bomber
Very little is known about this Schiff. However, its structure appears to be organic, suggesting that it may have been grown rather than constructed. The Bomber appears to be bigger than normal fighters and it seems like it has much stronger weapons.

Nomad Strike Carrier
Once being just a rumour spread by some freelancers the Nomad Strike Carrier became a deadly truth. Its structure appears to be organic, suggesting that it may have been grown rather than constructed. It is much bigger than ordiary battleSchiffe and its guns seem to be way more powerful.

Dom'Kavash Light Fighter


Organic materials are interlaced with the metallic components of this craft. They work together seamlessly to achieve outstanding performance. Revolutionary engine design translates into the attaining of spectacular speeds for this fighter, while strafing jets and thrust vectoring allow for respectable maneuverability. Interception, reconnaissance, and escort roles are played to handily by the design. The Dom'Kavash light fighter is only to be approached with the utmost in caution.
entries.translation_text:
Dom'Kavash leichter Jaeger


Organic materials are interlaced with the metallic components of this craft. They work together seamlessly to achieve outstanding performance. entries.source_text:
Dom'Kavash Medium Fighter


Organic materials are interlaced with the metallic components of this craft. They work together seamlessly to achieve outstanding performance. Revolutionary engine design translates into the attaining of spectacular speeds for this fighter, while strafing jets and thrust vectoring allow for respectable maneuverability. Interception, reconnaissance, and escort roles are played to handily by the design. The Dom'Kavash medium fighter is only to be approached with the utmost in caution.

Dom'Kavash MotherSchiff
At such a grand scale it is wondrous to behold such a living creature. Mechanical components are built in beneath an armored, external carapace to provide the ideal compromise between durability and function. Sophisticated, chemical reactions provide this vessel with the propulsion it needs. Technology so advanced also provides for energy to be rechanneled to other systems at will to boost shielding or charge its formidable suite of turrets. Versatility and endurance allow for the Dom'Kavash MotherSchiff to patrol open gulfs of space for months on end. Do not provoke.

Dom'Kavash Heavy Fighter


Organic materials are interlaced with the metallic components of this craft. They work together seamlessly to achieve outstanding performance. Revolutionary engine design translates into the attaining of spectacular speeds for this fighter, while strafing jets and thrust vectoring allow for respectable maneuverability. Interception, reconnaissance, and escort roles are played to handily by the design. The Dom'Kavash heavy fighter is only to be approached with the utmost in caution.

entries.source_text:
Dom'Kavash Korvette
This Korvette presents a perfect balance of animate and inanimate matter. Together they work in harmony to achieve outstanding performance. Revolutionary engine technology allows for increased payload and the addition of armoring growths without sacrificing superior speed. Strafing jets and limited thrust vectoring make the Schiff able to turn surprisingly well considering its mass. Without a doubt, this design specializes in defeating fighter resistance and terrorizing commercial Schiffping. The Dom'Kavash gunboat is to be engaged only with extreme caution.

Class:  Tabiti
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  4k



This is one of the most important stations in the Coalition. Holding high amounts of goods and weapons this station is base for all Coalition activities in this sector.

Class:  Stribog
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  3k



This outpost was created to support fighters on long range missions. It developed to a valuable and most important Coalition station after serveral upgrades were done.

Class:  Eruslan
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  3k



Donezk is the heart of the Coalition recruitment bureau and therefore most important for the Coalition fleet.

Class:  Mokosh'
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  4k



This is an old station build in the early days after the Coalition was forced to leave Sol. Even after all the long time that has passed by Gorkij is still one of the most important Coalition stations.

Class:  Velnias
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  2k



Odessa is one of the new stations, build 12 years ago. Starting with many problems this station was very hard to run. There were many repairs and upgrades during the first 5 years to hold this station together.

Class:  Korolev
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  4k


Baku is a trading station in the Coalition where you can find nearly everything you will need. But for some reason the Coalition does not sell everything to people they don't know.

Class:  Iarilo
Gravity:  complete
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  yes
Population:  5k



The Charkow Outpost is a basic station to support the battleships on their long range missions. It holds many goods and the weapons for Coalition battleships.

Tscheljabinsk Station
This station was build 52 years ago as a result of the growth of the new Koalition. The plans were to force massive expansion again but since die Nomaden appeared again this project has been stopped.

Class:  Svarozhits
Gravity:  partial
Docking:  yes
Amenities:  limited
Population:  3k



Swerdlowsk is a basic station for all kinds of military activities. Many of the high ranked pilots and captains use this station to meet each other and gain information about the current situation.

entries.source_text: The Dom'Kavash are an old race with once controled the entire galaxy. It is not known why they left their territory to an unknown destination. Rumors say they had to leave back to their central systems.

Dom'Kavash Kreuzer
Impressive adaptations to bio-material fabrication have yielded yet another stunning success in the Dom'Kavash Kreuzer. While underway, this vessel can stretch its cargo bay to envelop and secure objects several times larger than itself. During return trips this same property can be used to collapse overall size down considerably, thus reducing its signature on Scanners. It also makes the vessel easier to pilot in vicinity of planetary surfaces, space stations, and gates.

Dom'Kavash Hypergate


Scanning... 
Metallic structure found... 
This gate is a high energy producing structure similar to the already known Jumpgate technology. The energy produced by this gate is enough to travel even between galaxies. 

 Danger!
Extreme heavy defence detected.

Class:  Gagarin
Crew:  Classified
Armament:  Classified



The Gorlowka is the seconds defence line between the Coalition and the Nomad forces. Everything that manage to pass the ioncannons of the first defence line in Gurm and Gladius will have to deal with this Carrier and its crew.

Diameter:  55,004.9 km
Mass:  8.60 x 10e24 kg
Terrain:  artificial
Temperature:   -63°C/57°C
Escape Velocity:  16.20 km/sec



The Coalition sleepers who arrived in Sovetskaya realized that  Murmansk could not be their home unless its massive gravity was reduced somehow.  In typical Coalition fashion, a colossal mining operation was begun, using the massive Borodin ion gun, eventually removing the entire metallic core from the planet.  All this material was required to build the hypergates, Dark Reign ion cannons and the giant Coalition Fleet.

entries.source_text:
DomKavash Annihilator
The DomKavash Annihilator is comparable with the weapon technology developed after the research of nomad technology such as the Phoenix Projection Cannons and Koalition Gattlings. It seems like the DomKavash found a way to use the energy provided by the generator in a way more effective way than it is possible for us. This explains the high effectivity of the DomKavash weapons. The Annihilator seems to be just a small standard weapon in the DomKavash armoury which leaves enough space for speculations about more powerful weapon technology.

entries.source_text: The Seewolf, with a set of experimental weapons on board, pursued a squadron of Outcast Schiffe deep into the Diablo cloud. It was never heard from again. It is rumored that the pilot had ingested an extraordinary amount of Cardamine, perhaps explaining his subsequent actions.

ISC-2543 Claw VHF


The Claw utilize a combination of advanced alloys and electronics to reduce their effective signature radius. This, along with superior maneuverability and speed, makes them very hard to target and track, particularly for high caliber turrets.

CTE-6200 Flathead Civilian VHF


Already possessing a reputation despite its limited initial circulation, the Flathead is a powerful weapon platform with long range capability and strong defensive systems. Formidable both one-on-one and as a support ship, it was referred to as the "best chance to survive" by the pilots who participated in its safety and performance testing.

Z-4005 Foxhound Pirate Bomber


Specifically engineered to fire torpedoes, bombers represent the next generation in covert ops craft. The bombers are designed for sneak attacks on large vessels with powerful missile guidance technology enabling the torpedoes to strike faster and from a longer distance.

M15 Vigilant Corsair schwerer Jaeger
The Corsair Vigilant sports good firepower capability, missile hardpoints and some extremely strong armor plating, making it one of the best support fighters out there. Ideal for use as point Schiffe to draw enemy fire from more vulnerable friendlies.

AP-9854 Seahorse Kopfgeldjaeger VHF
The Kopfgeldjaeger have been upgrading many of their ships in recent years and adding new ones. The Seahorse is one of the most recent ones and considered by many to be the best fighters in existence. As witnessed, the Seahorse is mainly intended for large-scale military operations, acting in coordination with larger military vessels, but it is more than powerful enough for solo operations.

Series-R Rapier Borderworld VHF


The Rapier is a very powerful combat fighter and can easily tackle the best very heavy fighters out there. It has gone through many radical design phases since its blueprints were originally rejected by the Liberty government. The Rapier has a wide variety of offensive capabilities, making it an unpredictable and deadly adversary.

J13-05P Cayman Kusari VHF


The Cayman has been very popular throughout Kusari space for years because of its versatility. It is rather expensive, but buyers will definitely get their money's worth, as the Cayman is one of the more powerful fighters available on the market.

04C Apophis Orden Frachter
The Apophis freighter is the main cargo-carrier for der Orden, particularly in long, arduous trade-runs. Its huge size and comfortable armament makes it perfectly equipped for those tasks, although der Orden seldom let it roam alone.

OBJECTIVE:
After many years, Nomads have returned to Sirius space and started to attack human colonies again.

It is not known where they come from or how they can do such quick raids and disappear suddenly after. Probably Orillion has further information about these attacks.
Fly to New Berlin.

DIFFICULTY:
This should be easy going.

REWARD:
Information.

entries.source_text:
It has been two years since the Dyson Sphere incident occurred. A lot has changed.

A peace treaty was signed by the houses, and The Order became a respected organization funded by governments. Still operating in the dark. The Order's mission is to safeguard this fragile peace and keep an eye on the threat of the Nomads.

Juni disappeared five months ago. According to her, there was an important mission that she was unable to discuss. Wonderful, I am curious if there is a mission that is not important. 
*Sigh*
I miss her.

Today I got a message from Orillion.
He kept it short.
"Nomads have returned, meet me in New Berlin"
Dammit, a few more details would have not hurt.
Well... to New Berlin then.

entries.source_text:
*PERSOENLICHER EINTRAG:
Orillion! Since Juni left Liberty 5 months ago, I have not heard any news about him. He asserted that die Nomaden would return at some point in the future. What other reason is there for him to contact me? I will make my way to New Berlin now and have a brief conversation with my old friend.

OBJECTIVE:
Orillion informed me about a Nomad system that has just been discovered and is currently under attack by military forces. The first direct assault was ordered by Juni after taking the Osiris to that system.
Embark on a journey to Omicron Alpha, where you will find the newly discovered Nomad gate concealed in a dense nebula.

DIFFICULTY:
The journey is effortless, but what awaits us on the other side of the gate?

REWARD:
Money and access to new systems.

entries.source_text:
*PERSONAL ENTRY:
In New Berlin, I was greeted by Orillion and King who shared information about a nomad invasion in Sirius. It is their belief that X-3043, a newly discovered system on our star maps, is the source of this attack. It's not my business anymore, but Juni is directing a counter attack on that system right now. I am forced to confront new challenges once more.

entries.source_text:
Orillion: "How are you Trent?"

Trent: "Fine, but why am I here?"

Orillion: "We have a problem, the nomads are back and attacking Sirius. We have got reports from Kusari, Bretonia and Liberty systems where Nomad ships have been sighted, and up to now we could not explain how they managed to get that deep into our space."

Trent: "Add Rheinland to that list. On my way to New Berlin I got attacked two times, the second attack was even led by a Nomad Battleship."

Orillion: "The situation appears to be worse than I thought."

Trent: "Probably, but which role do I play here?"

Orillion: "A Rheinland explorer found a hidden Nomad jumpgate in Omicron Alpha. We suspect heavy Nomad forces behind the gate. Maybe all Nomad activities in Sirius have their origin there. The houses meanwhile have sent their fleets to conquer the X-3043 system which lies behind that gate but we expect heavy resistence. The operation is led by the Osiris."

Trent: "What are you doing here then?"

Orillion: "Juni is currently commanding the Osiris. That is why you are here and that is why you and King will make sure that she will return in one piece."

OBJECTIVE:
For several days now, there has been a raging assault on the Nomad system. Our fleets were unable to make any significant advances. You may be able to make a difference.

DIFFICULTY:
Bring it on!

REWARD:
Money and access to new systems.
